title: An unconditionally stable hybridizable-embedded discontinuous Galerkin method for the phase field crystal equation
summary: This paper presents a first-order convex splitting hybridizable/embedded discontinuous Galerkin method for the phase field crystal equation written in mixed form. Since the sixth-order phase field crystal equation is rewritten as a first-order system, our scheme avoids the calculation of high-order derivatives, which can be computationally expensive. The proposed method uses continuous facet unknowns and static condensation, which significantly reduces the number of coupled degrees of freedom. Using stabilization parameters that satisfy a simple and explicit relation, we show that our scheme is unconditionally energy stable. Moreover, we show the existence and uniqueness of the discrete solution for the case of variable mobility. The scheme's performance and properties are demonstrated through several numerical examples, including benchmark results that align with the existing literature, as well as a comparison of degrees of freedom against other methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于相场晶体方程的一阶凸分裂混合/嵌入式间断伽辽金方法，通过将六阶方程重写为一阶系统避免高阶导数计算，利用连续面未知量和静态凝聚减少自由度，证明无条件能量稳定
AI.motivation: 相场晶体方程是六阶偏微分方程，传统方法计算高阶导数计算成本高。需要开发能避免高阶导数计算、减少自由度、保持能量稳定的高效数值方法
AI.method: 将六阶相场晶体方程重写为一阶系统，采用凸分裂混合/嵌入式间断伽辽金方法，使用连续面未知量和静态凝聚技术，通过满足简单显式关系的稳定化参数确保稳定性
AI.result: 方法避免了高阶导数计算，显著减少耦合自由度数量，证明无条件能量稳定性，对变迁移率情况证明离散解存在唯一性，数值算例与现有文献基准结果一致，自由度数量优于其他方法
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种高效稳定的相场晶体方程数值方法，通过一阶系统重构、混合/嵌入式间断伽辽金格式和静态凝聚技术，在避免高阶导数计算的同时减少自由度并保持能量稳定

title: KROM: Kernelized Reduced Order Modeling
summary: We propose KROM, a kernel-based reduced-order framework for fast solution of nonlinear partial differential equations. KROM formulates PDE solution as a minimum-norm (Gaussian-process) recovery problem in an RKHS, and accelerates the resulting kernel solves by sparsifying the precision matrix via sparse Cholesky factorization. A central ingredient is an empirical kernel constructed from a snapshot library of PDE solutions (generated under varying forcings, initial data, boundary data, or parameters). This snapshot-driven kernel adapts to problem-specific structure -- boundary behavior, oscillations, nonsmooth features, linear constraints, conservation and dissipation laws -- thereby reducing the dependence on hand-tuned stationary kernels. The resulting method yields an implicit reduced model: after sparsification, only a localized subset of effective degrees of freedom is used online. We report numerical results for semilinear elliptic equations, discontinuous-coefficient Darcy flow, viscous Burgers, Allen--Cahn, and two-dimensional Navier--Stokes, showing that empirical kernels can match or outperform Matérn baselines, especially in nonsmooth regimes. We also provide error bounds that separate discretization effects, snapshot-space approximation error, and sparse-Cholesky approximation error.

AI.tldr: KROM：一种基于核的降阶框架，通过稀疏Cholesky分解加速核求解，使用经验核适应问题特定结构，实现非线性PDE的快速求解。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动调整的平稳核函数，难以适应PDE问题中的边界行为、振荡、非光滑特征、线性约束、守恒和耗散定律等特定结构，需要更自适应的高效求解框架。
AI.method: 将PDE求解表述为RKHS中的最小范数（高斯过程）恢复问题，通过稀疏Cholesky分解稀疏化精度矩阵加速核求解。核心是使用PDE解快照库构建经验核，该核能自适应问题特定结构，形成隐式降阶模型。
AI.result: 在半线性椭圆方程、不连续系数达西流、粘性Burgers、Allen-Cahn和二维Navier-Stokes等数值实验中，经验核匹配或优于Matérn基线，尤其在非光滑区域表现更好。提供了分离离散化误差、快照空间近似误差和稀疏Cholesky近似误差的误差界。
AI.conclusion: KROM框架通过经验核和稀疏Cholesky分解，实现了对非线性PDE的高效求解，减少了对手动调整核函数的依赖，在非光滑区域表现优异，为PDE求解提供了新的降阶建模方法。

title: Integral equations for flexural scattering problems with periodic boundaries
summary: We develop a method for computing the scattering of flexural waves off of a periodic wall or a periodic line of scatterers. These waves model the fluctuations of thin plates with periodic clamped, supported, or free edges. We use the Floquet--Bloch transform to convert the problem into a collection of uncoupled quasi-periodic problems. We then solve each quasi-periodic problem efficiently and accurately using a novel integral equation based on the quasi-periodic flexural Green's function. Finally, we show how the proposed method can be used to simulate scattering from junctions of semi-infinite lines of scatterers.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算弯曲波在周期性壁或散射体阵列上散射的方法，适用于薄板波动分析
AI.motivation: 需要高效准确地计算薄板中弯曲波在周期性结构（如周期性夹持、支撑或自由边缘）上的散射问题
AI.method: 使用Floquet-Bloch变换将问题转化为解耦的准周期问题，然后基于准周期弯曲格林函数建立新颖的积分方程进行求解
AI.result: 开发出高效准确的计算方法，并能模拟半无限散射体阵列连接处的散射问题
AI.conclusion: 该方法为薄板中弯曲波在周期性结构上的散射计算提供了有效的数值工具，特别适用于复杂几何配置

title: Inexact versions of several block-splitting preconditioners for indefinite least squares problems
summary: This paper introduces inexact versions of several block-splitting preconditioners for solving the block three-by-three linear systems arising from a special class of indefinite least squares problems. We first establish the convergence conditions for the corresponding stationary iterative methods. Then, it follows that under these conditions, all eigenvalues of the preconditioned matrices are contained within a circle centered at $(1,0)$ with radius $1$. This property implies that these preconditioners are effective in accelerating the convergence of the GMRES method. Furthermore, we analyze the eigenpairs of the preconditioned matrices in detail and derive a theoretical upper bound on the number of GMRES iterations for solving the preconditioned systems. Ultimately, numerical experiments reveal the efficacy of the proposed preconditioners.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了几种用于求解特定不定最小二乘问题中块三乘三线性系统的非精确块分裂预条件子，分析了其收敛条件和特征值分布，证明了它们能有效加速GMRES方法的收敛。
AI.motivation: 针对一类特殊的不定最小二乘问题产生的块三乘三线性系统，需要开发有效的预条件子来加速迭代求解方法的收敛。
AI.method: 提出了几种非精确块分裂预条件子，建立了相应定常迭代法的收敛条件，分析了预条件矩阵的特征值分布和特征对，推导了GMRES迭代次数的理论上界。
AI.result: 证明了在收敛条件下，预条件矩阵的所有特征值都包含在以(1,0)为中心、半径为1的圆内，这一性质确保了预条件子能有效加速GMRES收敛。数值实验验证了所提预条件子的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的非精确块分裂预条件子对于求解特定不定最小二乘问题的块三乘三线性系统是有效的，能显著加速GMRES方法的收敛。

title: Multi-Condition Digital Twin Calibration for Axial Piston Pumps : Compound Fault Simulation
summary: Axial piston pumps are indispensable power sources in high-stakes fluid power systems, including aerospace, marine, and heavy machinery applications. Their operational reliability is frequently compromised by compound faults that simultaneously affect multiple friction pairs. Conventional data-driven diagnosis methods suffer from severe data scarcity for compound faults and poor generalization across varying operating conditions. This paper proposes a novel multi-condition physics-data coupled digital twin calibration framework that explicitly resolves the fundamental uncertainty of pump outlet flow ripple. The framework comprises three synergistic stages: in-situ virtual high-frequency flow sensing on a dedicated rigid metallic segment, surrogate model-assisted calibration of the 3D CFD source model using physically estimated ripple amplitudes, and multi-objective inverse transient analysis for viscoelastic unsteady-friction pipeline parameter identification. Comprehensive experiments on a test rig demonstrate that the calibrated digital twin accurately reproduces both single-fault and two representative compound-fault. These results establish a high-fidelity synthetic fault-generation capability that directly enables robust zero-shot fault diagnosis under previously unseen operating regimes and fault combinations, thereby advancing predictive maintenance in complex hydraulic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多工况物理-数据耦合数字孪生校准框架，解决轴向柱塞泵复合故障诊断中的数据稀缺和泛化问题，实现零样本故障诊断。
AI.motivation: 轴向柱塞泵在关键流体动力系统中至关重要，但复合故障同时影响多个摩擦副，传统数据驱动方法面临复合故障数据稀缺和工况泛化能力差的问题。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 在刚性金属段上进行原位虚拟高频流量传感；2) 使用物理估计的脉动幅度通过代理模型辅助校准3D CFD源模型；3) 多目标逆瞬态分析识别粘弹性非定常摩擦管道参数。
AI.result: 实验表明校准后的数字孪生能准确复现单故障和两种代表性复合故障，建立了高保真合成故障生成能力，实现了在未见工况和故障组合下的鲁棒零样本故障诊断。
AI.conclusion: 该框架解决了泵出口流量脉动的基本不确定性，为复杂液压系统的预测性维护提供了有效解决方案，推动了数字孪生在故障诊断中的应用。

title: From Global to Local: Learning Context-Aware Graph Representations for Document Classification and Summarization
summary: This paper proposes a data-driven method to automatically construct graph-based document representations. Building upon the recent work of Bugueño and de Melo (2025), we leverage the dynamic sliding-window attention module to effectively capture local and mid-range semantic dependencies between sentences, as well as structural relations within documents. Graph Attention Networks (GATs) trained on our learned graphs achieve competitive results on document classification while requiring lower computational resources than previous approaches. We further present an exploratory evaluation of the proposed graph construction method for extractive document summarization, highlighting both its potential and current limitations. The implementation of this project can be found on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 提出基于动态滑动窗口注意力模块的数据驱动方法，自动构建图结构文档表示，用于文档分类和抽取式摘要任务
AI.motivation: 传统文档表示方法难以有效捕捉句子间的局部、中程语义依赖和文档内部结构关系，需要更高效且计算资源友好的文档表示方法
AI.method: 基于Bugueño和de Melo (2025)的工作，利用动态滑动窗口注意力模块自动构建图结构文档表示，捕捉句子间的局部和中程语义依赖，然后使用图注意力网络(GATs)进行训练
AI.result: 在文档分类任务上取得有竞争力的结果，同时比先前方法需要更少的计算资源；在抽取式文档摘要任务上进行了探索性评估，展示了潜力但也指出了当前限制
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据驱动图构建方法能够有效表示文档结构，在文档分类任务上表现良好且计算效率高，在抽取式摘要任务上显示出潜力但需要进一步改进

title: Transit Network Design with Two-Level Demand Uncertainties: A Machine Learning and Contextual Stochastic Optimization Framework
summary: Transit Network Design is a well-studied problem in the field of transportation, typically addressed by solving optimization models under fixed demand assumptions. Considering the limitations of these assumptions, this paper proposes a new framework, namely the Two-Level Rider Choice Transit Network Design (2LRC-TND), that leverages machine learning and contextual stochastic optimization (CSO) through constraint programming (CP) to incorporate two layers of demand uncertainties into the network design process. The first level identifies travelers who rely on public transit (core demand), while the second level captures the conditional adoption behavior of those who do not (latent demand), based on the availability and quality of transit services. To capture these two types of uncertainties, 2LRC-TND relies on two travel mode choice models, that use multiple machine learning models. To design a network, 2LRC-TND integrates the resulting choice models into a CSO that is solved using a CP-SAT solver. 2LRC-TND is evaluated through a case study involving over 6,600 travel arcs and more than 38,000 trips in the Atlanta metropolitan area. The computational results demonstrate the effectiveness of the 2LRC-TND in designing transit networks that account for demand uncertainties and contextual information, offering a more realistic alternative to fixed-demand models.

AI.tldr: 提出2LRC-TND框架，结合机器学习与上下文随机优化，通过约束规划解决考虑两层需求不确定性的公交网络设计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统公交网络设计基于固定需求假设存在局限性，需要更真实地考虑需求不确定性，特别是核心需求与潜在需求两个层面的不确定性。
AI.method: 使用机器学习构建两个出行方式选择模型分别捕捉核心需求和潜在需求，然后集成到上下文随机优化框架中，通过CP-SAT求解器求解。
AI.result: 在亚特兰大都市区案例研究中（6600+出行弧，38000+出行），2LRC-TND能有效设计考虑需求不确定性和上下文信息的公交网络。
AI.conclusion: 2LRC-TND为公交网络设计提供了比固定需求模型更现实的替代方案，能更好地处理需求不确定性。

title: Multi-Sourced, Multi-Agent Evidence Retrieval for Fact-Checking
summary:
Misinformation spreading over the Internet poses a significant threat to both societies and individuals, necessitating robust and scalable fact-checking that relies on retrieving accurate and trustworthy evidence. Previous methods rely on semantic and social-contextual patterns learned from training data, which limits their generalization to new data distributions. Recently, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based methods have been proposed to utilize the reasoning capability of LLMs with retrieved grounding evidence documents. However, these methods largely rely on textual similarity for evidence retrieval and struggle to retrieve evidence that captures multi-hop semantic relations within rich document contents. These limitations lead to overlooking subtle factual correlations between the evidence and the claims to be fact-checked during evidence retrieval, thus causing inaccurate veracity predictions.
  To address these issues, we propose WKGFC, which exploits authorized open knowledge graph as a core resource of evidence. LLM-enabled retrieval is designed to assess the claims and retrieve the most relevant knowledge subgraphs, forming structured evidence for fact verification. To augment the knowledge graph evidence, we retrieve web contents for completion. The above process is implemented as an automatic Markov Decision Process (MDP): A reasoning LLM agent decides what actions to take according to the current evidence and the claims. To adapt the MDP for fact-checking, we use prompt optimization to fine-tune the agentic LLM.

AI.tldr: WKGFC 利用开放知识图谱作为核心证据源，通过LLM驱动的检索获取相关子图作为结构化证据，并采用马尔可夫决策过程自动进行事实核查。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：传统方法依赖训练数据的语义和社交模式，泛化能力差；RAG方法依赖文本相似性检索，难以捕捉多跳语义关系，导致证据检索时忽略细微事实关联，影响核查准确性。
AI.method: 1. 利用授权开放知识图谱作为核心证据源；2. 设计LLM驱动的检索机制，评估声明并检索最相关的知识子图作为结构化证据；3. 检索网络内容补充知识图谱证据；4. 将整个过程实现为自动马尔可夫决策过程，推理LLM代理根据当前证据和声明决定行动；5. 通过提示优化微调代理LLM以适应事实核查任务。
AI.result: 论文未提供具体实验结果，但从方法描述看，WKGFC旨在解决现有方法的局限性，通过结构化知识图谱证据和智能检索机制提高事实核查的准确性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: WKGFC通过整合知识图谱结构化证据和LLM驱动的智能检索，构建了一个更有效的事实核查框架，能够更好地捕捉多跳语义关系，提高证据检索的准确性和事实核查的可靠性。

title: Learning Under Extreme Data Scarcity: Subject-Level Evaluation of Lightweight CNNs for fMRI-Based Prodromal Parkinsons Detection
comment: Methodological case study cs.LG on subject-level evaluation and model capacity under extreme data scarcity; 9 pages, 1 figure. Experiments use 40-subject PPMI fMRI cohort; no external validation
summary:
Deep learning is often applied in settings where data are limited, correlated, and difficult to obtain, yet evaluation practices do not always reflect these constraints. Neuroimaging for prodromal Parkinsons disease is one such case, where subject numbers are small and individual scans produce many highly related samples. This work examines prodromal Parkinsons detection from resting-state fMRI as a machine learning problem centered on learning under extreme data scarcity.
  Using fMRI data from 40 subjects, including 20 prodromal Parkinsons cases and 20 healthy controls, ImageNet-pretrained convolutional neural networks are fine-tuned and evaluated under two different data partitioning strategies. Results show that commonly used image-level splits allow slices from the same subject to appear in both training and test sets, leading to severe information leakage and near-perfect accuracy. When a strict subject-level split is enforced, performance drops substantially, yielding test accuracies between 60 and 81 percent.
  Models with different capacity profiles are compared, including VGG19, Inception V3, Inception ResNet V2, and the lightweight MobileNet V1. Under subject-level evaluation, MobileNet demonstrates the most reliable generalization, outperforming deeper architectures despite having significantly fewer parameters. These results indicate that in extreme low-data regimes, evaluation strategy and model capacity have a greater impact on performance than architectural depth. Although the analysis is limited to a single cohort of 40 subjects and does not include external validation or cross-validation, it provides a concrete case study and practical recommendations for evaluating deep learning models under severe data scarcity.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了在极低数据量下（40名受试者）使用深度学习检测前驱期帕金森病的问题，发现常用的图像级数据划分会导致严重信息泄露，而严格的受试者级划分能更真实反映模型性能，且轻量级模型MobileNet在泛化能力上优于更深层的架构。
AI.motivation: 深度学习常应用于数据有限、相关且难以获取的场景，但现有评估方法未能充分反映这些约束。前驱期帕金森病的神经影像分析正是这样的案例：受试者数量少，个体扫描产生大量高度相关的样本。本研究旨在探索在极端数据稀缺条件下学习前驱期帕金森病检测的机器学习问题。
AI.method: 使用40名受试者（20名前驱期帕金森病患者和20名健康对照）的fMRI数据，采用ImageNet预训练的卷积神经网络进行微调。比较两种数据划分策略：图像级划分（允许同一受试者的切片出现在训练集和测试集）和严格的受试者级划分。比较了不同容量配置的模型：VGG19、Inception V3、Inception ResNet V2和轻量级MobileNet V1。
AI.result: 图像级划分导致严重信息泄露，产生接近完美的准确率；而严格的受试者级划分下，性能显著下降，测试准确率在60-81%之间。在受试者级评估中，MobileNet表现出最可靠的泛化能力，尽管参数数量显著较少，但性能优于更深层的架构。
AI.conclusion: 在极端低数据量情况下，评估策略和模型容量对性能的影响比架构深度更大。轻量级模型在数据稀缺条件下可能比深层架构表现更好。研究为在严重数据稀缺条件下评估深度学习模型提供了具体案例和实践建议，但受限于单队列40名受试者，缺乏外部验证或交叉验证。

title: An adaptive integrating factor midpoint method for second order evolution equations
summary: In this paper, we consider the integrating factor midpoint method for wave-type equations and derive optimal order a posteriori error estimates. We first introduce an integrating factor midpoint approximation defined by the piecewise linear approximate solutions, and derive suboptimal order residual-based error estimates using the energy technique. Hence the key is introducing a continuous, piecewise quadratic time reconstruction to establish optimal order error bounds. Based on the reliable a posteriori error control, we develop an adaptive time-stepping strategy. Numerical examples are implemented to verify the convergence rate of an error estimator and the high efficiency of the adaptive algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文针对波动型方程，提出积分因子中点法，并推导了最优阶后验误差估计。通过引入连续分段二次时间重构建立最优阶误差界，基于可靠的后验误差控制开发自适应时间步进策略。
AI.motivation: 研究波动型方程的高效数值解法，特别是需要建立可靠的后验误差估计以支持自适应时间步进策略，提高计算效率。
AI.method: 采用积分因子中点法，首先定义分段线性近似解的积分因子中点近似，使用能量技术推导次优阶残差型误差估计。关键创新是引入连续分段二次时间重构来建立最优阶误差界。
AI.result: 成功推导了最优阶后验误差估计，基于此开发了自适应时间步进策略。数值实验验证了误差估计器的收敛速率和自适应算法的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 积分因子中点法结合连续分段二次时间重构能够为波动型方程提供可靠的最优阶后验误差估计，支持高效的自适应时间步进策略，在数值计算中表现出良好的收敛性和效率。

title: Wall slip effects on the fiber orientation of a short-fiber suspension in hyperbolic channel flow
summary: We investigate the effect of wall fluid slip on the orientation of non-Brownian, short, rigid, and high aspect ratio cylindrical fibers suspended in a Newtonian fluid in flow through a symmetric hyperbolic planar channel. The fiber orientation is described using a second-order tensor formulation that accounts for fiber-fiber interactions and employs a hybrid closure to approximate the fourth-order orientation tensor, while neglecting the extra-stress contribution of the fibers to the total stress tensor. Building on our previous work on the no-slip case (Housiadas, Beris and Advani, J. Rheol., 2025), the analytical Newtonian velocity field that has been obtained via the extended lubrication theory is utilized (Sialmas and Housiadas, Eur. J. Mech. B Fluids, 2024). Corresponding to this velocity field, the magnitude of the rate-of-deformation decreases as the slip coefficient increases. The resulting equations for the orientation tensor are solved numerically using a fully implicit finite difference method.The results show that the fiber orientation gradually evolves from its initial pure-shear state at the inlet toward a more aligned configuration as the channel exit is approached.The region of higher fiber alignment, that is most pronounced at the midplane where the flow is purely extensional, extends further toward the walls as the slip increases.

AI.tldr: 研究壁面滑移对非布朗、短刚性高长径比圆柱纤维在牛顿流体中通过对称双曲线平面通道时取向的影响，发现滑移增加会扩大纤维取向区域。
AI.motivation: 研究壁面滑移条件如何影响纤维在流动中的取向行为，扩展先前无滑移情况的研究，理解滑移对纤维取向分布的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用二阶张量描述纤维取向，考虑纤维间相互作用，使用混合闭合近似四阶取向张量；利用扩展润滑理论获得的解析牛顿速度场；采用全隐式有限差分法数值求解取向张量方程。
AI.result: 纤维取向从入口处的纯剪切状态逐渐演变为出口处更对齐的构型；滑移增加时，纤维对齐程度更高的区域（在中平面处最明显，流动为纯拉伸）向壁面扩展。
AI.conclusion: 壁面滑移显著影响纤维在流动中的取向分布，滑移增加会扩大纤维对齐区域，这对理解复杂流动中纤维取向控制具有重要意义。

title: Noise reduction in BERT NER models for clinical entity extraction
summary: Precision is of utmost importance in the realm of clinical entity extraction from clinical notes and reports. Encoder Models fine-tuned for Named Entity Recognition (NER) are an efficient choice for this purpose, as they don't hallucinate. We pre-trained an in-house BERT over clinical data and then fine-tuned it for NER. These models performed well on recall but could not close upon the high precision range, needed for clinical models. To address this challenge, we developed a Noise Removal model that refines the output of NER. The NER model assigns token-level entity tags along with probability scores for each token. Our Noise Removal (NR) model then analyzes these probability sequences and classifies predictions as either weak or strong. A naïve approach might involve filtering predictions based on low probability values; however, this method is unreliable. Owing to the characteristics of the SoftMax function, Transformer based architectures often assign disproportionately high confidence scores even to uncertain or weak predictions, making simple thresholding ineffective. To address this issue, we adopted a supervised modeling strategy in which the NR model leverages advanced features such as the Probability Density Map (PDM). The PDM captures the Semantic-Pull effect observed within Transformer embeddings, an effect that manifests in the probability distributions of NER class predictions across token sequences. This approach enables the model to classify predictions as weak or strong with significantly improved accuracy. With these NR models we were able to reduce False Positives across various clinical NER models by 50\% to 90\%.

AI.tldr: 提出一种噪声去除模型，通过分析NER模型的概率序列和概率密度图特征，区分强弱预测，显著降低临床实体提取中的假阳性
AI.motivation: 临床实体提取需要高精度，但现有的BERT微调NER模型虽然召回率高，却难以达到临床所需的高精度范围，主要问题是假阳性较多
AI.method: 1. 在临床数据上预训练内部BERT模型并微调用于NER；2. 开发噪声去除模型，分析NER输出的概率序列，利用概率密度图捕捉Transformer嵌入中的语义牵引效应，监督式区分强弱预测
AI.result: 噪声去除模型能显著降低假阳性，在各种临床NER模型中减少50%到90%的假阳性
AI.conclusion: 通过结合NER模型和噪声去除模型，能够有效提升临床实体提取的精度，满足临床应用对高精度的要求

title: StaTS: Spectral Trajectory Schedule Learning for Adaptive Time Series Forecasting with Frequency Guided Denoiser
summary: Diffusion models have been used for probabilistic time series forecasting and show strong potential. However, fixed noise schedules often produce intermediate states that are hard to invert and a terminal state that deviates from the near noise assumption. Meanwhile, prior methods rely on time domain conditioning and seldom model schedule induced spectral degradation, which limits structure recovery across noise levels. We propose StaTS, a diffusion model for probabilistic time series forecasting that learns the noise schedule and the denoiser through alternating updates. StaTS includes Spectral Trajectory Scheduler (STS) that learns a data adaptive noise schedule with spectral regularization to improve structural preservation and stepwise invertibility, and Frequency Guided Denoiser (FGD) that estimates schedule induced spectral distortion and uses it to modulate denoising strength for heterogeneous restoration across diffusion steps and variables. A two stage training procedure stabilizes the coupling between schedule learning and denoiser optimization. Experiments on multiple real world benchmarks show consistent gains, while maintaining strong performance with fewer sampling steps. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjt-gpu/StaTS/.

AI.tldr: StaTS提出了一种用于概率时间序列预测的扩散模型，通过学习噪声调度和去噪器的交替更新，改善结构保持和逐步可逆性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在时间序列预测中存在两个主要问题：1）固定噪声调度产生难以反转的中间状态和偏离近噪声假设的终端状态；2）现有方法依赖时域条件，很少建模调度引起的频谱退化，限制了跨噪声级别的结构恢复。
AI.method: StaTS包含两个核心组件：1）频谱轨迹调度器（STS），通过频谱正则化学习数据自适应的噪声调度，改善结构保持和逐步可逆性；2）频率引导去噪器（FGD），估计调度引起的频谱失真并用于调制去噪强度，实现跨扩散步骤和变量的异质恢复。采用两阶段训练程序稳定调度学习和去噪器优化之间的耦合。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准测试中，StaTS表现出一致的性能提升，同时能够在更少的采样步骤下保持强大的性能。
AI.conclusion: StaTS通过学习自适应噪声调度和频率引导去噪，有效解决了扩散模型在时间序列预测中的结构保持和可逆性问题，在保持高效采样的同时提升了预测性能。

title: TraderBench: How Robust Are AI Agents in Adversarial Capital Markets?
comment: Equal Contribution: Xiaochuang Yuan and Hui Xu contributed equally to this work. All correspondence should be directed to yxc20098@gmail.com. Submitted to Agents in the Wild Workshop, ICLR2026
summary: Evaluating AI agents in finance faces two key challenges: static benchmarks require costly expert annotation yet miss the dynamic decision-making central to real-world trading, while LLM-based judges introduce uncontrolled variance on domain-specific tasks. We introduce TraderBench, a benchmark that addresses both issues. It combines expert-verified static tasks (knowledge retrieval, analytical reasoning) with adversarial trading simulations scored purely on realized performance-Sharpe ratio, returns, and drawdown-eliminating judge variance entirely. The framework features two novel tracks: crypto trading with four progressive market-manipulation transforms, and options derivatives scoring across P&L accuracy, Greeks, and risk management. Trading scenarios can be refreshed with new market data to prevent benchmark contamination. Evaluating 13 models (8B open-source to frontier) on ~50 tasks, we find: (1) 8 of 13 models score ~33 on crypto with <1-point variation across adversarial conditions, exposing fixed non-adaptive strategies; (2) extended thinking helps retrieval (+26 points) but has zero impact on trading (+0.3 crypto, -0.1 options). These findings reveal that current agents lack genuine market adaptation, underscoring the need for performance-grounded evaluation in finance.

AI.tldr: TraderBench：一个结合专家验证静态任务和对抗性交易模拟的金融AI评估基准，消除评判方差，揭示当前AI代理缺乏真正的市场适应能力。
AI.motivation: 金融AI评估面临两大挑战：静态基准需要昂贵的专家标注却无法捕捉真实交易中的动态决策过程，而基于LLM的评判器在领域特定任务中引入不可控的方差。
AI.method: 提出TraderBench基准，结合专家验证的静态任务（知识检索、分析推理）和对抗性交易模拟（基于夏普比率、收益、回撤等实际表现评分）。包含两个新颖赛道：具有四种渐进市场操纵变换的加密货币交易，以及评估P&L准确性、希腊值和风险管理的期权衍生品评分。
AI.result: 评估13个模型（8B开源到前沿模型）在约50个任务上发现：1）13个模型中有8个在加密货币交易中得分约33分，在对抗条件下变化小于1分，暴露了固定非适应性策略；2）扩展思维有助于检索（+26分），但对交易影响为零（加密货币+0.3分，期权-0.1分）。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI代理缺乏真正的市场适应能力，强调金融领域需要基于实际表现的评估，TraderBench通过消除评判方差和提供动态测试环境，为金融AI评估提供了更可靠的框架。

title: Automated Quality Check of Sensor Data Annotations
summary: The monitoring of the route and track environment plays an important role in automated driving. For example, it can be used as an assistance system for route monitoring in automation level Grade of Automation (GoA) 2, where the train driver is still on board. In fully automated, driverless driving at automation level GoA4, these systems finally take over environment monitoring completely independently. With the help of artificial intelligence (AI), they react automatically to risks and dangerous events on the route. To train such AI algorithms, large amounts of training data are required, which must meet high-quality standards due to their safety relevance. In this publication we present an automatic method for assuring the quality of training data, significantly reducing the manual workload and accelerating the development of these systems. We propose an open-source tool designed to detect nine common errors found in multi-sensor datasets for railway vehicles. To evaluate the performance of the framework, all detected errors were manually validated. Six issue detection methods achieved 100% precision, while three additional methods reached precision rates 96% and 97%.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于铁路车辆多传感器数据集质量保证的开源工具，自动检测九种常见错误，显著减少人工工作量并加速自动驾驶系统开发。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统中，路线和环境监控至关重要，特别是在GoA2和GoA4自动化级别。训练这些AI算法需要大量高质量的训练数据，但数据质量保证需要大量人工工作，阻碍了系统开发速度。
AI.method: 开发了一个开源工具，专门用于检测铁路车辆多传感器数据集中的九种常见错误。该方法自动执行质量检查，减少人工干预。
AI.result: 通过手动验证评估工具性能：六种错误检测方法达到100%精确率，另外三种方法分别达到96%和97%的精确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动质量保证方法能显著减少人工工作量，加速铁路自动驾驶系统的开发，同时确保训练数据的高质量标准。

title: A short tour of operator learning theory: Convergence rates, statistical limits, and open questions
summary: This paper surveys recent developments at the intersection of operator learning, statistical learning theory, and approximation theory. First, it reviews error bounds for empirical risk minimization with a focus on holomorphic operators and neural network approximations. Next, it illustrates fundamental performance limits in terms of sample size by adopting a minimax perspective and considering various notions of regularity beyond holomorphy. The paper ends with a discussion on the interplay between these two perspectives and related open questions.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了算子学习、统计学习理论和逼近理论交叉领域的最新进展，重点回顾了全纯算子的经验风险最小化误差界限和神经网络逼近，从极小极大角度探讨样本量的基本性能极限，并讨论不同视角间的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在整合算子学习、统计学习理论和逼近理论这三个领域的最新发展，为研究者提供一个综合性的视角来理解算子学习的理论基础和性能界限。
AI.method: 采用综述研究方法，首先回顾全纯算子经验风险最小化的误差界限和神经网络逼近理论，然后从极小极大角度分析不同正则性概念下的样本量性能极限，最后讨论不同视角间的相互作用。
AI.result: 论文系统梳理了算子学习领域的理论框架，建立了经验风险最小化与极小极大分析之间的联系，揭示了不同正则性假设下的性能界限，并指出了当前研究中的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 算子学习领域在理论基础上取得了重要进展，但经验风险最小化与极小极大分析之间的相互作用仍需进一步探索，论文为未来研究提供了理论框架和开放性问题方向。

title: Using surface acoustic waves to drive thin film flow over an obstacle
summary: We study a new paradigm for ultrasonic driven object coating by using a model system where MHz-level surface acoustic waves (SAWs) drive the spreading of a silicone oil film atop topographical obstacles. We use experiments to show that nanometer-amplitude SAWs, propagating in the substrate of a piezoelectric actuator, propel macroscopic oil films to climb and traverse solid obstacles placed on the actuator. The oil dynamics reveal rich coupling between ultrasonic forcing, capillarity, and gravity; the balance of which determines coating success. We formulate a simplified two-dimensional theoretical model that incorporates obstacle geometry directly in the oil thin-film evolution equation, introducing a new representation of acoustic streaming in the presence of substrate height variations. Despite the simplifications inherent in the modeling, simulations show qualitative agreement with the experiments, providing evidence that the model captures the key physics.

AI.tldr: 研究利用MHz级表面声波驱动硅油薄膜在障碍物上铺展的新涂层方法，实验显示纳米级振幅的SAWs能推动宏观油膜攀爬和穿越固体障碍，理论模型与实验定性一致。
AI.motivation: 探索超声波驱动物体涂层的新范式，研究表面声波如何驱动液体薄膜在复杂地形上铺展，解决传统涂层方法在障碍物表面覆盖的挑战。
AI.method: 使用压电致动器产生MHz级表面声波，实验研究硅油薄膜在障碍物上的动力学行为；建立简化的二维理论模型，将障碍物几何直接纳入油膜演化方程，引入基底高度变化下的声流新表示。
AI.result: 实验显示纳米级振幅的SAWs能推动宏观油膜攀爬和穿越固体障碍，油膜动力学揭示了超声波驱动力、毛细作用和重力之间的丰富耦合；理论模型与实验定性一致，证明模型捕捉了关键物理机制。
AI.conclusion: 成功展示了表面声波驱动涂层的新方法，理论模型能够有效描述复杂地形下的液体薄膜动力学，为超声波驱动涂层技术提供了理论基础。

title: Personalization Increases Affective Alignment but Has Role-Dependent Effects on Epistemic Independence in LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to sycophantic behavior, uncritically conforming to user beliefs. As models increasingly condition responses on user-specific context (personality traits, preferences, conversation history), they gain information to tailor agreement more effectively. Understanding how personalization modulates sycophancy is critical, yet systematic evaluation across models and contexts remains limited. We present a rigorous evaluation of personalization's impact on LLM sycophancy across nine frontier models and five benchmark datasets spanning advice, moral judgment, and debate contexts. We find that personalization generally increases affective alignment (emotional validation, hedging/deference), but affects epistemic alignment (belief adoption, position stability, resistance to influence) with context-dependent role modulation. When the LLM's role is to give advice, personalization strengthens epistemic independence (models challenge user presuppositions). When its role is that of a social peer, personalization decreases epistemic independence. In this role, extensively personalized user challenges causing LLMs to abandon their position at significantly higher rates. Robustness tests confirm that the effects are driven by personalized conditioning, not by additional input tokens per se or demographic information alone. Our work provides measurement frameworks for evaluating personalized AI systems, demonstrates the necessity of role-sensitive evaluation, and establishes a novel benchmark to assess goal alignment.

AI.tldr: 个性化增强LLMs的情感一致性（情感验证、谦逊/顺从），但对认知一致性（信念采纳、立场稳定性、抗影响力）的影响取决于上下文角色调节。当LLM扮演建议者角色时，个性化增强认知独立性；当扮演社交同伴角色时，个性化降低认知独立性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs越来越多地基于用户特定上下文（个性特征、偏好、对话历史）调整响应，它们获得了更有效定制同意度的信息。理解个性化如何调节谄媚行为至关重要，但跨模型和上下文的系统评估仍然有限。
AI.method: 对个性化对LLM谄媚行为的影响进行严格评估，涵盖9个前沿模型和5个基准数据集，涉及建议、道德判断和辩论上下文。通过角色调节分析个性化对情感一致性和认知一致性的影响。
AI.result: 个性化通常增加情感一致性（情感验证、谦逊/顺从），但对认知一致性的影响具有上下文角色依赖性：当LLM扮演建议者角色时，个性化增强认知独立性（模型挑战用户预设）；当扮演社交同伴角色时，个性化降低认知独立性，导致LLMs在用户挑战下放弃立场的比率显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了评估个性化AI系统的测量框架，证明了角色敏感评估的必要性，并建立了评估目标对齐的新基准。个性化对LLM谄媚行为的影响取决于上下文角色，需要针对不同应用场景进行差异化评估。

title: CARE: Confounder-Aware Aggregation for Reliable LLM Evaluation
summary: LLM-as-a-judge ensembles are the standard paradigm for scalable evaluation, but their aggregation mechanisms suffer from a fundamental flaw: they implicitly assume that judges provide independent estimates of true quality. However, in practice, LLM judges exhibit correlated errors caused by shared latent confounders -- such as verbosity, stylistic preferences, or training artifacts -- causing standard aggregation rules like majority vote or averaging to provide little gain or even amplify systematic mistakes. To address this, we introduce CARE, a confounder-aware aggregation framework that explicitly models LLM judge scores as arising from both a latent true-quality signal and shared confounding factors. Rather than heuristically re-weighting judges, CARE separates quality from confounders without access to ground-truth labels. We provide theoretical guarantees for identifiability and finite-sample recovery under shared confounders, and we quantify the systematic bias incurred when aggregation models omit confounding latent factors. Across 12 public benchmarks spanning continuous scoring, binary classification, and pairwise preference settings, CARE improves aggregation accuracy, reducing error by up to 26.8\%. Code is released in \href{https://github.com/SprocketLab/CARE}{https://github.com/SprocketLab/CARE}.

AI.tldr: CARE是一个考虑混淆因素的LLM评委聚合框架，通过建模真实质量信号和共享混淆因子来提升评估准确性，相比传统聚合方法减少误差达26.8%。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM-as-a-judge评估范式的聚合机制存在根本缺陷：它们隐含假设评委提供独立的质量估计，但实际上LLM评委存在由共享潜在混淆因素（如冗长性、风格偏好或训练伪影）引起的相关误差，导致多数投票或平均等标准聚合规则效果有限甚至放大系统性错误。
AI.method: CARE是一个混淆感知的聚合框架，明确将LLM评委评分建模为来自潜在真实质量信号和共享混淆因素。该方法无需真实标签即可分离质量和混淆因素，而非启发式地重新加权评委。提供了在共享混淆因素下的可识别性和有限样本恢复的理论保证。
AI.result: 在涵盖连续评分、二元分类和成对偏好设置的12个公共基准测试中，CARE提高了聚合准确性，误差减少高达26.8%。量化了当聚合模型忽略混淆潜在因素时产生的系统性偏差。
AI.conclusion: CARE通过显式建模共享混淆因素解决了LLM评委聚合中的相关误差问题，提供了理论保证并在多个基准测试中显著提升了评估准确性，为LLM-as-a-judge评估提供了更可靠的聚合框架。

title: DIG to Heal: Scaling General-purpose Agent Collaboration via Explainable Dynamic Decision Paths
summary: The increasingly popular agentic AI paradigm promises to harness the power of multiple, general-purpose large language model (LLM) agents to collaboratively complete complex tasks. While many agentic AI systems utilize predefined workflows or agent roles in order to reduce complexity, ideally these agents would be truly autonomous, able to achieve emergent collaboration even as the number of collaborating agents increases. Yet in practice, such unstructured interactions can lead to redundant work and cascading failures that are difficult to interpret or correct. In this work, we study multi-agent systems composed of general-purpose LLM agents that operate without predefined roles, control flow, or communication constraints, relying instead on emergent collaboration to solve problems. We introduce the Dynamic Interaction Graph (DIG), which captures emergent collaboration as a time-evolving causal network of agent activations and interactions. DIG makes emergent collaboration observable and explainable for the first time, enabling real-time identification, explanation, and correction of collaboration-induced error patterns directly from agents' collaboration paths. Thus, DIG fills a critical gap in understanding how general LLM agents solve problems together in truly agentic multi-agent systems. The project webpage can be found at: https://happyeureka.github.io/dig.

AI.tldr: DIG（动态交互图）是一种可视化工具，首次使通用LLM智能体在无预定义角色或控制流下的涌现协作变得可观察和可解释，能够实时识别、解释和纠正协作引发的错误模式。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体AI系统通常使用预定义的工作流程或角色来降低复杂性，但理想的自主智能体应该能够在智能体数量增加时实现涌现协作。然而，这种非结构化交互在实践中会导致冗余工作和级联故障，难以解释或纠正。
AI.method: 提出动态交互图（DIG），将涌现协作捕捉为随时间演化的智能体激活和交互的因果网络。DIG使涌现协作首次变得可观察和可解释，能够直接从智能体的协作路径中实时识别、解释和纠正协作引发的错误模式。
AI.result: DIG填补了理解通用LLM智能体在真正自主的多智能体系统中如何共同解决问题的关键空白，为分析无预定义角色、控制流或通信约束的LLM智能体系统提供了可视化工具。
AI.conclusion: DIG首次实现了对通用LLM智能体涌现协作的可观察性和可解释性，为解决多智能体系统中协作引发的错误模式提供了新的分析框架，推动了真正自主的多智能体系统的发展。

title: VoxelDiffusionCut: Non-destructive Internal-part Extraction via Iterative Cutting and Structure Estimation
summary: Non-destructive extraction of the target internal part, such as batteries and motors, by cutting surrounding structures is crucial at recycling and disposal sites. However, the diversity of products and the lack of information on disassembly procedures make it challenging to decide where to cut. This study explores a method for non-destructive extraction of a target internal part that iteratively estimates the internal structure from observed cutting surfaces and formulates cutting plans based on the estimation results. A key requirement is to estimate the probability of the target part's presence from partial observations. However, learning conditional generative models for this task is challenging: The high dimensionality of 3D shape representations makes learning difficult, and conventional models (e.g., conditional variational autoencoders) often fail to capture multi-modal predictive uncertainty due to mode collapse, resulting in overconfident predictions. To address these issues, we propose VoxelDiffusionCut, which iteratively estimates the internal structure represented as voxels using a diffusion model and plans cuts for non-destructive extraction of the target internal part based on the estimation results. Voxel representation allows the model to predict only attributes at fixed grid positions, i.e., types of constituent parts, making learning more tractable. The diffusion model completes the voxel representation conditioned on observed cutting surfaces, capturing uncertainty in unobserved regions to avoid erroneous cuts. Experimental results in simulation suggest that the proposed method can estimate internal structures from observed cutting surfaces and enable non-destructive extraction of the target internal part by leveraging the estimated uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出VoxelDiffusionCut方法，通过扩散模型迭代估计体素表示的内部结构，基于估计结果规划切割路径，实现目标内部部件的无损提取。
AI.motivation: 在回收和处置现场，通过切割周围结构无损提取电池、电机等目标内部部件至关重要。但由于产品多样性和缺乏拆卸程序信息，难以确定切割位置。需要一种能够从部分观察中估计内部结构并规划切割的方法。
AI.method: 提出VoxelDiffusionCut方法：1) 使用体素表示内部结构，降低学习难度；2) 采用扩散模型在观察到切割表面的条件下完成体素表示，捕捉未观察区域的不确定性；3) 迭代估计内部结构并基于估计结果制定切割计划。
AI.result: 仿真实验结果表明，该方法能够从观察到的切割表面估计内部结构，并利用估计的不确定性实现目标内部部件的无损提取。
AI.conclusion: VoxelDiffusionCut通过体素表示和扩散模型有效解决了内部结构估计中的高维度和多模态不确定性问题，为回收场景中的无损部件提取提供了可行方案。

title: Randomized Tensor Krylov Subspace Methods via Sketched Einstein Product with Applications to Image and Video Restoration
summary: We develop a randomized extension of tensor Krylov subspace methods based on the Einstein product for solving large-scale multilinear systems arising in image and video restoration. The classical tensor global GMRES method relies on Frobenius inner products and full tensor orthogonalization, which become computationally expensive for high-dimensional problems. We introduce a sketched Einstein inner product constructed via mode-wise random projections and develop a randomized tensor global Arnoldi process. The resulting Randomized Tensor Global GMRES (RTG-GMRES) method significantly reduces orthogonalization cost while preserving convergence properties under tensor subspace embedding assumptions. Residual bounds, perturbation analysis and projected Tikhonov regularization are derived. The proposed method provides an efficient framework for solving ill-posed multidimensional problems arising in color image and video restoration.

AI.tldr: 提出基于爱因斯坦积的随机化张量Krylov子空间方法RTG-GMRES，用于大规模多线性系统的图像和视频恢复，通过模式随机投影降低正交化计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统张量全局GMRES方法基于Frobenius内积和全张量正交化，在高维问题中计算成本过高，需要更高效的算法来处理图像和视频恢复中的大规模多线性系统。
AI.method: 通过模式随机投影构造草图爱因斯坦内积，开发随机化张量全局Arnoldi过程，提出随机化张量全局GMRES(RTG-GMRES)方法，并推导残差界、扰动分析和投影Tikhonov正则化。
AI.result: RTG-GMRES方法在保持收敛性的前提下显著降低正交化计算成本，为彩色图像和视频恢复中的不适定多维问题提供高效求解框架。
AI.conclusion: 基于爱因斯坦积的随机化张量Krylov子空间方法为大规模多线性系统提供计算高效的解决方案，特别适用于图像和视频恢复应用。

title: Flame dynamics and Markstein numbers in Hele-Shaw cells and porous media under Darcy's law
summary: The propagation of premixed flames in narrow Hele-Shaw cells and permeable porous media is governed by Darcy's law, leading to hydrodynamic behaviour distinct from conventional flames. This study investigates the role of confinement on flame dynamics, focusing on the associated Markstein numbers. A hydrodynamic model treating the flame as a discontinuity surface is presented, in which the burning rate depends on curvature and tangential flow strain, characterised by two Markstein numbers $\mathcal{M}_c$ and $\mathcal{M}_t$. A major finding is that $\mathcal{M}_c \neq \mathcal{M}_t$ under Darcy's law, as the law permits tangential velocity discontinuities at the flame front due to viscosity variations. Additionally, a third Markstein number $\mathcal{M}_g$ associated with gravity also emerges uniquely under Darcy's law. The Darcy-specific effects vanish in purely radial flows but are important for strained flames. In planar counterflows, for instance, the strain rate jump across the flame is dictated by the unburnt-to-burnt viscosity ratio $\mathfrak{m}$ rather than the density ratio $\mathfrak{r}$, a dramatic departure from conventional behaviour. The influence of confinement on the combined hydrodynamic instabilities of planar flames, namely Darrieus--Landau, Saffman--Taylor, and Rayleigh--Taylor instabilities, is discussed. Weakly nonlinear dynamics under strong confinement is found to follow a Michelson--Sivashinsky equation with modified coefficients (long-wave instability), while under moderate confinement, Ginzburg--Landau dynamics (finite-wavenumber instability) is found to apply. Strong confinement amplifies the Darrieus--Landau instability, enhancing hydrodynamic coupling in conjunction with augmented streamline refraction caused by tangential velocity discontinuities.

AI.tldr: 研究Darcy定律下受限空间中预混火焰的传播，发现三个不同的Markstein数（曲率、切向应变和重力相关），揭示了Darcy定律导致的切向速度不连续性和与传统火焰不同的应变率跳跃行为。
AI.motivation: 研究在狭窄Hele-Shaw槽和可渗透多孔介质中预混火焰传播的特殊流体动力学行为，这些环境受Darcy定律支配，与传统火焰行为有本质区别，需要理解受限条件对火焰动力学的影响。
AI.method: 建立将火焰视为不连续面的流体动力学模型，燃烧速率取决于曲率和切向流应变，用两个Markstein数（$\mathcal{M}_c$和$\mathcal{M}_t$）表征。分析Darcy定律下的特殊效应，包括切向速度不连续性和重力相关的第三个Markstein数$\mathcal{M}_g$。
AI.result: 发现Darcy定律下$\mathcal{M}_c \neq \mathcal{M}_t$，这是由粘度变化引起的切向速度不连续性导致的。在平面逆流中，应变率跳跃由未燃/已燃粘度比$\mathfrak{m}$而非密度比$\mathfrak{r}$决定。强受限条件下Darrieus-Landau不稳定性增强，弱非线性动力学遵循修正系数的Michelson-Sivashinsky方程。
AI.conclusion: Darcy定律支配的受限火焰表现出独特的流体动力学行为，包括三个不同的Markstein数和切向速度不连续性。这些效应在应变火焰中尤为重要，显著改变了火焰不稳定性行为，对理解多孔介质和狭窄通道中的火焰传播有重要意义。

title: TAB-PO: Preference Optimization with a Token-Level Adaptive Barrier for Token-Critical Structured Generation
summary: Direct Preference Optimization is an offline post-SFT method for aligning language models from preference pairs, with strong results in instruction following and summarization. However, DPO's sequence-level implicit reward can be brittle for token-critical structured prediction settings such as medical annotation, which often exhibit (i) low-separation preference pairs, where chosen and rejected completions differ by minimal edit distance (often 1-3 tokens), and (ii) token-importance skew, where sparse semantic tokens (hierarchical labels and evidence Spans) carry disproportionate task importance relative to high-frequency structural tokens (JSON scaffolding). In this regime, standard DPO suffers from margin collapse (insufficient log-probability separation between near-identical preferences), likelihood squeezing (the margin objective shifts the absolute likelihoods of both completions together), and gradient dilution, where uniform sequence-level weighting diffuses learning signal across shared scaffolding while rare, confusable label tokens receive weak, noisy updates. We introduce Token-Adaptive Barrier Preference Optimization (TAB-PO), which augments DPO with token-weighted, reference-adjusted advantages that prioritize high-value semantic tokens, and a conditional token-level barrier that regularizes under-confident tokens balancing SFT-anchored likelihood and preference-driven separation in low-separation, importance-skewed regimes. We evaluate TAB-PO on medical communication annotation, a task requiring joint prediction of hierarchical labels and evidence Spans from patient-provider messages. TAB-PO achieves a ~ 4% relative improvement in micro-F1 over SFT and consistently outperforms recent preference-optimization baselines.

AI.tldr: TAB-PO针对DPO在医疗标注等结构化预测任务中的不足进行改进，通过token加权和条件屏障机制，在低分离度、重要性偏斜的偏好对中实现更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准DPO在医疗标注等结构化预测任务中存在三个主要问题：1) 边缘塌陷（偏好对差异极小，仅1-3个token）；2) 似然挤压（目标函数同时改变两个完成序列的绝对似然）；3) 梯度稀释（均匀序列级权重稀释了关键语义token的学习信号）。
AI.method: TAB-PO引入token加权、参考调整的优势函数来优先处理高价值语义token，以及条件token级屏障来正则化低置信度token，平衡SFT锚定似然和偏好驱动的分离。
AI.result: 在医疗沟通标注任务中，TAB-PO相比SFT实现了约4%的相对micro-F1提升，并持续优于最近的偏好优化基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TAB-PO通过token自适应机制有效解决了DPO在低分离度、重要性偏斜偏好对中的局限性，在医疗标注等结构化预测任务中表现出色。

title: Attn-QAT: 4-Bit Attention With Quantization-Aware Training
summary: Achieving reliable 4-bit attention is a prerequisite for end-to-end FP4 computation on emerging FP4-capable GPUs, yet attention remains the main obstacle due to FP4's tiny dynamic range and attention's heavy-tailed activations. This paper presents the first systematic study of 4-bit quantization-aware training (QAT) for attention. We find that "drop-in" QAT, which naively combines an FP4 forward pass with a high-precision Flash Attention (FA)-style backward pass, leads to training instability. We identify two key principles for stable FP4 attention: (1) matching low-precision recomputation of attention scores in the backward pass, and (2) resolving implicit precision assumptions in FA's gradient calculation. Based on these insights, we propose Attn-QAT and implement fused Triton kernels for training as well as FP4 inference kernels. Across diffusion and language models, Attn-QAT recovers the quality drop from FP4 attention without explicit outlier-mitigation heuristics used in prior FP4 attention, and delivers up to a 1.5x speedup on an RTX 5090. Video demos can be found at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/190F6xbBDUF2kGQYIcXBt3ehSYij5jlim?usp=sharing.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了注意力机制的4位量化感知训练，提出了Attn-QAT方法，通过匹配低精度重计算和解决Flash Attention梯度计算中的隐式精度假设，实现了稳定的FP4注意力训练，在扩散模型和语言模型中恢复了FP4注意力带来的质量下降，并在RTX 5090上实现了1.5倍加速。
AI.motivation: 实现可靠的4位注意力是新兴FP4 GPU上进行端到端FP4计算的前提，但由于FP4的动态范围极小且注意力激活具有重尾分布，注意力成为主要障碍。现有方法中，简单地将FP4前向传递与高精度Flash Attention风格后向传递结合的"即插即用"QAT会导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出了Attn-QAT方法，基于两个关键原则：1) 在后向传递中匹配注意力分数的低精度重计算；2) 解决Flash Attention梯度计算中的隐式精度假设。实现了融合的Triton内核用于训练和FP4推理内核。
AI.result: 在扩散模型和语言模型中，Attn-QAT恢复了FP4注意力带来的质量下降，无需使用先前FP4注意力中使用的显式离群值缓解启发式方法，并在RTX 5090上实现了高达1.5倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了注意力机制的4位量化感知训练，提出了稳定FP4注意力训练的关键原则和Attn-QAT方法，为在FP4 GPU上实现端到端4位计算提供了有效解决方案。

title: How Well Do Multimodal Models Reason on ECG Signals?
summary: While multimodal large language models offer a promising solution to the "black box" nature of health AI by generating interpretable reasoning traces, verifying the validity of these traces remains a critical challenge. Existing evaluation methods are either unscalable, relying on manual clinician review, or superficial, utilizing proxy metrics (e.g. QA) that fail to capture the semantic correctness of clinical logic. In this work, we introduce a reproducible framework for evaluating reasoning in ECG signals. We propose decomposing reasoning into two distinct, components: (i) Perception, the accurate identification of patterns within the raw signal, and (ii) Deduction, the logical application of domain knowledge to those patterns. To evaluate Perception, we employ an agentic framework that generates code to empirically verify the temporal structures described in the reasoning trace. To evaluate Deduction, we measure the alignment of the model's logic against a structured database of established clinical criteria in a retrieval-based approach. This dual-verification method enables the scalable assessment of "true" reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可重复的框架来评估心电图信号中的推理能力，将推理分解为感知和演绎两个组件，分别通过代码验证和临床标准对齐进行评估。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽然能生成可解释的推理轨迹，但验证这些轨迹的有效性仍然是一个关键挑战。现有评估方法要么不可扩展（依赖临床医生手动审查），要么过于表面化（使用QA等代理指标），无法捕捉临床逻辑的语义正确性。
AI.method: 将推理分解为两个组件：1) 感知：准确识别原始信号中的模式；2) 演绎：将领域知识逻辑应用于这些模式。评估感知采用代理框架生成代码来经验验证推理轨迹中描述的时间结构；评估演绎采用检索方法，将模型逻辑与结构化临床标准数据库对齐。
AI.result: 该双验证方法能够实现对"真正"推理能力的可扩展评估，解决了现有评估方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为评估心电图信号中的推理能力提供了一个可重复、可扩展的方法，通过分解推理为感知和演绎两个组件，分别进行经验验证和临床标准对齐，从而更准确地评估模型的推理能力。

title: Efficient Image Super-Resolution with Multi-Scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Networks
summary: This paper introduces a lightweight image super-resolution (SR) network, termed the Multi-scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Network (MSAAN), to address the common dilemma between high reconstruction fidelity and low model complexity in existing SR methods. The core of our approach is a novel Multi-scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Module (MSAA), designed to jointly model fine-grained local details and long-range contextual dependencies. The MSAA comprises two synergistic components: a Global Feature Modulation Module (GFM) that learns coherent texture structures through differential feature extraction, and a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Module (MFA) that adaptively fuses features from local to global scales using pyramidal processing. To further enhance the network's capability, we propose a Local Enhancement Block (LEB) to strengthen local geometric perception and a Feature Interactive Gated Feed-Forward Module (FIGFF) to improve nonlinear representation while reducing channel redundancy. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks (Set5, Set14, B100, Urban100, Manga109) across $\times2$, $\times3$, and $\times4$ scaling factors demonstrate that both our lightweight (MSAAN-light) and standard (MSAAN) versions achieve superior or competitive performance in terms of PSNR and SSIM, while maintaining significantly lower parameters and computational costs than state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies validate the contribution of each component, and visual results show that MSAAN reconstructs sharper edges and more realistic textures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级图像超分辨率网络MSAAN，通过多尺度空间自适应注意力模块平衡重建质量与模型复杂度，在多个基准测试中取得了优越的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法通常面临高重建保真度与低模型复杂度之间的矛盾。为了在保持轻量级模型的同时获得高质量重建效果，需要设计更高效的网络架构。
AI.method: 提出多尺度空间自适应注意力网络(MSAAN)，核心是多尺度空间自适应注意力模块(MSAA)。MSAA包含全局特征调制模块(GFM)和多尺度特征聚合模块(MFA)。还设计了局部增强块(LEB)增强局部几何感知，以及特征交互门控前馈模块(FIGFF)改善非线性表示并减少通道冗余。
AI.result: 在Set5、Set14、B100、Urban100、Manga109等标准基准测试上，对×2、×3、×4缩放因子进行了广泛实验。轻量版(MSAAN-light)和标准版(MSAAN)在PSNR和SSIM指标上都取得了优越或竞争性的性能，同时参数和计算成本显著低于最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MSAAN网络有效解决了超分辨率中重建质量与模型复杂度的权衡问题，通过创新的多尺度注意力机制实现了高质量重建，同时保持轻量级设计。消融研究验证了各组件贡献，视觉结果显示MSAAN能重建更锐利的边缘和更真实的纹理。

title: Uncertainty quantification using importance-sampled quasi-Monte Carlo with dimension-independent convergence rates
summary: Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) integration over unbounded domains $\mathbb{R}^s$ remains challenging due to the high dimensionality of sampling space and the boundary growth of the integrand. In applications such as uncertainty quantification (UQ), the dimension $s$ can reach hundreds or even thousands. To restore the efficiency of quadrature rules in high dimensions, constructive QMC methods like lattice rules have been successfully developed within the framework of weighted function spaces. In contrast to designing problem-specific quadrature points, this paper proposes transforming the underlying integrand to accommodate the off-the-shelf scrambled nets (a construction-free randomized QMC method) via the boundary-damping importance sampling (BDIS) proposed by Pan et al. (2025). We provide a rigorous analysis of the dimension-independent convergence rate of BDIS-based scrambled nets while covering a broader class of unbounded functions than that in Pan et al. (2025). By exploiting the dimension structure of the parametric input random field, the proposed $n$-point quadrature rule achieves a dimension-independent mean squared error rate of $O(n^{-1-α^*+\varepsilon})$ on standard UQ problems in elliptic partial differential equations (PDEs), where $\varepsilon>0$ is arbitrarily small and $α^*\in (0,1)$ reflects the regularity with respect to the parametric variables. Numerical experiments on elliptic PDEs with high-dimensional parameters further demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合边界阻尼重要性采样(BDIS)和随机化QMC(加扰网)的方法，用于高维无界域积分，在椭圆PDE不确定性量化中实现维度无关的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 高维无界域积分在不确定性量化中面临挑战：维度可达数百甚至数千，积分函数在边界处增长。传统QMC方法需要设计特定问题的积分点，而本文旨在利用现成的随机化QMC方法。
AI.method: 通过边界阻尼重要性采样(BDIS)变换被积函数，使其适应现成的加扰网（一种构造无关的随机化QMC方法）。利用参数输入随机场的维度结构，分析基于BDIS的加扰网的维度无关收敛速率。
AI.result: 在椭圆PDE的标准UQ问题中，提出的n点积分规则实现了维度无关的均方误差速率O(n^{-1-α*+ε})，其中ε>0任意小，α*∈(0,1)反映参数变量的正则性。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过BDIS变换结合现成的加扰网，为高维无界域积分提供了一种有效方法，在椭圆PDE不确定性量化中实现了维度无关的收敛速率，比Pan等人(2025)的工作覆盖了更广泛的函数类。

title: Spatial instability analysis and mode transition of a viscoelastic jet in a co-flowing gas stream
comment: It has been accepted for publication in Journal of Fluid Mechanics
summary: Spatial linear instability analysis is employed to investigate the instability of a viscoelastic liquid jet in a co-flowing gas stream. The theoretical model incorporates a non-uniform axial base profile represented by a hyperbolic tangent, capturing the shear layer. The Oldroyd-B model discretized with Chebyshev polynomials is employed, and energy budget analysis is used to interpret underlying mechanisms.At low Weber numbers, the jet evolves axisymmetrically and the instability is governed by interfacial gas-pressure fluctuations; as the Weber number increases, the growing inertia drives a transition of the predominant mode from axisymmetric to helical. At weak elasticity, the instability is also primarily governed by gas-pressure fluctuations. As elasticity increases, the predominant mode transitions from axisymmetric to helical. This transition is accompanied by a migration of disturbance structures from the interface toward the jet interior and an enhanced coupling between velocity perturbation and the basic flow. These trends reveal a new predominant instability mechanism -- the elasticity-enhanced shear-driven instability -- which is distinct from capillary or Kelvin-Helmholtz instabilities in Newtonian jets. A We-El phase diagram delineates the boundary between predominant modes, and experimental results obtained in a flow-focusing configuration validate the theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 研究粘弹性液体射流在共流气体中的空间线性不稳定性，发现弹性增强的剪切驱动不稳定性机制，区别于牛顿射流的毛细管或Kelvin-Helmholtz不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究粘弹性液体射流在气体共流中的不稳定性机制，特别是弹性效应如何影响射流不稳定性的主导模式和物理机制。
AI.method: 采用空间线性不稳定性分析，使用Oldroyd-B模型和双曲正切基流剖面，通过Chebyshev多项式离散化，结合能量预算分析解释机制。
AI.result: 低Weber数时射流轴对称演化，不稳定性由界面气体压力波动主导；Weber数增加时主导模式从轴对称转变为螺旋状。弱弹性时仍由气体压力波动主导，弹性增强时主导模式也转变为螺旋状，扰动结构从界面迁移到射流内部，出现弹性增强的剪切驱动不稳定性机制。
AI.conclusion: 发现了粘弹性射流中新的主导不稳定性机制——弹性增强的剪切驱动不稳定性，区别于传统牛顿射流的不稳定性，建立了We-El相图描述主导模式边界，实验验证了理论预测。

title: ActMem: Bridging the Gap Between Memory Retrieval and Reasoning in LLM Agents
summary: Effective memory management is essential for large language model (LLM) agents handling long-term interactions. Current memory frameworks typically treat agents as passive "recorders" and retrieve information without understanding its deeper implications. They may fail in scenarios requiring conflict detection and complex decision-making. To bridge this critical gap, we propose a novel actionable memory framework called ActMem that integrates memory retrieval with active causal reasoning. ActMem transforms unstructured dialogue history into a structured causal and semantic graph. By leveraging counterfactual reasoning and commonsense completion, it enables agents to deduce implicit constraints and resolve potential conflicts between past states and current intentions. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive dataset ActMemEval to evaluate agent reasoning capabilities in logic-driven scenarios, moving beyond the fact-retrieval focus of existing memory benchmarks. Experiments demonstrate that ActMem significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in handling complex, memory-dependent tasks, paving the way for more consistent and reliable intelligent assistants.

AI.tldr: ActMem是一个可行动的记忆框架，通过因果推理将对话历史转化为结构化图，使LLM代理能够检测冲突和进行复杂决策。
AI.motivation: 当前记忆框架将代理视为被动"记录器"，仅检索信息而不理解深层含义，在需要冲突检测和复杂决策的场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出ActMem框架，将非结构化对话历史转化为结构化因果语义图，利用反事实推理和常识补全来推断隐含约束并解决过去状态与当前意图之间的潜在冲突。
AI.result: 实验表明ActMem在处理复杂、依赖记忆的任务中显著优于现有最先进基线方法，并引入了ActMemEval数据集来评估逻辑驱动场景中的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ActMem为更一致和可靠的智能助手铺平了道路，通过将记忆检索与主动因果推理相结合，提升了LLM代理在长期交互中的记忆管理能力。

title: Econometric vs. Causal Structure-Learning for Time-Series Policy Decisions: Evidence from the UK COVID-19 Policies
summary: Causal machine learning (ML) recovers graphical structures that inform us about potential cause-and-effect relationships. Most progress has focused on cross-sectional data with no explicit time order, whereas recovering causal structures from time series data remains the subject of ongoing research in causal ML. In addition to traditional causal ML, this study assesses econometric methods that some argue can recover causal structures from time series data. The use of these methods can be explained by the significant attention the field of econometrics has given to causality, and specifically to time series, over the years. This presents the possibility of comparing the causal discovery performance between econometric and traditional causal ML algorithms. We seek to understand if there are lessons to be incorporated into causal ML from econometrics, and provide code to translate the results of these econometric methods to the most widely used Bayesian Network R library, bnlearn. We investigate the benefits and challenges that these algorithms present in supporting policy decision-making, using the real-world case of COVID-19 in the UK as an example. Four econometric methods are evaluated in terms of graphical structure, model dimensionality, and their ability to recover causal effects, and these results are compared with those of eleven causal ML algorithms. Amongst our main results, we see that econometric methods provide clear rules for temporal structures, whereas causal-ML algorithms offer broader discovery by exploring a larger space of graph structures that tends to lead to denser graphs that capture more identifiable causal relationships.

AI.tldr: 比较计量经济学方法与因果机器学习算法在时间序列因果发现中的表现，评估它们在COVID-19政策决策中的应用价值
AI.motivation: 当前因果机器学习主要关注横截面数据，而时间序列因果发现研究相对不足。计量经济学在时间序列因果关系分析方面有长期积累，本研究旨在比较两种方法的性能，探索计量经济学方法对因果机器学习的借鉴价值
AI.method: 评估4种计量经济学方法和11种因果机器学习算法，使用英国COVID-19真实案例，从图结构、模型维度和因果效应恢复能力三个维度进行比较，并将计量经济学结果转换为bnlearn库格式
AI.result: 计量经济学方法提供明确的时间结构规则，而因果机器学习算法通过探索更大的图结构空间获得更密集的图，能识别更多可识别的因果关系
AI.conclusion: 两种方法各有优势：计量经济学方法在时间结构规则性方面更清晰，因果机器学习在发现更广泛的因果关系方面表现更好。研究提供了代码工具促进方法融合，为政策决策提供更全面的因果分析支持

title: EmCoop: A Framework and Benchmark for Embodied Cooperation Among LLM Agents
summary: Real-world scenarios increasingly require multiple embodied agents to collaborate in dynamic environments under embodied constraints, as many tasks exceed the capabilities of any single agent. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) enable high-level cognitive coordination through reasoning, planning, and natural language communication. However, fine-grained analyses of how such collaboration emerges, unfolds, and contributes to task success in embodied multi-agent systems are difficult to conduct with existing benchmarks. In this paper, we introduce EmCoop, a benchmark framework for studying cooperation in LLM-based embodied multi-agent systems. Our framework separates a high-level cognitive layer from a low-level embodied interaction layer, allowing us to characterize agent cooperation through their interleaved dynamics over time. Given a cooperation-constrained embodied task, we propose generalizable, process-level metrics that diagnose collaboration quality and failure modes, beyond final task success. We instantiate our framework in two embodied environments that scale to arbitrary numbers of agents and support diverse communication topologies, and use these instantiations to demonstrate how EmCoop enables systematic analysis of cooperation dynamics across team sizes and task settings. The project web page can be found at: https://happyeureka.github.io/emcoop.

AI.tldr: EmCoop是一个用于研究基于LLM的具身多智能体系统协作的基准框架，通过分离认知层和具身交互层来分析协作动态，并提出过程级指标评估协作质量。
AI.motivation: 现实场景需要多个具身智能体在动态环境中协作完成任务，现有基准难以对LLM驱动的具身多智能体系统的协作过程进行细粒度分析。
AI.method: 提出EmCoop框架，分离高层认知层和低层具身交互层，通过时间上的交错动态来表征智能体协作。提出通用的过程级指标来诊断协作质量和失败模式，并在两个可扩展到任意智能体数量、支持多样化通信拓扑的具身环境中实例化该框架。
AI.result: EmCoop框架能够支持对协作动态进行系统分析，包括团队规模和任务设置的变化，超越了仅关注最终任务成功的评估方式。
AI.conclusion: EmCoop为研究基于LLM的具身多智能体协作提供了一个系统化的基准框架，能够深入分析协作过程动态，有助于理解和改进多智能体协作系统。

title: BiSe-Unet: A Lightweight Dual-path U-Net with Attention-refined Context for Real-time Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Submitted to IEEE EMBC 2026. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: During image-guided procedures, real-time image segmentation is often required. This demands lightweight AI models that can operate on resource-constrained devices. One important use case is endoscopy-guided colonoscopy, where polyps must be detected in real time. The Kvasir-Seg dataset, a publicly available benchmark for this task, contains 1,000 high-resolution endoscopic images of polyps with corresponding pixel-level segmentation masks. Achieving real-time inference speed for clinical deployment in constrained environments requires highly efficient and lightweight network architectures. However, many existing models remain too computationally intensive for embedded deployment. Lightweight architectures, although faster, often suffer from reduced spatial precision and weaker contextual understanding, leading to degraded boundary quality and reduced diagnostic reliability. To address these challenges, we introduce BiSe-UNet, a lightweight dual-path U-Net that integrates an attention-refined context path with a shallow spatial path for detailed feature preservation, followed by a depthwise separable decoder for efficient reconstruction. Evaluated on the Kvasir-Seg dataset, BiSe-UNet achieves competitive Dice and IoU scores while sustaining real-time throughput exceeding 30 FPS on Raspberry Pi 5, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate, lightweight, and deployable medical image segmentation on edge hardware.

AI.tldr: BiSe-UNet：用于内窥镜图像实时分割的轻量级双路径U-Net，在Raspberry Pi 5上达到30+ FPS，保持准确性的同时实现边缘部署
AI.motivation: 图像引导手术需要实时分割，但现有模型要么计算量大不适合嵌入式部署，要么轻量级模型空间精度不足、边界质量差，影响诊断可靠性
AI.method: 提出BiSe-UNet，轻量级双路径U-Net：集成注意力精炼的上下文路径（用于上下文理解）和浅层空间路径（用于细节特征保留），配合深度可分离解码器进行高效重建
AI.result: 在Kvasir-Seg数据集上获得有竞争力的Dice和IoU分数，同时在Raspberry Pi 5上保持超过30 FPS的实时吞吐量
AI.conclusion: BiSe-UNet实现了准确、轻量且可部署的医学图像分割，适合边缘硬件上的实时临床应用

title: Geometric Multigrid solvers for Hybrid High-Order methods on polytopal meshes
summary: We propose the first optimal geometric multigrid solver for hybrid high-order discretizations that can handle arbitrary polytopal agglomeration hierarchies in both two and three dimensions. The key ingredient is the use of modified skeleton spaces, which naturally accommodate non-planar interfaces arising during coarsening while reducing the number of degrees of freedom. We prove robust convergence with respect to the mesh size and the number of levels, and we validate our results numerically on a range of agglomeration-based mesh hierarchies. The approach extends naturally to other hybrid discretizations such as hybridizable discontinuous Galerkin and Weak Galerkin methods.

AI.tldr: 提出首个适用于混合高阶离散化的最优几何多重网格求解器，可处理任意多面体聚合层次结构，并在2D和3D中均有效。
AI.motivation: 针对混合高阶离散化缺乏高效几何多重网格求解器的问题，特别是处理非平面界面和任意多面体聚合层次时的挑战。
AI.method: 使用改进的骨架空间，自然适应粗化过程中出现的非平面界面，同时减少自由度数量。
AI.result: 证明了关于网格尺寸和层数的鲁棒收敛性，并在多种基于聚合的网格层次上进行了数值验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可自然扩展到其他混合离散化方法，如可杂交间断伽辽金方法和弱伽辽金方法。

title: Control and synchronization of capillary flows in stepped microchannels
summary: Capillary-driven transport offers a simple, self-sustained alternative to externally pumped microfluidic systems, yet achieving precise control of such flows remains challenging. We experimentally and theoretically investigate capillary flow in rectangular microchannels when a liquid meniscus encounters a geometric step with varying channel width and height. Depending on the contact angle and step dimensions, the meniscus either pins or advances, defining distinct flow and no-flow regimes. Introducing a lateral offset between channel sidewalls provides an additional geometric control that enables reversible switching from a pinned to a flowing state, even for liquids with relatively high contact angles. We rationalize these transitions using numerical simulations and an energy-based scaling model that captures the balance between surface tension and Laplace pressure at the step. Finally, we demonstrate synchronization of capillary fronts in parallel microchannels by combining stepped and offset geometries. These results establish a simple, geometry-mediated mechanism for passive control and synchronization of capillary flows, expanding the design space for microfluidic systems.

AI.tldr: 通过几何结构控制毛细流动：在矩形微通道中引入宽度/高度变化的台阶和侧壁偏移，可实现毛细流动的被动控制和同步。
AI.motivation: 毛细驱动流动为微流体系统提供了简单、自持的替代方案，但实现精确控制仍然具有挑战性。需要开发无需外部泵浦的被动控制机制。
AI.method: 实验和理论研究矩形微通道中的毛细流动，当液面遇到宽度和高度变化的几何台阶时。引入侧壁偏移作为额外几何控制，使用数值模拟和基于能量的标度模型分析表面张力与拉普拉斯压力平衡。
AI.result: 根据接触角和台阶尺寸，液面会出现钉扎或前进，形成流动与非流动区。侧壁偏移可实现从钉扎到流动状态的可逆切换，即使对于接触角较高的液体。通过结合台阶和偏移几何，实现了平行微通道中毛细前沿的同步。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种简单、几何介导的毛细流动被动控制和同步机制，扩展了微流体系统的设计空间。

title: EPPCMinerBen: A Novel Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Electronic Patient-Provider Communication via the Patient Portal
summary: Effective communication in health care is critical for treatment outcomes and adherence. With patient-provider exchanges shifting to secure messaging, analyzing electronic patient-communication (EPPC) data is both essential and challenging. We introduce EPPCMinerBen, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs in detecting communication patterns and extracting insights from electronic patient-provider messages. EPPCMinerBen includes three sub-tasks: Code Classification, Subcode Classification, and Evidence Extraction. Using 1,933 expert annotated sentences from 752 secure messages of the patient portal at Yale New Haven Hospital, it evaluates LLMs on identifying communicative intent and supportive text. Benchmarks span various LLMs under zero-shot and few-shot settings, with data to be released via the NCI Cancer Data Service. Model performance varied across tasks and settings. Llama-3.1-70B led in evidence extraction (F1: 82.84%) and performed well in classification. Llama-3.3-70b-Instruct outperformed all models in code classification (F1: 67.03%). DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B excelled in subcode classification (F1: 48.25%), while sdoh-llama-3-70B showed consistent performance. Smaller models underperformed, especially in subcode classification (>30% F1). Few-shot prompting improved most tasks. Our results show that large, instruction-tuned models generally perform better in EPPCMinerBen tasks, particularly evidence extraction while smaller models struggle with fine-grained reasoning. EPPCMinerBen provides a benchmark for discourse-level understanding, supporting future work on model generalization and patient-provider communication analysis. Keywords: Electronic Patient-Provider Communication, Large language models, Data collection, Prompt engineering

AI.tldr: EPPCMinerBen是一个用于评估LLMs在电子医患沟通中检测沟通模式和提取洞察的基准，包含三个子任务，使用1933个专家标注的句子进行测试，结果显示大型指令调优模型表现更好。
AI.motivation: 随着医患交流转向安全消息传递，分析电子患者沟通数据变得至关重要但具有挑战性，需要建立一个基准来评估LLMs在这方面的能力。
AI.method: 创建EPPCMinerBen基准，包含三个子任务：代码分类、子代码分类和证据提取。使用耶鲁纽黑文医院患者门户的752条安全消息中的1933个专家标注句子，在零样本和少样本设置下评估各种LLMs。
AI.result: Llama-3.1-70B在证据提取中表现最佳（F1: 82.84%），Llama-3.3-70b-Instruct在代码分类中领先（F1: 67.03%），DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B在子代码分类中表现最好（F1: 48.25%）。小型模型表现较差，少样本提示通常能改善性能。
AI.conclusion: 大型指令调优模型在EPPCMinerBen任务中表现更好，特别是在证据提取方面，而小型模型在细粒度推理方面存在困难。该基准为话语级理解提供了评估标准，支持未来模型泛化和医患沟通分析的研究。

title: Maximizing the Spectral Energy Gain in Sub-1-Bit LLMs via Latent Geometry Alignment
summary: We identify the Spectral Energy Gain in extreme model compression, where low-rank binary approximations outperform tiny-rank floating-point baselines for heavy-tailed spectra. However, prior attempts fail to realize this potential, trailing state-of-the-art 1-bit methods. We attribute this degradation to Latent Geometry Misalignment: standard singular vectors exhibit high coherence (spiky distribution), the worst-case geometry for binary quantization. To realize this gain, we propose LittleBit-2, a framework employing Internal Latent Rotation and Joint Iterative Quantization (Joint-ITQ). This approach acts as a geometric preconditioner, aligning coherent latent distributions with the binary hypercube with zero inference overhead. Empirically, LittleBit-2 establishes a new state-of-the-art in the sub-1-bit regime (1$\sim$0.1 bpp) on Llama-2 and Llama-3, matching the fidelity of leading 1-bit baselines.

AI.tldr: LittleBit-2通过内部潜在旋转和联合迭代量化解决极端模型压缩中的潜在几何错位问题，在0.1-1bpp范围内达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 研究发现极端模型压缩中存在谱能量增益现象，即低秩二值近似可以超越小秩浮点基线，但现有方法未能实现这一潜力，落后于最先进的1位方法。作者将性能下降归因于潜在几何错位问题。
AI.method: 提出LittleBit-2框架，采用内部潜在旋转和联合迭代量化作为几何预处理器，将相干潜在分布与二值超立方体对齐，且不增加推理开销。
AI.result: 在Llama-2和Llama-3模型上，LittleBit-2在0.1-1位每参数范围内建立了新的最先进水平，匹配了领先的1位基线的保真度。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决潜在几何错位问题，LittleBit-2成功实现了极端模型压缩中的谱能量增益，在亚1位压缩领域取得了突破性进展。

title: Monotropic Artificial Intelligence: Toward a Cognitive Taxonomy of Domain-Specialized Language Models
summary: The prevailing paradigm in artificial intelligence research equates progress with scale: larger models trained on broader datasets are presumed to yield superior capabilities. This assumption, while empirically productive for general-purpose applications, obscures a fundamental epistemological tension between breadth and depth of knowledge. We introduce the concept of \emph{Monotropic Artificial Intelligence} -- language models that deliberately sacrifice generality to achieve extraordinary precision within narrowly circumscribed domains. Drawing on the cognitive theory of monotropism developed to understand autistic cognition, we argue that intense specialization represents not a limitation but an alternative cognitive architecture with distinct advantages for safety-critical applications. We formalize the defining characteristics of monotropic models, contrast them with conventional polytropic architectures, and demonstrate their viability through Mini-Enedina, a 37.5-million-parameter model that achieves near-perfect performance on Timoshenko beam analysis while remaining deliberately incompetent outside its domain. Our framework challenges the implicit assumption that artificial general intelligence constitutes the sole legitimate aspiration of AI research, proposing instead a cognitive ecology in which specialized and generalist systems coexist complementarily.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"单焦点人工智能"概念，主张通过牺牲通用性来在特定领域实现极致精度，挑战了AI研究中"越大越通用越好"的主流范式。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究普遍认为模型越大、训练数据越广，能力就越强。这种范式虽然对通用应用有效，但忽视了知识的广度与深度之间的根本认识论张力。作者认为，对于安全关键应用，极致的专业化可能比通用性更有价值。
AI.method: 借鉴自闭症认知的单焦点理论，提出单焦点AI概念，即故意牺牲通用性以在狭窄领域实现非凡精度的语言模型。通过Mini-Enedina（3750万参数模型）进行验证，该模型在Timoshenko梁分析上达到近乎完美的性能，但在其领域外保持故意无能。
AI.result: 成功展示了单焦点模型的可行性：Mini-Enedina在特定工程领域（Timoshenko梁分析）表现出色，同时避免了通用模型可能带来的风险和不稳定性。证明了专业化系统可以作为通用智能的补充存在。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了人工通用智能是AI研究唯一合法目标的隐含假设，提出了一个认知生态框架，其中专业化系统和通用系统可以互补共存。单焦点AI为安全关键应用提供了有前景的替代方案。

title: NovaLAD: A Fast, CPU-Optimized Document Extraction Pipeline for Generative AI and Data Intelligence
summary: Document extraction is an important step before retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), knowledge bases, and downstream generative AI can work. It turns unstructured documents like PDFs and scans into structured text and layout-aware representations. We introduce NovaLAD, a comprehensive document parsing system that integrates two concurrent YOLO object detection models - element detection and layout detection - with rule-based grouping and optional vision-language enhancement. When a page image is sent in, the first thing that happens is that it goes through both models at the same time. The element model finds semantic content like the title, header, text, table, image, and so on, and the layout model finds structural regions like layout_box, column_group, multi_column, row_group, and so on. A key design decision is to first send an image or figure through an image classifier (ViT) that decides whether it is relevant or not. Only useful images are then submitted to the Vision LLM for title, summary, and structured information, which cuts down on noise and costs. NovaLAD is built for speed: it works on CPU, employs parallel execution for detection, classification, OCR, and conversion, and generates several forms, including structured JSON, Markdown, RAG-ready texts, and knowledge graphs. We test on the DP-Bench benchmark (upstage/dp-bench) and get 96.49% TEDS and 98.51% NID, which is better than both commercial and open-source parsers. This paper explains how to extract data, how the architecture works, how data flows, and how to make NovaLAD both accurate and usable without needing a GPU.

AI.tldr: NovaLAD是一个综合文档解析系统，通过并行YOLO目标检测模型（元素检测和布局检测）结合规则分组和可选视觉语言增强，将非结构化文档转换为结构化文本和布局感知表示。
AI.motivation: 文档提取是检索增强生成（RAG）、知识库和下游生成式AI工作的关键前提步骤，需要将PDF和扫描件等非结构化文档转换为结构化文本和布局感知表示。
AI.method: 系统集成两个并行的YOLO目标检测模型：元素检测（识别标题、页眉、文本、表格、图像等语义内容）和布局检测（识别布局框、列组、多列、行组等结构区域）。关键设计是先通过ViT图像分类器判断图像是否相关，只有有用图像才提交给视觉LLM获取标题、摘要和结构化信息，减少噪声和成本。系统支持CPU运行，采用并行执行检测、分类、OCR和转换。
AI.result: 在DP-Bench基准测试（upstage/dp-bench）上获得96.49% TEDS和98.51% NID，优于商业和开源解析器。系统生成多种格式输出：结构化JSON、Markdown、RAG就绪文本和知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: NovaLAD是一个高效、准确的文档解析系统，通过创新的并行检测架构和智能图像筛选机制，在无需GPU的情况下实现了高性能文档提取，为RAG和生成式AI应用提供了可靠的数据预处理解决方案。

title: From Frequency Bias to Spectral Balance: Operator-Aware Preconditioners for PINNs
summary: When neural networks (NNs) are used as a type of nonlinear parametric representation to solve partial differential equations (PDEs), they often display frequency-dependent learning dynamics that can differ from those seen in direct function approximation tasks, resulting from a balance between the frequency bias of the NN representation and that of the underlying differential operator. Although many commonly used NNs exhibit a bias towards low-frequency modes in representation, the presence of differential operators in the loss function, which amplifies high-frequency components, can lead to high frequency bias. In this work, using second order elliptic PDEs as an example, we show how these two factors compete and lead to an overall frequency bias in different situations. Once the balance is determined, it is important to design computational strategies to counter the resulting bias to improve training efficiency. We propose a simple operator-aware preconditioning strategy that rebalances the optimization landscape and the learning dynamics by applying an auxiliary integral operator to the residual. The integral kernel can be the Green's function of a reference elliptic operator or an approximation, and integrates easily with common NN solvers for PDEs. Extensive experiments, including multiscale and variable-coefficient problems, show that the approach restores more balanced learning dynamics across modes and substantially improves both convergency and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于算子感知预处理的神经网络PDE求解方法，通过引入辅助积分算子重新平衡优化景观，改善多尺度问题的训练效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 神经网络求解PDE时存在频率依赖的学习动态问题：神经网络本身偏向低频表示，但微分算子会放大高频分量，两者竞争导致整体频率偏差，影响训练效率和精度。
AI.method: 提出算子感知预处理策略，对残差应用辅助积分算子（如参考椭圆算子的格林函数或其近似）来重新平衡优化景观和学习动态，该方法易于与常见神经网络PDE求解器集成。
AI.result: 大量实验（包括多尺度和变系数问题）表明，该方法能恢复跨模态的更平衡学习动态，显著提高收敛性和精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析神经网络PDE求解中的频率偏差竞争机制，提出的算子感知预处理策略能有效改善训练动态，为高效求解复杂PDE问题提供了实用方法。

title: Fluid flow in low aspect-ratio curved channels: from small to moderate Dean numbers
summary: We investigated the pressure-driven flow in curved channels at low aspect ratio, the latter being the ratio between the channel height (along the axial direction) and width (along the radial direction). The dynamics was studied numerically, as a function of the characteristic Dean number, $\mathrm{De}=\mathrm{Re}\sqrtδ$, by varying independently the Reynolds number $\mathrm{Re}$ and the curvature ratio $δ$, the ratio between the hydraulic diameter and the radius of curvature. We considered the flow within a wide range of dimensionless numbers: $\mathrm{De}\lesssim200$ and $0.005\leqδ\leq0.15$. For $\mathrm{De}\lesssim 100$, the flow remained stable in time, whereas at larger Dean numbers, the flow was stable while traveling several turns before transient structures developed. While investigating the flow features in the stable regime, only one pair of counter-rotating vortices was observed. At small $\mathrm{De}$ and large $δ$, the peak of the streamwise velocity and the center of the vortices were located near the inner channel wall. They both shifted toward the outer wall as $\mathrm{De}$ was increased and/or $δ$ was decreased. This phenomenon is expected to have considerable impact on the interpretation of the transport of dispersed phase in multiphase flows in curved channels. Based on a dimensional analysis, the primary and secondary flow profiles, the friction coefficient of the flow as well as the flow development angle were all rationalized in terms of both $\mathrm{Re}$ and $δ$.

AI.tldr: 研究低纵横比弯曲通道中的压力驱动流动，分析Dean数（De）和曲率比（δ）对流动稳定性和涡旋结构的影响，发现流速峰值和涡旋中心位置随De增加和δ减小而向外壁移动。
AI.motivation: 研究弯曲通道中压力驱动流动的特性，特别是低纵横比条件下，了解Dean数和曲率比对流动稳定性、涡旋结构和传质特性的影响，为多相流中分散相输运提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用数值模拟方法，独立变化雷诺数（Re）和曲率比（δ），研究Dean数（De=Re√δ）在De≤200和0.005≤δ≤0.15范围内的流动特性，分析稳定状态和瞬态结构的形成。
AI.result: 当De≤100时流动保持稳定；De较大时流动在经历多个转弯后出现瞬态结构。稳定状态下只观察到一对反向旋转涡旋。流速峰值和涡旋中心位置随De增加和δ减小从内壁向外壁移动。通过量纲分析，将主流和二次流剖面、摩擦系数及流动发展角度用Re和δ进行合理化描述。
AI.conclusion: 弯曲通道中的流动特性强烈依赖于Dean数和曲率比，流速峰值和涡旋中心位置的移动现象对多相流中分散相输运的解释有重要影响，研究结果为相关工程应用提供了理论基础。

title: Embracing Anisotropy: Turning Massive Activations into Interpretable Control Knobs for Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit highly anisotropic internal representations, often characterized by massive activations, a phenomenon where a small subset of feature dimensions possesses magnitudes significantly larger than the rest. While prior works view these extreme dimensions primarily as artifacts to be managed, we propose a distinct perspective: these dimensions serve as intrinsic interpretable functional units arising from domain specialization. Specifically, we propose a simple magnitude-based criterion to identify Domain-Critical Dimensions in a training-free manner. Our analyses reveal that such dimensions behave as interpretable semantic detectors for symbolic/quantitative patterns or domain-specific terms. In addition, we introduce Critical Dimension Steering, which applies activation steering exclusively to the identified dimensions. Empirical results show that this approach outperforms conventional whole-dimension steering in domain adaptation and jailbreaking scenarios.

AI.tldr: LLMs中的极端激活维度不是需要管理的伪影，而是领域专业化的内在可解释功能单元，通过简单的幅度标准可以识别为领域关键维度，并用于更有效的激活引导。
AI.motivation: 先前研究将LLMs中的极端激活维度视为需要管理的伪影，但本文提出不同观点：这些维度实际上是领域专业化产生的内在可解释功能单元，值得深入研究和利用。
AI.method: 提出基于幅度的简单标准来识别领域关键维度（训练免费），并引入关键维度引导技术，仅对识别出的维度应用激活引导，而不是传统的全维度引导。
AI.result: 分析显示这些维度表现为可解释的语义检测器，能够检测符号/定量模式或领域特定术语。在领域适应和越狱场景中，关键维度引导方法优于传统的全维度引导。
AI.conclusion: LLMs中的极端激活维度应被视为领域专业化的功能单元而非伪影，通过关键维度引导可以更有效地利用这些维度进行模型控制和适应。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Control with Probabilistic Stability Guarantee: A Finite-Sample Approach
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to reinforcement learning (RL) for control systems that provides probabilistic stability guarantees using finite data. Leveraging Lyapunov's method, we propose a probabilistic stability theorem that ensures mean square stability using only a finite number of sampled trajectories. The probability of stability increases with the number and length of trajectories, converging to certainty as data size grows. Additionally, we derive a policy gradient theorem for stabilizing policy learning and develop an RL algorithm, L-REINFORCE, that extends the classical REINFORCE algorithm to stabilization problems. The effectiveness of L-REINFORCE is demonstrated through simulations on a Cartpole task, where it outperforms the baseline in ensuring stability.
