These results establish the proposed framework as an effective tool for data-driven surrogate modeling, particularly when uncertainty estimates are required for downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的高斯过程框架，使用深度乘积核学习参数化时空场，支持任意坐标预测，计算复杂度接近线性，并能高效计算后验方差进行不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够学习参数化时空场的连续表示方法，支持任意坐标预测，同时能够高效进行不确定性量化，以用于数据驱动的代理建模。
AI.method: 使用深度乘积核构建高斯过程框架，利用Kronecker矩阵代数实现计算高效的训练过程，复杂度接近时空网格点总数的线性增长，并能高效计算后验方差。
AI.result: 在多个基准问题上，该方法精度与傅里叶神经算子和深度算子网络等算子学习方法相当，在一维非定常Burgers方程上甚至超越了基于投影的降阶模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是数据驱动代理建模的有效工具，特别适用于需要不确定性估计的下游任务，实现了高精度预测和高效不确定性量化的平衡。

title: MemPO: Self-Memory Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon agents face the challenge of growing context size during interaction with environment, which degrades the performance and stability. Existing methods typically introduce the external memory module and look up the relevant information from the stored memory, which prevents the model itself from proactively managing its memory content and aligning with the agent's overarching task objectives. To address these limitations, we propose the self-memory policy optimization algorithm (MemPO), which enables the agent (policy model) to autonomously summarize and manage their memory during interaction with environment. By improving the credit assignment mechanism based on memory effectiveness, the policy model can selectively retain crucial information, significantly reducing token consumption while preserving task performance. Extensive experiments and analyses confirm that MemPO achieves absolute F1 score gains of 25.98% over the base model and 7.1% over the previous SOTA baseline, while reducing token usage by 67.58% and 73.12%.

AI.tldr: MemPO算法让智能体自主管理记忆，通过改进基于记忆有效性的信用分配机制，在减少token消耗的同时保持任务性能
AI.motivation: 长时程智能体面临上下文大小增长的问题，这会降低性能和稳定性。现有方法通常引入外部记忆模块并从中查找相关信息，但这阻碍了模型主动管理记忆内容并与智能体总体任务目标对齐的能力。
AI.method: 提出自记忆策略优化算法(MemPO)，使智能体（策略模型）在与环境交互过程中自主总结和管理记忆。通过改进基于记忆有效性的信用分配机制，策略模型可以选择性地保留关键信息。
AI.result: MemPO在基础模型上获得25.98%的绝对F1分数提升，比之前SOTA基线提升7.1%，同时减少token使用量67.58%和73.12%。
AI.conclusion: MemPO算法有效解决了长时程智能体的记忆管理问题，使智能体能够自主管理记忆，在显著减少token消耗的同时保持甚至提升任务性能。

title: DINOv3 Meets YOLO26 for Weed Detection in Vegetable Crops
summary: Developing robust models for precision vegetable weeding is currently constrained by the scarcity of large-scale, annotated weed-crop datasets. To address this limitation, this study proposes a foundational crop-weed detection model by integrating heterogeneous datasets and leveraging self-supervised learning. A total of 618,642 crop-weed images were initially collected and subsequently refined to 199,388 filtered images for fine-tuning a DINOv3 vision transformer (ViT-small) through a sequential curation strategy. The fine-tuned DINOv3 backbone was then integrated into YOLO26, serving either as a primary backbone or part of a dual-backbone architecture. A feature alignment loss was introduced in the dual backbone framework to enhance feature fusion with minimal computational overhead. Experimental results show that the proposed DINOv3-finetuned ViT-small-based YOLO26-large achieved up to a +5.4% mAP50 gain on in-domain images collected in the 2025 season. Moreover, it demonstrated strong cross-domain generalization with mAP50 improvements of +14.0% on the 2021-2023 season dataset and +11.9% on the 2024 season dataset, compared to the standard YOLO26-large. Although the DINOv3-YOLO26-large model has 45.6% more parameters and a 2.9x increase in inference latency, it maintains real-time performance at ~28.5 frames per second (fps). The curated dataset and software programs developed in this study will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出基于DINOv3微调的ViT-small作为YOLO26骨干网络，通过异构数据集整合和自监督学习构建基础作物-杂草检测模型，在跨域泛化上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前精准蔬菜除草模型开发受限于大规模标注数据集的稀缺，需要解决作物-杂草检测的数据瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 收集61.8万张图像，筛选19.9万张用于微调DINOv3 ViT-small，将其集成到YOLO26中作为单/双骨干网络，引入特征对齐损失优化特征融合。
AI.result: 在2025季数据上mAP50提升+5.4%，在2021-2023季数据上提升+14.0%，2024季数据上提升+11.9%，保持实时性能约28.5fps。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DINOv3微调方法显著提升了作物-杂草检测的精度和跨域泛化能力，虽然参数量和延迟增加但仍保持实时性能，数据集和代码将开源。

title: SkillCraft: Can LLM Agents Learn to Use Tools Skillfully?
comment: 21 pages. Code: https://github.com/shiqichen17/SkillCraft ; Project page: https://skillcraft-website.github.io/page
summary: Real-world tool-using agents operate over long-horizon workflows with recurring structure and diverse demands, where effective behavior requires not only invoking atomic tools but also abstracting, and reusing higher-level tool compositions. However, existing benchmarks mainly measure instance-level success under static tool sets, offering limited insight into agents' ability to acquire such reusable skills. We address this gap by introducing SkillCraft, a benchmark explicitly stress-test agent ability to form and reuse higher-level tool compositions, where we call Skills. SkillCraft features realistic, highly compositional tool-use scenarios with difficulty scaled along both quantitative and structural dimensions, designed to elicit skill abstraction and cross-task reuse. We further propose a lightweight evaluation protocol that enables agents to auto-compose atomic tools into executable Skills, cache and reuse them inside and across tasks, thereby improving efficiency while accumulating a persistent library of reusable skills. Evaluating state-of-the-art agents on SkillCraft, we observe substantial efficiency gains, with token usage reduced by up to 80% by skill saving and reuse. Moreover, success rate strongly correlates with tool composition ability at test time, underscoring compositional skill acquisition as a core capability.

AI.tldr: SkillCraft是一个专门测试智能体形成和重用高级工具组合（技能）能力的基准，通过可扩展的合成工具使用场景和轻量级评估协议，显著提高效率并积累可重用技能库。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的工具使用智能体需要在具有重复结构和多样化需求的长流程中操作，现有基准主要衡量静态工具集下的实例级成功，对智能体获取可重用技能的能力提供有限洞察。
AI.method: 提出SkillCraft基准，包含现实、高度合成的工具使用场景，难度在数量和结构维度上可扩展；设计轻量级评估协议，使智能体能够自动组合原子工具为可执行技能，在任务内外缓存和重用这些技能。
AI.result: 评估最先进的智能体显示，通过技能保存和重用，令牌使用量最多减少80%；成功率与测试时的工具组合能力强相关，表明组合技能获取是核心能力。
AI.conclusion: SkillCraft填补了现有基准的空白，强调智能体形成和重用高级工具组合的能力对现实世界工具使用场景的重要性，展示了技能抽象和跨任务重用的显著效率提升。

title: Polynomial Surrogate Training for Differentiable Ternary Logic Gate Networks
comment: 28 pages, 13 figures. Submitted to 3rd International Conference on Neuro-Symbolic Systems (NeuS) 2026
summary: Differentiable logic gate networks (DLGNs) learn compact, interpretable Boolean circuits via gradient-based training, but all existing variants are restricted to the 16 two-input binary gates. Extending DLGNs to Ternary Kleene $K_3$ logic and training DTLGNs where the UNKNOWN state enables principled abstention under uncertainty is desirable. However, the support set of potential gates per neuron explodes to $19{,}683$, making the established softmax-over-gates training approach intractable. We introduce Polynomial Surrogate Training (PST), which represents each ternary neuron as a degree-$(2,2)$ polynomial with 9 learnable coefficients (a $2{,}187\times$ parameter reduction) and prove that the gap between the trained network and its discretized logic circuit is bounded by a data-independent commitment loss that vanishes at convergence. Scaling experiments from 48K to 512K neurons on CIFAR-10 demonstrate that this hardening gap contracts with overparameterization. Ternary networks train $2$-$3\times$ faster than binary DLGNs and discover true ternary gates that are functionally diverse. On synthetic and tabular tasks we find that the UNKNOWN output acts as a Bayes-optimal uncertainty proxy, enabling selective prediction in which ternary circuits surpass binary accuracy once low-confidence predictions are filtered. More broadly, PST establishes a general polynomial-surrogate methodology whose parameterization cost grows only quadratically with logic valence, opening the door to many-valued differentiable logic.

AI.tldr: 提出多项式代理训练(PST)方法，将可微逻辑门网络扩展到三值Kleene逻辑，通过多项式表示大幅减少参数，实现高效训练和不确定性下的最优弃权
AI.motivation: 现有可微逻辑门网络(DLGNs)仅限于16种二输入二元门，无法处理三值逻辑和不确定性下的弃权决策。扩展到三值Kleene逻辑时，可能的门数量爆炸增长到19,683个，使传统softmax训练方法不可行
AI.method: 提出多项式代理训练(PST)，将每个三值神经元表示为9个可学习系数的(2,2)次多项式，相比传统方法参数减少2,187倍。证明训练网络与离散化逻辑电路之间的差距受数据无关的承诺损失约束，且收敛时消失
AI.result: 三值网络比二元DLGNs训练快2-3倍，发现功能多样的真实三值门。在合成和表格任务中，UNKNOWN输出作为贝叶斯最优不确定性代理，通过过滤低置信度预测，三值电路在选择性预测中超越二元准确率
AI.conclusion: PST建立了一般多项式代理方法，其参数化成本仅随逻辑价数二次增长，为多值可微逻辑打开了大门。实验表明硬化差距随过参数化收缩，三值网络能实现不确定性下的最优弃权决策

title: AIoT-based Continuous, Contextualized, and Explainable Driving Assessment for Older Adults
summary: The world is undergoing a major demographic shift as older adults become a rapidly growing share of the population, creating new challenges for driving safety. In car-dependent regions such as the United States, driving remains essential for independence, access to services, and social participation. At the same time, aging can introduce gradual changes in vision, attention, reaction time, and driving control that quietly reduce safety. Today's assessment methods rely largely on infrequent clinic visits or simple screening tools, offering only a brief snapshot and failing to reflect how an older adult actually drives on the road. Our work starts from the observation that everyday driving provides a continuous record of functional ability and captures how a driver responds to traffic, navigates complex roads, and manages routine behavior. Leveraging this insight, we propose AURA, an Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) framework for continuous, real-world assessment of driving safety among older adults. AURA integrates richer in-vehicle sensing, multi-scale behavioral modeling, and context-aware analysis to extract detailed indicators of driving performance from routine trips. It organizes fine-grained actions into longer behavioral trajectories and separates age-related performance changes from situational factors such as traffic, road design, or weather. By integrating sensing, modeling, and interpretation within a privacy-preserving edge architecture, AURA provides a foundation for proactive, individualized support that helps older adults drive safely. This paper outlines the design principles, challenges, and research opportunities needed to build reliable, real-world monitoring systems that promote safer aging behind the wheel.

AI.tldr: AURA：一个基于AIoT的框架，用于对老年人驾驶安全进行连续、实时的真实世界评估，通过车载传感器、多尺度行为建模和情境感知分析来监测驾驶表现。
AI.motivation: 全球人口老龄化趋势加剧，老年驾驶员数量快速增长，而传统评估方法（如诊所访问或简单筛查工具）只能提供短暂快照，无法反映老年人实际道路驾驶情况。老年人需要驾驶来保持独立性和社会参与，但年龄相关的视觉、注意力、反应时间和驾驶控制变化会降低安全性。
AI.method: 提出AURA框架，整合车载传感技术、多尺度行为建模和情境感知分析。该系统将细粒度驾驶动作组织成更长的行为轨迹，并将年龄相关的表现变化与交通、道路设计、天气等情境因素分离。采用保护隐私的边缘计算架构，实现连续、实时的驾驶安全评估。
AI.result: AURA框架为主动、个性化的驾驶安全支持提供了基础，能够从日常驾驶行程中提取详细的驾驶表现指标，帮助老年人更安全地驾驶。
AI.conclusion: 本文概述了构建可靠、真实世界监测系统的设计原则、挑战和研究机会，这些系统能够促进老年人在方向盘后的安全驾驶，为应对人口老龄化带来的驾驶安全挑战提供了创新解决方案。

title: SKINOPATHY AI: Smartphone-Based Ophthalmic Screening and Longitudinal Tracking Using Lightweight Computer Vision
summary: Early ophthalmic screening in low-resource and remote settings is constrained by access to specialized equipment and trained practitioners. We present SKINOPATHY AI, a smartphone-first web application that delivers five complementary, explainable screening modules entirely through commodity mobile hardware: (1) redness quantification via LAB a* color-space normalization; (2) blink-rate estimation using MediaPipe FaceMesh Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) with adaptive thresholding; (3) pupil light reflex characterization through Pupil-to-Iris Ratio (PIR) time-series analysis; (4) scleral color indexing foricterus and anemia proxies via LAB/HSV statistics; and (5) iris-landmark-calibrated lesion encroachment measurement with millimeter-scale estimates and longitudinal trend tracking. The system is implemented as a React/FastAPI stack with OpenCV and MediaPipe, MongoDB-backed session persistence, and PDF report generation. All algorithms are fully deterministic, privacy-preserving, and designed for non-diagnostic consumer triage. We detail system architecture, algorithm design, evaluation methodology, clinical context, and ethical boundaries of the platform. SKINOPATHY AI demonstrates that multi-signal ophthalmic screening is feasible on unmodified smartphones without cloud-based AI inference, providing a foundation for future clinically validated mobile ophthalmoscopy tools.

AI.tldr: SKINOPATHY AI是一个基于智能手机的网页应用，提供五种互补的可解释眼科筛查模块，无需专业设备即可在资源匮乏地区进行眼科筛查。
AI.motivation: 在资源匮乏和偏远地区，眼科筛查受到专业设备和训练有素的从业者访问限制，需要一种低成本、易获取的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发了基于React/FastAPI的智能手机网页应用，包含五个互补的筛查模块：1) 通过LAB a*色彩空间归一化进行发红量化；2) 使用MediaPipe FaceMesh眼宽高比进行眨眼率估计；3) 通过瞳孔-虹膜比时间序列分析表征瞳孔光反射；4) 基于LAB/HSV统计的巩膜颜色索引（黄疸和贫血代理）；5) 虹膜地标校准的病变侵犯测量。
AI.result: 系统完全在普通移动硬件上运行，无需云端AI推理，所有算法都是确定性的、保护隐私的，为非诊断性消费者分流而设计，展示了多信号眼科筛查在未修改智能手机上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SKINOPATHY AI证明了无需云端AI推理的多信号眼科筛查在普通智能手机上是可行的，为未来临床验证的移动眼科检查工具奠定了基础。

title: RLAR: An Agentic Reward System for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning on Large Language Models
summary: Large language model alignment via reinforcement learning depends critically on reward function quality. However, static, domain-specific reward models are often costly to train and exhibit poor generalization in out-of-distribution scenarios encountered during RL iterations. We present RLAR (Reinforcement Learning from Agent Rewards), an agent-driven framework that dynamically assigns tailored reward functions to individual queries. Specifically, RLAR transforms reward acquisition into a dynamic tool synthesis and invocation task. It leverages LLM agents to autonomously retrieve optimal reward models from the Internet and synthesize programmatic verifiers through code generation. This allows the reward system to self-evolve with the shifting data distributions during training. Experimental results demonstrate that RLAR yields consistent performance gains ranging from 10 to 60 across mathematics, coding, translation, and dialogue tasks. On RewardBench-V2, RLAR significantly outperforms static baselines and approaches the performance upper bound, demonstrating superior generalization through dynamic reward orchestration. The data and code are available on this link: https://github.com/ZhuoerFeng/RLAR.

AI.tldr: RLAR提出了一种基于智能体动态分配奖励函数的强化学习框架，通过自动检索网络上的奖励模型和生成程序化验证器，使奖励系统能够随训练数据分布变化而自我进化。
AI.motivation: 传统静态、领域特定的奖励模型训练成本高，且在强化学习迭代中遇到分布外场景时泛化能力差。需要一种能够动态适应数据分布变化的奖励函数获取方法。
AI.method: 将奖励获取转化为动态工具合成和调用任务，利用LLM智能体自动从互联网检索最优奖励模型，并通过代码生成合成程序化验证器，为每个查询动态分配定制化的奖励函数。
AI.result: 在数学、编程、翻译和对话任务上获得10-60%的性能提升，在RewardBench-V2上显著优于静态基线方法，接近性能上限，展示了通过动态奖励编排的优越泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RLAR框架通过动态、智能体驱动的奖励获取机制，解决了传统静态奖励模型的局限性，实现了在强化学习训练过程中奖励系统的自我进化，显著提升了模型对齐的性能和泛化能力。

title: When does Chain-of-Thought Help: A Markovian Perspective
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting is a widely used inference-time technique for improving reasoning, yet its gains are uneven across tasks. We analyze when and why CoT helps by modeling the step-wise reasoning trajectory as a Markov chain. Each intermediate step is a state and the dependence between steps is captured by a transition kernel. Our theory identifies transition alignment, whether instances share a common step-wise transition kernel, as the key determinant of CoT's effectiveness. When transitions are identical across steps, CoT reduces inference-time sample complexity: fewer context sample trajectories suffice to recover the final decision. In contrast, when transitions differ across steps, these gains can vanish. We further quantify how noise in intermediate steps modulates CoT's benefit. Beyond theory, we design synthetic benchmarks that isolate these factors to complement prior results on real-world tasks and to empirically validate our predictions.

AI.tldr: 论文通过马尔可夫链模型分析CoT提示的有效性，发现步骤间转移对齐是决定CoT效果的关键因素，当转移核相同时CoT能降低推理样本复杂度，否则收益可能消失。
AI.motivation: 虽然CoT提示广泛用于提升推理能力，但其效果在不同任务中表现不均。研究旨在分析CoT何时有效及为何有效，理解其内在机制。
AI.method: 将逐步推理轨迹建模为马尔可夫链，每个中间步骤为状态，步骤间依赖关系由转移核捕获。理论分析转移对齐对CoT效果的影响，并设计合成基准进行实证验证。
AI.result: 理论表明：当步骤间转移核相同时，CoT能显著降低推理时样本复杂度；当转移核不同时，收益可能消失。中间步骤的噪声也会调节CoT的收益程度。
AI.conclusion: 转移对齐是决定CoT提示有效性的关键因素，为理解和预测CoT在不同任务中的表现提供了理论框架，并通过合成基准验证了理论预测。

title: MO-MIX: Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Cooperative Decision-Making With Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, published in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied extensively to solve complex decision-making problems. In many real-world scenarios, tasks often have several conflicting objectives and may require multiple agents to cooperate, which are the multi-objective multi-agent decision-making problems. However, only few works have been conducted on this intersection. Existing approaches are limited to separate fields and can only handle multi-agent decision-making with a single objective, or multi-objective decision-making with a single agent. In this paper, we propose MO-MIX to solve the multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning (MOMARL) problem. Our approach is based on the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) framework. A weight vector representing preference over the objectives is fed into the decentralized agent network as a condition for local action-value function estimation, while a mixing network with parallel architecture is used to estimate the joint action-value function. In addition, an exploration guide approach is applied to improve the uniformity of the final non-dominated solutions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively solve the multi-objective multi-agent cooperative decision-making problem and generate an approximation of the Pareto set. Our approach not only significantly outperforms the baseline method in all four kinds of evaluation metrics, but also requires less computational cost.

AI.tldr: MO-MIX：基于CTDE框架的多目标多智能体强化学习方法，通过权重向量表示目标偏好，并行混合网络估计联合动作价值函数，探索引导提升非支配解均匀性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的决策问题通常涉及多个冲突目标和多智能体协作，但现有方法只能处理单目标多智能体或单智能体多目标问题，缺乏对多目标多智能体强化学习（MOMARL）的综合解决方案。
AI.method: 基于集中训练分散执行（CTDE）框架，将表示目标偏好的权重向量输入分散智能体网络作为局部动作价值函数估计的条件，使用并行架构的混合网络估计联合动作价值函数，并应用探索引导方法提升最终非支配解的均匀性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效解决多目标多智能体协作决策问题，生成帕累托集的近似解，在四种评估指标上显著优于基线方法，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: MO-MIX为多目标多智能体强化学习问题提供了有效的解决方案，能够处理现实世界中复杂的多目标多智能体决策场景，在性能、解质量和计算效率方面均有优势。

title: A Boundary-Metric Evaluation Protocol for Whiteboard Stroke Segmentation Under Extreme Imbalance
summary: The binary segmentation of whiteboard strokes is hindered by extreme class imbalance, caused by stroke pixels that constitute only $1.79%$ of the image on average, and in addition, the thin-stroke subset averages $1.14% \pm 0.41%$ in the foreground. Standard region metrics (F1, IoU) can mask thin-stroke failures because the vast majority of the background dominates the score. In contrast, adding boundary-aware metrics and a thin-subset equity analysis changes how loss functions rank and exposes hidden trade-offs. We contribute an evaluation protocol that jointly examines region metrics, boundary metrics (BF1, B-IoU), a core/thin-subset equity analysis, and per-image robustness statistics (median, IQR, worst-case) under seeded, multi-run training with non-parametric significance testing. Five losses -- cross-entropy, focal, Dice, Dice+focal, and Tversky -- are trained three times each on a DeepLabV3-MobileNetV3 model and evaluated on 12 held-out images split into core and thin subsets. Overlap-based losses improve F1 by more than 20 points over cross-entropy ($0.663$ vs $0.438$, $p < 0.001$). In addition, the boundary metrics confirm that the gain extends to the precision of the contour. Adaptive thresholding and Sauvola binarization at native resolution achieve a higher mean F1 ($0.787$ for Sauvola) but with substantially worse worst-case performance (F1 $= 0.452$ vs $0.565$ for Tversky), exposing a consistency-accuracy trade-off: classical baselines lead on mean F1 while the learned model delivers higher worst-case reliability. Doubling training resolution further increases F1 by 12.7 points.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出针对白板笔画分割中极端类别不平衡问题的评估协议，比较了五种损失函数，发现基于重叠的损失函数在区域和边界指标上均优于交叉熵，同时揭示了传统方法与学习模型在一致性-准确性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 白板笔画分割面临极端类别不平衡问题（笔画像素仅占图像的1.79%，细笔画子集仅占1.14%±0.41%），标准区域指标（F1、IoU）会掩盖细笔画分割失败的问题，因为背景像素占主导地位。
AI.method: 提出综合评估协议，同时考察区域指标、边界指标（BF1、B-IoU）、核心/细笔画子集公平性分析，以及在种子多轮训练下的每图像鲁棒性统计（中位数、四分位距、最坏情况）并进行非参数显著性检验。使用DeepLabV3-MobileNetV3模型，对五种损失函数（交叉熵、focal、Dice、Dice+focal、Tversky）各训练三次，在12张保留图像上进行评估。
AI.result: 基于重叠的损失函数（Dice、Tversky等）在F1分数上比交叉熵提高超过20个点（0.663 vs 0.438，p<0.001），边界指标也确认了轮廓精度的提升。传统方法（自适应阈值和Sauvola二值化）在平均F1上更高（Sauvola为0.787），但最坏情况性能更差（F1=0.452 vs Tversky的0.565），揭示了传统方法在平均准确性上领先而学习模型在最坏情况可靠性更高的权衡。将训练分辨率加倍可进一步提高F1分数12.7个点。
AI.conclusion: 需要综合评估协议来揭示白板笔画分割中的隐藏权衡，基于重叠的损失函数在极端类别不平衡问题上表现更好，学习模型相比传统方法提供更高的最坏情况可靠性，提高训练分辨率能显著改善性能。

title: LaSTR: Language-Driven Time-Series Segment Retrieval
summary: Effectively searching time-series data is essential for system analysis, but existing methods often require expert-designed similarity criteria or rely on global, series-level descriptions. We study language-driven segment retrieval: given a natural language query, the goal is to retrieve relevant local segments from large time-series repositories. We build large-scale segment--caption training data by applying TV2-based segmentation to LOTSA windows and generating segment descriptions with GPT-5.2, and then train a Conformer-based contrastive retriever in a shared text--time-series embedding space. On a held-out test split, we evaluate single-positive retrieval together with caption-side consistency (SBERT and VLM-as-a-judge) under multiple candidate pool sizes. Across all settings, LaSTR outperforms random and CLIP baselines, yielding improved ranking quality and stronger semantic agreement between retrieved segments and query intent.

AI.tldr: LaSTR：基于语言查询的时间序列片段检索系统，通过大规模片段-描述数据训练，在语义一致性上优于基线方法
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列检索方法需要专家设计的相似性标准或依赖全局序列级描述，无法有效支持自然语言查询的局部片段检索
AI.method: 1) 使用TV2分割LOTSA窗口构建大规模片段-描述训练数据，用GPT-5.2生成片段描述；2) 训练基于Conformer的对比检索器，在共享文本-时间序列嵌入空间中学习
AI.result: 在保留测试集上，LaSTR在单正例检索和描述侧一致性评估（SBERT和VLM-as-a-judge）中，在不同候选池大小下均优于随机和CLIP基线，提供更好的排序质量和更强的语义一致性
AI.conclusion: LaSTR成功实现了语言驱动的时间序列片段检索，通过大规模数据生成和对比学习，能够有效理解查询意图并检索相关局部片段

title: Vectorized Adaptive Histograms for Sparse Oblique Forests
summary: Classification using sparse oblique random forests provides guarantees on uncertainty and confidence while controlling for specific error types. However, they use more data and more compute than other tree ensembles because they create deep trees and need to sort or histogram linear combinations of data at runtime. We provide a method for dynamically switching between histograms and sorting to find the best split. We further optimize histogram construction using vector intrinsics. Evaluating this on large datasets, our optimizations speedup training by 1.7-2.5x compared to existing oblique forests and 1.5-2x compared to standard random forests. We also provide a GPU and hybrid CPU-GPU implementation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种优化稀疏斜决策森林的方法，通过动态切换直方图与排序来寻找最佳分割点，并使用向量指令优化直方图构建，实现1.5-2.5倍训练加速。
AI.motivation: 稀疏斜随机森林虽然能提供不确定性保证并控制特定错误类型，但需要更多数据和计算资源，因为需要构建深层树并在运行时对数据的线性组合进行排序或直方图处理。
AI.method: 1) 动态切换直方图与排序方法寻找最佳分割点；2) 使用向量指令优化直方图构建；3) 提供GPU和CPU-GPU混合实现。
AI.result: 在大数据集上评估，优化后的方法比现有斜森林训练速度快1.7-2.5倍，比标准随机森林快1.5-2倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态分割点搜索策略和硬件优化，显著提升了稀疏斜随机森林的训练效率，同时保持了其理论优势。

title: The Synthetic Web: Adversarially-Curated Mini-Internets for Diagnosing Epistemic Weaknesses of Language Agents
comment: Submitted to ICML 2026, currently under review
summary: Language agents increasingly act as web-enabled systems that search, browse, and synthesize information from diverse sources. However, these sources can include unreliable or adversarial content, and the robustness of agents to adversarial ranking - where misleading information appears prominently in search results - remains poorly understood. Existing benchmarks evaluate functional navigation or static factuality but cannot causally isolate this vulnerability, and current mitigation strategies for retrieval-augmented generation remain largely untested under such conditions. We introduce Synthetic Web Benchmark, a procedurally generated environment comprising thousands of hyperlinked articles with ground-truth labels for credibility and factuality, process-level interaction traces, and contamination filtering to eliminate training-data leakage. By injecting a single high-plausibility misinformation article into a controllable search rank, we measure the causal effect of adversarial exposure in six frontier models. The results reveal catastrophic failures: accuracy collapses despite unlimited access to truthful sources, with minimal search escalation and severe miscalibration. These findings expose fundamental limitations in how current frontier models handle conflicting information, with immediate implications for deployment in high-stakes domains. Our benchmark enables systematic analysis of these failure modes and provides a controlled testbed for evaluating mitigation strategies under adversarial ranking - a gap in current research. This work establishes a reproducible baseline for developing search-robust and epistemically humble agents capable of resisting manipulation in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Synthetic Web Benchmark，一个程序化生成的网络环境，用于评估语言智能体在对抗性排名（误导信息出现在搜索结果前列）下的脆弱性，发现前沿模型存在灾难性失败。
AI.motivation: 当前语言智能体越来越多地作为网络系统运行，但网络来源可能包含不可靠或对抗性内容。现有基准测试无法因果性地隔离对抗性排名漏洞，且当前缓解策略在此类条件下基本未经测试。
AI.method: 引入Synthetic Web Benchmark，包含数千篇带有超链接的文章，具有可信度和事实性的真实标签、过程级交互轨迹和污染过滤。通过向可控搜索排名中注入单个高可信度的虚假信息文章，测量六个前沿模型在对抗性暴露下的因果效应。
AI.result: 结果揭示了灾难性失败：尽管可以无限制访问真实来源，但准确性仍然崩溃，搜索升级极少且存在严重校准错误。这表明当前前沿模型在处理冲突信息方面存在根本性限制。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试能够系统分析这些失败模式，并为评估对抗性排名下的缓解策略提供受控测试平台。这项工作为开发具有搜索鲁棒性和认识论谦逊的智能体建立了可复现的基线，使其能够在高风险领域抵抗操纵。

title: ConFoThinking: Consolidated Focused Attention Driven Thinking for Visual Question Answering
summary: Thinking with Images improves fine-grained VQA for MLLMs by emphasizing visual cues. However, tool-augmented methods depend on the capacity of grounding, which remains unreliable for MLLMs. In parallel, attention-driven methods to crop the Region of Interest (ROIs) are proposed but they are constrained by (1) fragmented attention signals scattered across layers, leading to suboptimal localization and (2) relying on question- or redundant-text-conditioned attention extraction. Our analysis reveals three patterns: MLLMs may attend to the correct region yet generate incorrect coordinates, where-to-look attention is often fragmented across layers, and attention extraction is query-sensitive. Motivated by these, We propose ConFoThinking, a Consolidated-Focused-Attention-Driven Thinking framework that learns to aggregate attention into a designated intermediate layer, from which we mine and zoom in salient regions for downstream visual understanding. Moreover, we extract attention using concise semantic cues of what to look into, which mitigates the semantic noise introduced by question- or redundant-text-based attention extraction. Experiments across five VQA benchmarks demonstrate ConFoThinking significantly improves perception performance. The code, checkpoints, and dataset will be released after being accepted.

AI.tldr: ConFoThinking通过整合分散的注意力信号到指定中间层，并基于简洁语义线索提取注意力，显著提升MLLMs在细粒度VQA任务中的感知性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的思考方法依赖不可靠的grounding能力，而注意力驱动方法存在两个主要问题：1) 注意力信号在多层中分散导致定位不准确；2) 依赖问题或冗余文本条件提取注意力。分析发现MLLMs可能关注正确区域但生成错误坐标，注意力分散且提取对查询敏感
AI.method: 提出ConFoThinking框架：1) 学习将分散的注意力聚合到指定的中间层；2) 从该层挖掘并放大显著区域用于下游视觉理解；3) 使用简洁的"看什么"语义线索提取注意力，减少问题或冗余文本引入的语义噪声
AI.result: 在五个VQA基准测试上的实验表明，ConFoThinking显著提升了感知性能。代码、检查点和数据集将在论文被接受后发布
AI.conclusion: 通过整合分散的注意力信号到中间层，并使用简洁语义线索提取注意力，ConFoThinking有效解决了MLLMs在细粒度VQA中的注意力分散和查询敏感问题，显著提升了视觉理解能力

title: Qwen3-Coder-Next Technical Report
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their last names
summary: We present Qwen3-Coder-Next, an open-weight language model specialized for coding agents. Qwen3-Coder-Next is an 80-billion-parameter model that activates only 3 billion parameters during inference, enabling strong coding capability with efficient inference. In this work, we explore how far strong training recipes can push the capability limits of models with small parameter footprints. To achieve this, we perform agentic training through large-scale synthesis of verifiable coding tasks paired with executable environments, allowing learning directly from environment feedback via mid-training and reinforcement learning. Across agent-centric benchmarks including SWE-Bench and Terminal-Bench, Qwen3-Coder-Next achieves competitive performance relative to its active parameter count. We release both base and instruction-tuned open-weight versions to support research and real-world coding agent development.

AI.tldr: Qwen3-Coder-Next是一个专门用于编码代理的开放权重语言模型，拥有800亿参数但推理时仅激活30亿参数，通过大规模可验证编码任务和环境反馈训练，在SWE-Bench等基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 探索如何通过强大的训练方法在小参数规模下最大化模型能力，为编码代理开发提供高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用代理训练方法，通过大规模合成可验证的编码任务和可执行环境，利用环境反馈进行中期训练和强化学习。
AI.result: 在SWE-Bench和Terminal-Bench等代理中心基准测试中，相对于其激活参数数量取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: Qwen3-Coder-Next展示了通过精心设计的训练方法可以在小参数规模下实现强大的编码能力，为研究和实际编码代理开发提供了有价值的开放权重模型。

title: Detecting Transportation Mode Using Dense Smartphone GPS Trajectories and Transformer Models
comment: Accepted for publication in the International Journal of Geographical Information Science, February 2026. This is the accepted manuscript. The final version of record will appear in IJGIS (Taylor and Francis)
summary: Transportation mode detection is an important topic within GeoAI and transportation research. In this study, we introduce SpeedTransformer, a novel Transformer-based model that relies solely on speed inputs to infer transportation modes from dense smartphone GPS trajectories. In benchmark experiments, SpeedTransformer outperformed traditional deep learning models, such as the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network. Moreover, the model demonstrated strong flexibility in transfer learning, achieving high accuracy across geographical regions after fine-tuning with small datasets. Finally, we deployed the model in a real-world experiment, where it consistently outperformed baseline models under complex built environments and high data uncertainty. These findings suggest that Transformer architectures, when combined with dense GPS trajectories, hold substantial potential for advancing transportation mode detection and broader mobility-related research.

AI.tldr: SpeedTransformer：仅使用速度输入的Transformer模型，用于从密集GPS轨迹中检测交通方式，在基准测试中优于LSTM等传统深度学习模型，并展现出强大的迁移学习能力。
AI.motivation: 交通方式检测是GeoAI和交通研究中的重要课题，现有方法可能依赖多种传感器数据或复杂特征。本研究旨在探索仅使用速度输入和Transformer架构是否能有效检测交通方式，并评估其在跨地域迁移学习和实际部署中的表现。
AI.method: 提出SpeedTransformer模型，这是一种基于Transformer架构的模型，仅依赖速度输入来推断交通方式。模型处理密集智能手机GPS轨迹，通过Transformer的自注意力机制捕捉速度序列中的长期依赖关系。在基准实验中与传统深度学习模型（如LSTM）进行比较，并测试了迁移学习能力。
AI.result: SpeedTransformer在基准实验中优于传统深度学习模型（如LSTM）。模型展现出强大的迁移学习灵活性，在跨地理区域的小数据集微调后仍能保持高准确率。在实际部署实验中，该模型在复杂建成环境和高度数据不确定性的条件下持续优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构与密集GPS轨迹相结合，在交通方式检测和更广泛的移动性相关研究中具有巨大潜力。SpeedTransformer证明了仅使用速度输入就能实现高性能检测，为实际应用提供了更简单有效的解决方案。

title: MetaMind: General and Cognitive World Models in Multi-Agent Systems by Meta-Theory of Mind
summary: A major challenge for world models in multi-agent systems is to understand interdependent agent dynamics, predict interactive multi-agent trajectories, and plan over long horizons with collective awareness, without centralized supervision or explicit communication. In this paper, MetaMind, a general and cognitive world model for multi-agent systems that leverages a novel meta-theory of mind (Meta-ToM) framework, is proposed. Through MetaMind, each agent learns not only to predict and plan over its own beliefs, but also to inversely reason goals and beliefs from its own behavior trajectories. This self-reflective, bidirectional inference loop enables each agent to learn a metacognitive ability in a self-supervised manner. Then, MetaMind is shown to generalize the metacognitive ability from first-person to third-person through analogical reasoning. Thus, in multi-agent systems, each agent with MetaMind can actively reason about goals and beliefs of other agents from limited, observable behavior trajectories in a zero-shot manner, and then adapt to emergent collective intention without an explicit communication mechanism. Extended simulation results on diverse multi-agent tasks demonstrate that MetaMind can achieve superior task performance and outperform baselines in few-shot multi-agent generalization.

AI.tldr: MetaMind是一个用于多智能体系统的认知世界模型，通过元心理理论框架实现自我反思的双向推理，使智能体能够零样本推断其他智能体的目标和信念，无需显式通信。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中的主要挑战包括理解相互依赖的智能体动态、预测交互轨迹、在集体意识下进行长期规划，而无需集中监督或显式通信。现有方法难以实现这些目标。
AI.method: 提出MetaMind模型，采用元心理理论框架：1）每个智能体学习预测和规划自身信念；2）通过自身行为轨迹逆向推理目标和信念；3）形成自我反思的双向推理循环；4）通过类比推理将元认知能力从第一人称推广到第三人称。
AI.result: 在多样化的多智能体任务上的扩展仿真结果表明，MetaMind能够实现优越的任务性能，在少样本多智能体泛化方面优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaMind通过自我监督学习元认知能力，使智能体能够零样本推断其他智能体的目标和信念，适应涌现的集体意图，无需显式通信机制，在多智能体系统中表现出强大的泛化能力。

title: Exploring the AI Obedience: Why is Generating a Pure Color Image Harder than CyberPunk?
summary: Recent advances in generative AI have demonstrated remarkable ability to produce high-quality content. However, these models often exhibit "Paradox of Simplicity": while they can render intricate landscapes, they often fail at simple, deterministic tasks. To address this, we formalize Obedience as the ability to align with instructions and establish a hierarchical grading system ranging from basic semantic alignment to pixel-level systemic precision, which provides a unified paradigm for incorporating and categorizing existing literature. Then, we conduct case studies to identify common obedience gaps, revealing how generative priors often override logical constraints. To evaluate high-level obedience, we present VIOLIN (VIsual Obedience Level-4 EvaluatIoN), the first benchmark focused on pure color generation across six variants. Extensive experiments on SOTA models reveal fundamental obedience limitations and further exploratory insights. By establishing this framework, we aim to draw more attention on AI Obedience and encourage deeper exploration to bridge this gap.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出"服从性"概念来评估生成式AI模型执行简单确定性任务的能力，建立了分层评估体系，并创建了VIOLIN基准测试来揭示现有模型的服从性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI模型存在"简单性悖论"：能够生成复杂内容却难以完成简单确定性任务。为解决这一问题，需要系统性地评估和改进模型的服从能力。
AI.method: 1. 形式化"服从性"概念，建立从基本语义对齐到像素级系统精度的分层评估体系；2. 通过案例研究识别常见服从性差距；3. 创建VIOLIN基准测试，专注于纯颜色生成的六种变体来评估高级服从性。
AI.result: 对最先进模型的广泛实验揭示了基本的服从性限制，生成先验经常覆盖逻辑约束，表明现有模型在简单确定性任务上存在系统性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 通过建立这一框架，旨在引起对AI服从性的更多关注，鼓励深入研究以弥合这一差距，推动生成式AI在简单确定性任务上的能力提升。

title: A Comprehensive Evaluation of LLM Unlearning Robustness under Multi-Turn Interaction
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training data from pre-trained models without retraining from scratch, and is increasingly important for large language models (LLMs) due to safety, privacy, and legal concerns. Although prior work primarily evaluates unlearning in static, single-turn settings, forgetting robustness under realistic interactive use remains underexplored. In this paper, we study whether unlearning remains stable in interactive environments by examining two common interaction patterns: self-correction and dialogue-conditioned querying. We find that knowledge appearing forgotten in static evaluation can often be recovered through interaction. Although stronger unlearning improves apparent robustness, it often results in behavioral rigidity rather than genuine knowledge erasure. Our findings suggest that static evaluation may overestimate real-world effectiveness and highlight the need for ensuring stable forgetting under interactive settings.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在静态评估中看似被遗忘的知识，在交互式环境中（如自我纠正和对话条件查询）经常能被恢复，表明静态评估可能高估了实际遗忘效果。
AI.motivation: 机器遗忘旨在从预训练模型中移除特定训练数据的影响，对大型语言模型的安全、隐私和法律问题至关重要。先前工作主要在静态、单轮设置中评估遗忘效果，但现实交互使用中的遗忘稳定性尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 研究在交互环境中遗忘的稳定性，通过检查两种常见交互模式：自我纠正和对话条件查询，分析知识是否能在静态评估看似遗忘后通过交互恢复。
AI.result: 发现静态评估中看似遗忘的知识经常能通过交互恢复；更强的遗忘虽然提高了表面鲁棒性，但往往导致行为僵化而非真正的知识擦除。
AI.conclusion: 静态评估可能高估实际遗忘效果，需要在交互设置中确保稳定的遗忘，这对机器遗忘的实际应用具有重要意义。

title: StethoLM: Audio Language Model for Cardiopulmonary Analysis Across Clinical Tasks
summary: Listening to heart and lung sounds - auscultation - is one of the first and most fundamental steps in a clinical examination. Despite being fast and non-invasive, it demands years of experience to interpret subtle audio cues. Recent deep learning methods have made progress in automating cardiopulmonary sound analysis, yet most are restricted to simple classification and offer little clinical interpretability or decision support. We present StethoLM, the first audio-language model specialized for cardiopulmonary auscultation, capable of performing instruction-driven clinical tasks across the full spectrum of auscultation analysis. StethoLM integrates audio encoding with a medical language model backbone and is trained on StethoBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 77,027 instruction-response pairs synthesized from 16,125 labeled cardiopulmonary recordings spanning seven clinical task categories: binary classification, detection, reporting, reasoning, differential diagnosis, comparison, and location-based analysis. Through multi-stage training that combines supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization, StethoLM achieves substantial gains in performance and robustness on out-of-distribution data. Our work establishes a foundation for instruction-following AI systems in clinical auscultation.

AI.tldr: StethoLM是首个专门用于心肺听诊的音频-语言模型，能够执行指令驱动的临床任务，在七个临床任务类别上表现出色，并通过多阶段训练提高了性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 心肺听诊是临床检查的基础步骤，但需要多年经验才能解读细微的音频线索。现有的深度学习方法大多局限于简单分类，缺乏临床可解释性和决策支持。
AI.method: 提出StethoLM音频-语言模型，集成音频编码和医学语言模型主干，在StethoBench基准（77,027个指令-响应对）上进行多阶段训练，包括监督微调和直接偏好优化。
AI.result: StethoLM在七个临床任务类别（二元分类、检测、报告、推理、鉴别诊断、比较和基于位置的分析）上取得显著性能提升，并在分布外数据上表现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为临床听诊中的指令跟随AI系统奠定了基础，展示了音频-语言模型在医疗诊断中的潜力。

title: MC-Search: Evaluating and Enhancing Multimodal Agentic Search with Structured Long Reasoning Chains
summary: With the increasing demand for step-wise, cross-modal, and knowledge-grounded reasoning, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are evolving beyond the traditional fixed retrieve-then-generate paradigm toward more sophisticated agentic multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MM-RAG). Existing benchmarks, however, mainly focus on simplified QA with short retrieval chains, leaving adaptive planning and multimodal reasoning underexplored. We present MC-Search, the first benchmark for agentic MM-RAG with long, step-wise annotated reasoning chains spanning five representative reasoning structures. Each example specifies sub-questions, retrieval modalities, supporting facts, and intermediate answers, with fidelity ensured by HAVE (Hop-wise Attribution and Verification of Evidence), resulting in 3,333 high-quality examples averaging 3.7 hops. Beyond answer accuracy, MC-Search introduces new process-level metrics for reasoning quality, stepwise retrieval and planning accuracy. By developing a unified agentic MM-RAG pipeline, we benchmark six leading MLLMs and reveal systematic issues such as over- and under-retrieval and modality-misaligned planning. Finally, we introduce Search-Align, a process-supervised fine-tuning framework leveraging verified reasoning chains, showing that our data not only enables faithful evaluation but also improves planning and retrieval fidelity in open-source MLLMs.

AI.tldr: MC-Search是首个针对智能体式多模态检索增强生成的基准测试，包含3,333个高质量示例，平均3.7跳推理链，涵盖五种推理结构，并引入过程级评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注简化的问答和短检索链，未能充分探索自适应规划和多模态推理。随着多模态大语言模型向更复杂的智能体式检索增强生成发展，需要新的评估框架来测试其逐步推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建MC-Search基准，包含3,333个高质量示例，平均3.7跳推理链，涵盖五种代表性推理结构；2) 采用HAVE（跳级归因和证据验证）确保数据保真度；3) 开发统一的智能体式MM-RAG流水线；4) 引入Search-Align过程监督微调框架。
AI.result: 1) 对六个领先的MLLM进行基准测试，揭示了系统性问题（如过度/不足检索和模态错位规划）；2) 展示了MC-Search数据不仅能实现忠实评估，还能通过Search-Align框架提高开源MLLM的规划和检索保真度。
AI.conclusion: MC-Search填补了智能体式多模态检索增强生成评估的空白，提供了首个包含长逐步推理链的基准测试。通过过程级指标和Search-Align框架，该工作不仅改进了评估方法，还展示了如何利用验证的推理链提升模型性能。

title: Image-Based Classification of Olive Species Specific to Turkiye with Deep Neural Networks
summary: In this study, image processing and deep learning methodologies were employed to automatically classify local olive species cultivated in Turkiye. A stereo camera was utilized to capture images of five distinct olive species, which were then preprocessed to ensure their suitability for analysis. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures, specifically MobileNetV2 and EfficientNetB0, were employed for image classification. These models were optimized through a transfer learning approach. The training and testing results indicated that the EfficientNetB0 model exhibited the optimal performance, with an accuracy of 94.5%. The findings demonstrate that deep learning-based systems offer an effective solution for classifying olive species with high accuracy. The developed method has significant potential for application in areas such as automatic identification and quality control of agricultural products.

AI.tldr: 使用图像处理和深度学习技术自动分类土耳其本地橄榄品种，EfficientNetB0模型达到94.5%准确率
AI.motivation: 开发自动分类土耳其本地橄榄品种的系统，用于农业产品的自动识别和质量控制
AI.method: 使用立体相机采集5种橄榄图像，预处理后采用MobileNetV2和EfficientNetB0 CNN架构，通过迁移学习优化模型
AI.result: EfficientNetB0模型表现最佳，达到94.5%的分类准确率
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的系统能有效高精度分类橄榄品种，在农业产品自动识别和质量控制方面具有重要应用潜力

title: Constitutional Black-Box Monitoring for Scheming in LLM Agents
summary: Safe deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents in autonomous settings requires reliable oversight mechanisms. A central challenge is detecting scheming, where agents covertly pursue misaligned goals. One approach to mitigating such risks is LLM-based monitoring: using language models to examine agent behaviors for suspicious actions. We study constitutional black-box monitors: prompted classifiers that detect scheming using only externally observable inputs and outputs, optimized on synthetic data generated from natural-language behavior specifications. We introduce two pipelines for generating synthetic agent trajectories, STRIDE (iterative refinement) and Gloom (agent-environment simulation), from which we generate 1,000 samples each. We optimize frontier LLM monitors on these datasets via prompt sweeps, human refinement, and automated prompt optimization, and evaluate performance on 7,500 held-out trajectories from ControlArena, a suite of grounded environments where agents operate in more realistic contexts. Our results demonstrate that monitors selected purely on synthetic data can generalize to more realistic environments, capturing a meaningful scheming signal. However, we find that performance saturates quickly in our setting, with simple prompt sweeps matching the results of more extensive optimization. Pushing beyond this limit yields no further improvements and instead leads to overfitting.

AI.tldr: 研究基于LLM的宪法黑盒监控器，通过合成数据训练检测AI代理的阴谋行为，在现实环境中验证了泛化能力但性能很快饱和
AI.motivation: 在自主环境中安全部署LLM代理需要可靠的监督机制，核心挑战是检测代理暗中追求未对齐目标的阴谋行为
AI.method: 提出宪法黑盒监控器（仅使用外部可观察输入输出的提示分类器），开发STRIDE（迭代精炼）和Gloom（代理环境模拟）两种合成轨迹生成管道，通过提示扫描、人工精炼和自动提示优化在合成数据上优化监控器
AI.result: 纯合成数据训练的监控器能在现实环境中泛化并捕获有意义的阴谋信号，但性能很快饱和，简单提示扫描与更复杂优化效果相当，进一步优化会导致过拟合
AI.conclusion: 基于合成数据的监控器在检测阴谋行为方面具有实用价值，但存在性能上限，需要更复杂的方法来突破当前限制

title: Quantifying Catastrophic Forgetting in IoT Intrusion Detection Systems
summary: Distribution shifts in attack patterns within RPL-based IoT networks pose a critical threat to the reliability and security of large-scale connected systems. Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) trained on static datasets often fail to generalize to unseen threats and suffer from catastrophic forgetting when updated with new attacks. Ensuring continual adaptability of IDS is therefore essential for maintaining robust IoT network defence. In this focused study, we formulate intrusion detection as a domain continual learning problem and propose a method-agnostic IDS framework that can integrate diverse continual learning strategies. We systematically benchmark five representative approaches across multiple domain-ordering sequences using a comprehensive multi-attack dataset comprising 48 domains. Results show that continual learning mitigates catastrophic forgetting while maintaining a balance between plasticity, stability, and efficiency, a crucial aspect for resource-constrained IoT environments. Among the methods, Replay-based approaches achieve the best overall performance, while Synaptic Intelligence (SI) delivers near-zero forgetting with high training efficiency, demonstrating strong potential for stable and sustainable IDS deployment in dynamic IoT networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个方法无关的入侵检测系统框架，将RPL物联网网络入侵检测建模为领域持续学习问题，系统评估了五种持续学习方法在48个攻击领域上的表现。
AI.motivation: RPL物联网网络中攻击模式的分布变化对大规模连接系统的可靠性和安全性构成严重威胁。基于静态数据集训练的入侵检测系统难以泛化到未见威胁，且在更新新攻击时会出现灾难性遗忘。因此，确保入侵检测系统的持续适应性对于维护物联网网络防御至关重要。
AI.method: 将入侵检测建模为领域持续学习问题，提出一个方法无关的入侵检测系统框架，可以集成多种持续学习策略。系统评估了五种代表性方法（包括基于重放的方法和突触智能SI等）在多个领域排序序列上的表现，使用包含48个领域的综合多攻击数据集进行基准测试。
AI.result: 持续学习有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，同时在可塑性、稳定性和效率之间保持了平衡，这对资源受限的物联网环境至关重要。基于重放的方法获得了最佳整体性能，而突触智能（SI）实现了接近零的遗忘率和高训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 突触智能（SI）在动态物联网网络中展示了稳定和可持续入侵检测系统部署的强大潜力，实现了高训练效率和接近零的遗忘率，为资源受限环境提供了有效的解决方案。

title: BioProAgent: Neuro-Symbolic Grounding for Constrained Scientific Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant reasoning capabilities in scientific discovery but struggle to bridge the gap to physical execution in wet-labs. In these irreversible environments, probabilistic hallucinations are not merely incorrect, but also cause equipment damage or experimental failure. To address this, we propose \textbf{BioProAgent}, a neuro-symbolic framework that anchors probabilistic planning in a deterministic Finite State Machine (FSM). We introduce a State-Augmented Planning mechanism that enforces a rigorous \textit{Design-Verify-Rectify} workflow, ensuring hardware compliance before execution. Furthermore, we address the context bottleneck inherent in complex device schemas by \textit{Semantic Symbol Grounding}, reducing token consumption by $\sim$6$\times$ through symbolic abstraction. In the extended BioProBench benchmark, BioProAgent achieves 95.6\% physical compliance (compared to 21.0\% for ReAct), demonstrating that neuro-symbolic constraints are essential for reliable autonomy in irreversible physical environments. \footnote{Code at https://github.com/YuyangSunshine/bioproagent and project at https://yuyangsunshine.github.io/BioPro-Project/}

AI.tldr: BioProAgent是一个神经符号框架，通过确定性有限状态机锚定概率规划，确保湿实验室环境中的物理合规性和安全性
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在科学发现中展现出推理能力，但在湿实验室等不可逆物理环境中存在概率性幻觉问题，可能导致设备损坏或实验失败，需要确保物理合规性
AI.method: 提出神经符号框架BioProAgent，采用状态增强规划机制强制执行"设计-验证-修正"工作流，通过语义符号接地减少复杂设备模式的上下文瓶颈
AI.result: 在扩展的BioProBench基准测试中，BioProAgent达到95.6%的物理合规性（相比ReAct的21.0%），通过符号抽象减少约6倍的token消耗
AI.conclusion: 神经符号约束对于不可逆物理环境中的可靠自主性至关重要，BioProAgent框架有效解决了LLM在湿实验室执行中的安全性和合规性问题

title: A Novel Evolutionary Method for Automated Skull-Face Overlay in Computer-Aided Craniofacial Superimposition
summary: Craniofacial Superimposition is a forensic technique for identifying skeletal remains by comparing a post-mortem skull with ante-mortem facial photographs. A critical step in this process is Skull-Face Overlay (SFO). This stage involves aligning a 3D skull model with a 2D facial image, typically guided by cranial and facial landmarks' correspondence. However, its accuracy is undermined by individual variability in soft-tissue thickness, introducing significant uncertainty into the overlay. This paper introduces Lilium, an automated evolutionary method to enhance the accuracy and robustness of SFO. Lilium explicitly models soft-tissue variability using a 3D cone-based representation whose parameters are optimized via a Differential Evolution algorithm. The method enforces anatomical, morphological, and photographic plausibility through a combination of constraints: landmark matching, camera parameter consistency, head pose alignment, skull containment within facial boundaries, and region parallelism. This emulation of the usual forensic practitioners' approach leads Lilium to outperform the state-of-the-art method in terms of both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: Lilium是一种基于进化算法的自动颅面叠加方法，通过显式建模软组织变异性和多约束优化，提高颅骨-面部叠加的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 颅面叠加是法医识别骨骼遗骸的关键技术，但传统方法受软组织厚度个体差异影响，导致叠加准确性不足。现有方法未能充分建模这种不确定性。
AI.method: 提出Lilium方法：使用基于3D锥体的表示显式建模软组织变异性，通过差分进化算法优化参数，结合地标匹配、相机参数一致性、头部姿态对齐、颅骨包含在面部边界内和区域平行性等多重约束。
AI.result: Lilium在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于现有最先进方法，能够更好地模拟法医专家的操作流程。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模软组织变异性和多约束优化，Lilium提供了一种更准确、更鲁棒的自动颅面叠加方法，有望改进法医鉴定实践。

title: Learning Nested Named Entity Recognition from Flat Annotations
comment: Accepted at EACL 2026, 15 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables
summary: Nested named entity recognition identifies entities contained within other entities, but requires expensive multi-level annotation. While flat NER corpora exist abundantly, nested resources remain scarce. We investigate whether models can learn nested structure from flat annotations alone, evaluating four approaches: string inclusions (substring matching), entity corruption (pseudo-nested data), flat neutralization (reducing false negative signal), and a hybrid fine-tuned + LLM pipeline. On NEREL, a Russian benchmark with 29 entity types where 21% of entities are nested, our best combined method achieves 26.37% inner F1, closing 40% of the gap to full nested supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/fulstock/Learning-from-Flat-Annotations.

AI.tldr: 研究如何仅使用平面标注学习嵌套命名实体识别，通过四种方法在俄语NEREL基准上达到26.37%的内部F1分数，填补了40%的全监督差距
AI.motivation: 嵌套命名实体识别需要昂贵的多级标注，而平面NER语料库丰富但嵌套资源稀缺。研究是否可以从平面标注中学习嵌套结构
AI.method: 提出四种方法：字符串包含（子串匹配）、实体破坏（伪嵌套数据）、平面中性化（减少假阴性信号）以及混合微调+LLM流水线
AI.result: 在俄语NEREL基准（29个实体类型，21%实体嵌套）上，最佳组合方法达到26.37%内部F1分数，填补了40%的全监督差距
AI.conclusion: 仅使用平面标注可以学习到部分嵌套结构，为资源稀缺的嵌套NER提供了实用解决方案，代码已开源

title: Deep Learning-Based Meat Freshness Detection with Segmentation and OOD-Aware Classification
summary: In this study, we present a meat freshness classification framework from Red-Green-Blue (RGB) images that supports both packaged and unpackaged meat datasets. The system classifies four in-distribution (ID) meat classes and uses an out-of-distribution (OOD)-aware abstention mechanism that flags low-confidence samples as No Result. The pipeline combines U-Net-based segmentation with deep feature classifiers. Segmentation is used as a preprocessing step to isolate the meat region and reduce background, producing more consistent inputs for classification. The segmentation module achieved an Intersection over Union (IoU) of 75% and a Dice coefficient of 82%, producing standardized inputs for the classification stage. For classification, we benchmark five backbones: Residual Network-50 (ResNet-50), Vision Transformer-Base/16 (ViT-B/16), Swin Transformer-Tiny (Swin-T), EfficientNet-B0, and MobileNetV3-Small. We use nested 5x3 cross-validation (CV) for model selection and hyperparameter tuning. On the held-out ID test set, EfficientNet-B0 achieves the highest accuracy (98.10%), followed by ResNet-50 and MobileNetV3-Small (both 97.63%) and Swin-T (97.51%), while ViT-B/16 is lower (94.42%). We additionally evaluate OOD scoring and thresholding using standard OOD metrics and sensitivity analysis over the abstention threshold. Finally, we report on-device latency using TensorFlow Lite (TFLite) on a smartphone, highlighting practical accuracy-latency trade-offs for future deployment.

AI.tldr: 基于RGB图像的肉类新鲜度分类框架，支持包装和未包装肉类数据集，结合分割预处理和深度学习分类器，采用OOD感知弃权机制处理低置信度样本
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够同时处理包装和未包装肉类的新鲜度分类系统，通过分割预处理减少背景干扰，提高分类一致性，并引入OOD感知机制处理不确定样本
AI.method: 使用U-Net进行分割预处理隔离肉类区域，然后采用五种骨干网络（ResNet-50、ViT-B/16、Swin-T、EfficientNet-B0、MobileNetV3-Small）进行特征分类，使用嵌套5×3交叉验证进行模型选择和超参数调优
AI.result: 分割模块IoU达到75%，Dice系数82%；分类任务中EfficientNet-B0在ID测试集上准确率最高（98.10%），其他模型准确率在94.42%-97.63%之间；评估了OOD评分和阈值设置，并报告了智能手机上的TFLite延迟性能
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了肉类新鲜度分类，分割预处理提高了分类一致性，EfficientNet-B0表现最佳，OOD感知机制增强了系统鲁棒性，为实际部署提供了准确性和延迟的权衡分析

title: HiMAC: Hierarchical Macro-Micro Learning for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in interactive decision-making, yet they remain fundamentally limited in long-horizon tasks that require structured planning and reliable execution. Existing approaches predominantly rely on flat autoregressive policies, where high-level reasoning and low-level actions are generated within a single token sequence, leading to inefficient exploration and severe error propagation over extended trajectories. In this work, we propose HiMAC, a hierarchical agentic RL framework that explicitly decomposes long-horizon decision-making into macro-level planning and micro-level execution. HiMAC models reasoning as a structured blueprint generation process followed by goal-conditioned action execution, enabling robust long-horizon planning within LLM-based agents. To train this hierarchy efficiently, we introduce a critic-free hierarchical policy optimization paradigm that extends group-based reinforcement learning to bi-level structures through hierarchical relative advantage estimation. Furthermore, we propose an iterative co-evolution training strategy that alternates between planner exploration and executor adaptation, mitigating the non-stationarity inherent in hierarchical learning. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Sokoban demonstrate that HiMAC consistently outperforms strong prompting and reinforcement learning baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance and substantially improved sample efficiency across both text-based and visually grounded environments. Our results show that introducing structured hierarchy, rather than increasing model scale alone, is a key factor for enabling robust long-horizon agentic intelligence.

AI.tldr: HiMAC是一个分层强化学习框架，将长时程决策分解为宏观规划和微观执行，通过分层策略优化和协同进化训练，显著提升LLM智能体在长时程任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在长时程任务中存在局限性，主要依赖扁平的自回归策略，将高层推理和低层动作混合在单一token序列中，导致探索效率低下和错误传播严重。
AI.method: 提出HiMAC分层框架：1) 将决策分解为蓝图生成和条件动作执行；2) 引入无评论家的分层策略优化，通过分层相对优势估计扩展基于组的强化学习；3) 采用迭代协同进化训练策略，交替进行规划器探索和执行器适应。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Sokoban上的实验表明，HiMAC持续优于强提示和强化学习基线，实现最先进性能，在文本和视觉环境中都显著提高了样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 引入结构化分层而非单纯增加模型规模，是实现鲁棒长时程智能体智能的关键因素，HiMAC框架为LLM智能体的长时程决策提供了有效解决方案。

title: AdaFocus: Knowing When and Where to Look for Adaptive Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are shifting towards "Thinking with Images" by actively exploring image details. While effective, large-scale training is computationally expensive, which has spurred growing interest in lightweight, training-free solutions. However, existing training-free methods suffer from two flaws: perceptual redundancy from indiscriminate cropping, which adds overhead and noise; and a drift between semantic intent and spatial attention, which prevents accurate localization of user-focused regions. To address these challenges, we propose AdaFocus, a novel training-free framework designed for adaptive visual reasoning. AdaFocus follows a two-stage pipeline: a confidence-based module decides when to crop, and a semantic-guided localization module determines where to crop. This enables adaptive visual reasoning without additional training. Experimentally, AdaFocus delivers substantial performance gains while achieving approximately 4.0\times speedup inference speedup than the SOTA method ZoomEyes, representing a significant advance in both accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: AdaFocus是一个无需训练的自适应视觉推理框架，通过置信度决定何时裁剪和语义引导定位决定何处裁剪，解决了现有方法中的感知冗余和语义-空间注意力漂移问题，在提升性能的同时实现了4倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型正转向"用图像思考"模式，但大规模训练计算成本高昂。现有的无需训练方法存在两个缺陷：1) 无差别裁剪导致的感知冗余，增加了计算开销和噪声；2) 语义意图与空间注意力之间的漂移，导致无法准确定位用户关注的区域。
AI.method: AdaFollow采用两阶段流程：1) 置信度模块决定何时进行裁剪；2) 语义引导定位模块决定何处进行裁剪。这种自适应视觉推理框架无需额外训练。
AI.result: AdaFocus在性能上取得显著提升，同时相比当前最先进方法ZoomEyes实现了约4倍的推理加速，在准确性和效率方面都取得了重要进展。
AI.conclusion: AdaFocus通过自适应裁剪策略有效解决了现有无需训练方法中的感知冗余和语义-空间注意力漂移问题，为轻量级、高效的视觉推理提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: MedGPT-oss: Training a General-Purpose Vision-Language Model for Biomedicine
summary: Biomedical multimodal assistants have the potential to unify radiology, pathology, and clinical-text reasoning, yet a critical deployment gap remains: top-performing systems are either closed-source or computationally prohibitive, precluding the on-premises deployment required for patient privacy and PHI compliance. We introduce MEDGPT-OSS, an open-weight, 20B-parameter generalist vision-language model designed to facilitate open research in clinical AI. Rather than relying on architectural complexity, MEDGPT-OSS pairs the GPT-oss language backbone with a visual front-end via a optimized, three-stage training curriculum. By progressively domain-adapting these modules through rigorous data curation and long-context multimodal alignment, we demonstrate that a 20B model can bridge the capacity gap. It successfully outperforms larger open medical models on out-of-distribution (OOD) multimodal reasoning and complex text-only clinical tasks. By unifying diverse modalities under a single instruction-following interface, MEDGPT-OSS maintains a parameter-efficient footprint fully compatible with commodity GPUs. We release the complete training recipe, open-weight checkpoints, and a rigorous evaluation harness to serve as a verifiable foundation for privacy-preserving, institution-specific clinical AI research.

AI.tldr: MEDGPT-OSS是一个开源的20B参数多模态医疗AI模型，通过优化的三阶段训练课程，在保持参数效率的同时，在医疗多模态推理和复杂文本任务上超越更大的开源医疗模型。
AI.motivation: 当前顶级医疗多模态助手要么闭源，要么计算成本过高，无法满足患者隐私和PHI合规要求的本地部署需求。需要开源、参数高效且能在普通GPU上运行的模型来推动临床AI研究。
AI.method: 采用GPT-oss语言主干，通过视觉前端连接，使用优化的三阶段训练课程：逐步领域适应模块，通过严格数据筛选和长上下文多模态对齐，实现参数高效的多模态统一。
AI.result: 20B参数的MEDGPT-OSS在分布外多模态推理和复杂纯文本临床任务上超越了更大的开源医疗模型，同时保持参数效率，完全兼容普通GPU。
AI.conclusion: MEDGPT-OSS为隐私保护、机构特定的临床AI研究提供了可验证的基础，通过开源训练方案、权重和评估工具，推动医疗多模态助手的开放研究。

title: Improving Full Waveform Inversion in Large Model Era
summary: Full Waveform Inversion (FWI) is a highly nonlinear and ill-posed problem that aims to recover subsurface velocity maps from surface-recorded seismic waveforms data. Existing data-driven FWI typically uses small models, as available datasets have limited volume, geological diversity, and spatial extent, leading to substantial concerns about overfitting. Although they perform well on synthetic datasets, current methods fail to generalize to more realistic geological structures. In this work, we show that a model trained entirely on simulated and relatively simple data can generalize remarkably well to challenging and unseen geological benchmarks. We provide a working recipe that tames a billion-parameter model for FWI through coordinated scaling across three axes: model capacity, data diversity, and training strategy. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on OpenFWI and significantly narrows the generalization gap in data-driven FWI. Across six challenging geophysical benchmarks, including Marmousi, 2D SEG/EAGE Salt and Overthrust, 2004 BP, Sigsbee, and SEAM Phase I, it infers complex structures absent from the training set and delivers significant performance improvements (SSIM from 0.5844 to 0.7669). Overall, our results demonstrate that with an appropriate scaling strategy, large models trained on simple synthetic data can achieve substantial generalization to more complex and realistic geological structures.

AI.tldr: 通过协调扩展模型容量、数据多样性和训练策略，训练在简单合成数据上的十亿参数模型能够显著泛化到复杂真实地质结构，在多个基准测试中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的全波形反演方法通常使用小模型，由于数据集有限（体积小、地质多样性不足、空间范围有限），存在严重的过拟合问题。虽然这些方法在合成数据集上表现良好，但无法泛化到更真实的地质结构。
AI.method: 提出一个工作配方，通过协调扩展三个轴来驯服用于FWI的十亿参数模型：模型容量、数据多样性和训练策略。模型完全在模拟且相对简单的数据上进行训练。
AI.result: 模型在OpenFWI上达到最先进性能，显著缩小了数据驱动FWI的泛化差距。在六个具有挑战性的地球物理基准测试中，能够推断训练集中不存在的复杂结构，SSIM从0.5844提升到0.7669。
AI.conclusion: 通过适当的扩展策略，在简单合成数据上训练的大型模型能够实现对更复杂和真实地质结构的显著泛化，为数据驱动的全波形反演提供了新的可能性。

title: Tracking Capabilities for Safer Agents
summary: AI agents that interact with the real world through tool calls pose fundamental safety challenges: agents might leak private information, cause unintended side effects, or be manipulated through prompt injection. To address these challenges, we propose to put the agent in a programming-language-based "safety harness": instead of calling tools directly, agents express their intentions as code in a capability-safe language: Scala 3 with capture checking. Capabilities are program variables that regulate access to effects and resources of interest. Scala's type system tracks capabilities statically, providing fine-grained control over what an agent can do. In particular, it enables local purity, the ability to enforce that sub-computations are side-effect-free, preventing information leakage when agents process classified data. We demonstrate that extensible agent safety harnesses can be built by leveraging a strong type system with tracked capabilities. Our experiments show that agents can generate capability-safe code with no significant loss in task performance, while the type system reliably prevents unsafe behaviors such as information leakage and malicious side effects.

AI.tldr: 提出基于编程语言的安全约束框架，让AI代理通过Scala 3的类型系统表达意图而非直接调用工具，防止信息泄露和恶意副作用
AI.motivation: AI代理通过工具调用与现实世界交互时存在安全挑战：可能泄露隐私信息、造成意外副作用或被提示注入攻击操纵
AI.method: 将代理置于基于编程语言的"安全约束"中：代理用Scala 3（带捕获检查）表达意图作为代码，利用类型系统静态跟踪能力，实现细粒度控制和局部纯度
AI.result: 实验表明代理能生成能力安全代码且任务性能无显著损失，类型系统能可靠防止不安全行为如信息泄露和恶意副作用
AI.conclusion: 通过利用具有跟踪能力的强类型系统，可以构建可扩展的代理安全约束框架，有效解决AI代理的安全挑战

title: Summer-22B: A Systematic Approach to Dataset Engineering and Training at Scale for Video Foundation Model
summary: We describe our experience training Summer-22B, a video foundation model developed from scratch. This report documents the engineering challenges, design decisions, and lessons learned while scaling from raw footage collection to a functional model trained on approximately 50 million clips. We outline our approach combining metadata-driven dataset curation, multi-stage filtering, $μ$P parameterization, and hypersphere-constrained optimization. We developed the Lavender Data system for dataset management and adopted inference-aware architectural choices. We share observations on what worked in our setting: dataset engineering consumed the majority of effort, architectural variants showed smaller differences than we expected, and $μ$P hyperparameter transfer appeared effective even under geometric constraints. We hope this account proves useful to others undertaking similar projects.

AI.tldr: Summer-22B是一个从头开始训练的视频基础模型，使用约5000万视频片段，报告分享了工程挑战、设计决策和经验教训。
AI.motivation: 开发一个从头开始训练的视频基础模型，分享在从原始素材收集到功能模型训练全过程中的工程经验，为类似项目提供参考。
AI.method: 采用元数据驱动的数据集管理、多阶段过滤、μP参数化、超球约束优化；开发Lavender Data系统进行数据集管理，采用推理感知的架构选择。
AI.result: 成功训练了Summer-22B模型；发现数据集工程消耗了大部分精力，架构变体差异比预期小，μP超参数转移在几何约束下仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 视频基础模型开发中数据集工程至关重要，架构选择影响相对较小，μP参数化方法具有实用性，希望这些经验对类似项目有帮助。

title: CHIMERA: Compact Synthetic Data for Generalizable LLM Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently exhibited remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely enabled by supervised fine-tuning (SFT)- and reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training on high-quality reasoning data. However, reproducing and extending these capabilities in open and scalable settings is hindered by three fundamental data-centric challenges: (1) the cold-start problem, arising from the lack of seed datasets with detailed, long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories needed to initialize reasoning policies; (2) limited domain coverage, as most existing open-source reasoning datasets are concentrated in mathematics, with limited coverage of broader scientific disciplines; and (3) the annotation bottleneck, where the difficulty of frontier-level reasoning tasks makes reliable human annotation prohibitively expensive or infeasible. To address these challenges, we introduce CHIMERA, a compact synthetic reasoning dataset comprising 9K samples for generalizable cross-domain reasoning. CHIMERA is constructed with three key properties: (1) it provides rich, long CoT reasoning trajectories synthesized by state-of-the-art reasoning models; (2) it has broad and structured coverage, spanning 8 major scientific disciplines and over 1K fine-grained topics organized via a model-generated hierarchical taxonomy; and (3) it employs a fully automated, scalable evaluation pipeline that uses strong reasoning models to cross-validate both problem validity and answer correctness. We use CHIMERA to post-train a 4B Qwen3 model. Despite the dataset's modest size, the resulting model achieves strong performance on a suite of challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, AIME 24/25/26, HMMT 25, and Humanity's Last Exam, approaching or matching the reasoning performance of substantially larger models such as DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-235B.

AI.tldr: CHIMERA是一个紧凑的合成推理数据集，解决LLM推理能力扩展中的三个数据挑战：冷启动问题、领域覆盖有限和标注瓶颈，通过9K样本实现跨领域泛化推理。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM推理能力的扩展面临三个核心数据挑战：1) 缺乏详细长链思维轨迹的种子数据集（冷启动问题）；2) 现有开源推理数据集主要集中在数学领域，其他科学领域覆盖有限；3) 前沿推理任务的人工标注成本过高或不可行。这些挑战阻碍了开放和可扩展环境下推理能力的复制和扩展。
AI.method: 提出CHIMERA数据集，具有三个关键特性：1) 由最先进推理模型合成的丰富长链思维轨迹；2) 覆盖8个主要科学领域和1000+细粒度主题，通过模型生成的层次分类法组织；3) 使用完全自动化的可扩展评估管道，通过强推理模型交叉验证问题有效性和答案正确性。
AI.result: 使用CHIMERA对4B参数的Qwen3模型进行后训练，尽管数据集规模不大，但得到的模型在多个挑战性推理基准测试（GPQA-Diamond、AIME 24/25/26、HMMT 25、Humanity's Last Exam）上表现优异，接近或匹配DeepSeek-R1和Qwen3-235B等更大模型的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: CHIMERA通过合成数据方法有效解决了LLM推理能力扩展中的数据挑战，证明了紧凑但高质量的数据集能够显著提升较小模型的推理能力，为开放和可扩展的推理研究提供了可行路径。

title: Hereditary Geometric Meta-RL: Nonlocal Generalization via Task Symmetries
summary: Meta-Reinforcement Learning (Meta-RL) commonly generalizes via smoothness in the task encoding. While this enables local generalization around each training task, it requires dense coverage of the task space and leaves richer task space structure untapped. In response, we develop a geometric perspective that endows the task space with a "hereditary geometry" induced by the inherent symmetries of the underlying system. Concretely, the agent reuses a policy learned at the train time by transforming states and actions through actions of a Lie group. This converts Meta-RL into symmetry discovery rather than smooth extrapolation, enabling the agent to generalize to wider regions of the task space. We show that when the task space is inherited from the symmetries of the underlying system, the task space embeds into a subgroup of those symmetries whose actions are linearizable, connected, and compact--properties that enable efficient learning and inference at the test time. To learn these structures, we develop a differential symmetry discovery method. This collapses functional invariance constraints and thereby improves numerical stability and sample efficiency over functional approaches. Empirically, on a two-dimensional navigation task, our method efficiently recovers the ground-truth symmetry and generalizes across the entire task space, while a common baseline generalizes only near training tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于几何视角的元强化学习方法，通过发现系统内在的对称性来构建任务空间的遗传几何，从而实现更广泛的任务泛化，而非仅依赖任务编码的平滑性进行局部泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统元强化学习通过任务编码的平滑性进行泛化，这需要密集覆盖任务空间且无法充分利用任务空间的结构信息。作者希望开发一种能发现系统内在对称性的方法，实现更广泛的任务泛化。
AI.method: 提出几何视角，为任务空间赋予由底层系统对称性诱导的"遗传几何"。通过李群作用变换状态和动作来重用训练时学习的策略，将元强化学习转化为对称性发现问题。开发了微分对称性发现方法，通过塌缩函数不变性约束来提高数值稳定性和样本效率。
AI.result: 当任务空间继承自底层系统的对称性时，任务空间可嵌入到那些作用可线性化、连通且紧致的对称子群中，这些性质使得学习和推理更高效。在二维导航任务中，该方法能有效恢复真实对称性并在整个任务空间泛化，而基线方法仅在训练任务附近泛化。
AI.conclusion: 通过对称性发现而非平滑外推的元强化学习方法，能够利用任务空间的几何结构实现更广泛的任务泛化，该方法在数值稳定性和样本效率方面优于传统函数方法。

title: CollabEval: Enhancing LLM-as-a-Judge via Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized AI-generated content evaluation, with the LLM-as-a-Judge paradigm becoming increasingly popular. However, current single-LLM evaluation approaches face significant challenges, including inconsistent judgments and inherent biases from pre-training data. To address these limitations, we propose CollabEval, a novel multi-agent evaluation framework that implements a three-phase Collaborative Evaluation process: initial evaluation, multi-round discussion, and final judgment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on competitive debate or single-model evaluation, CollabEval emphasizes collaboration among multiple agents with strategic consensus checking for efficiency. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CollabEval consistently outperforms single-LLM approaches across multiple dimensions while maintaining robust performance even when individual models struggle. The framework provides comprehensive support for various evaluation criteria while ensuring efficiency through its collaborative design.

AI.tldr: CollabEval：一个多智能体协作评估框架，通过三阶段协作过程（初始评估、多轮讨论、最终判断）解决单LLM评估的不一致性和偏见问题，显著优于单LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于单LLM的评估方法存在判断不一致和预训练数据固有偏见等显著挑战，需要更可靠、一致的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出CollabEval多智能体评估框架，采用三阶段协作评估过程：初始评估、多轮讨论、最终判断，强调多智能体协作而非竞争性辩论，并通过战略共识检查确保效率。
AI.result: 实验表明CollabEval在多个维度上持续优于单LLM方法，即使在单个模型表现不佳时也能保持稳健性能，同时支持多种评估标准。
AI.conclusion: CollabEval通过多智能体协作设计有效解决了单LLM评估的局限性，提供了更可靠、一致的AI生成内容评估方案。

title: Infinite Self-Attention
summary: The quadratic cost of softmax attention limits Transformer scalability in high-resolution vision. We introduce Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA), a spectral reformulation that treats each attention layer as a diffusion step on a content-adaptive token graph, accumulating multi-hop interactions through a discounted Neumann series over attention matrices. This links self-attention to classical graph centrality (Katz, PageRank, eigenvector centrality) for interpretable token weighting. We also show the Neumann kernel equals the fundamental matrix of an absorbing Markov chain, so a token's centrality is its expected number of random-walk visits before absorption. We then propose Linear-InfSA, a linear-time variant that approximates the principal eigenvector of the implicit attention operator without forming the full attention matrix. It keeps an auxiliary state of fixed size proportional to per-head dimension dh (independent of sequence length N), is drop-in compatible with Vision Transformers, and supports stable training at 4096 by 4096 and inference at 9216 by 9216 (about 332k tokens). In a 4-layer ViT (53.5M parameters, 59 GFLOPs at 224 by 224), Linear-InfSA reaches 84.7% top-1 on ImageNet-1K, a +3.2 point architectural gain over an equal-depth softmax ViT trained with the same recipe. On ImageNet-V2, InfViT variants outperform all compared baselines (up to 79.8% vs 76.8%), indicating robustness under distribution shift. On an A100 40GB GPU, Linear-InfViT runs at 231 images/s and 0.87 J/image (13x better throughput and energy than equal-depth ViT) and is the only tested model to complete 9216 by 9216 inference without out-of-memory. The linear approximation closely matches the dominant eigenvector of the quadratic operator (cosine 0.985).

AI.tldr: 提出Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA)，一种将注意力层视为内容自适应token图上扩散步骤的谱重构方法，通过Neumann级数实现多跳交互，并推导出线性时间变体Linear-InfSA，在保持性能的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统softmax注意力的二次计算成本限制了Transformer在高分辨率视觉任务中的可扩展性，需要开发更高效的注意力机制。
AI.method: 将注意力层重构为内容自适应token图上的扩散步骤，通过Neumann级数累积多跳交互，并建立与图中心性度量的理论联系。提出Linear-InfSA，通过近似隐式注意力算子的主特征向量实现线性时间复杂度，保持固定大小的辅助状态。
AI.result: 在4层ViT上达到84.7%的ImageNet-1K top-1准确率，比同等深度softmax ViT提升3.2个百分点。Linear-InfViT在A100 GPU上达到231 images/s的吞吐量，比同等ViT提升13倍，并能处理9216×9216分辨率（约332k token）的推理任务。
AI.conclusion: InfSA通过谱重构将自注意力与图中心性理论联系起来，Linear-InfSA变体实现了线性时间复杂度和优异的内存效率，为高分辨率视觉Transformer提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: KVSlimmer: Theoretical Insights and Practical Optimizations for Asymmetric KV Merging
summary: The growing computational and memory demands of the Key-Value (KV) cache significantly limit the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs). While KV merging has emerged as a promising solution, existing methods that rely on empirical observations of KV asymmetry and gradient-based Hessian approximations lack a theoretical foundation and incur suboptimal compression and inference overhead. To bridge these gaps, we establish a theoretical framework that characterizes this asymmetry through the spectral energy distribution of projection weights, demonstrating that concentrated spectra in Query/Key weights induce feature homogeneity, whereas dispersed spectra in Value weights preserve heterogeneity. Then, we introduce KVSlimmer, an efficient algorithm that captures exact Hessian information through a mathematically exact formulation, and derives a closed-form solution utilizing only forward-pass variables, resulting in a gradient-free approach that is both memory- and time-efficient. Extensive experiments across various models and benchmarks demonstrate that KVSlimmer consistently outperforms SOTA methods. For instance, on Llama3.1-8B-Instruct, it improves the LongBench average score by 0.92 while reducing memory costs and latency by 29% and 28%, respectively.

AI.tldr: KVSlimmer：一种基于理论框架的高效KV缓存压缩方法，通过精确Hessian信息和闭式解实现梯度自由压缩，显著降低内存和延迟成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型中的KV缓存计算和内存需求巨大，限制了模型能力。现有KV合并方法缺乏理论基础，依赖经验观察和梯度近似，导致压缩效果和推理效率不理想。
AI.method: 建立理论框架分析投影权重谱能量分布，揭示Query/Key权重集中谱导致特征同质性，Value权重分散谱保持异质性。提出KVSlimmer算法，通过数学精确公式捕获精确Hessian信息，仅使用前向传播变量推导闭式解，实现梯度自由方法。
AI.result: 在各种模型和基准测试中，KVSlimmer始终优于最先进方法。例如在Llama3.1-8B-Instruct上，LongBench平均得分提高0.92，同时内存成本降低29%，延迟降低28%。
AI.conclusion: KVSlimmer通过理论指导的KV缓存压缩方法，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算和内存开销，为LLM高效推理提供了有效解决方案。

title: TENG-BC: Unified Time-Evolving Natural Gradient for Neural PDE Solvers with General Boundary Conditions
summary: Accurately solving time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs) with neural networks remains challenging due to long-time error accumulation and the difficulty of enforcing general boundary conditions. We introduce TENG-BC, a high-precision neural PDE solver based on the Time-Evolving Natural Gradient, designed to perform under general boundary constraints. At each time step, TENG-BC performs a boundary-aware optimization that jointly enforces interior dynamics and boundary conditions, accommodating Dirichlet, Neumann, Robin, and mixed types within a unified framework. This formulation admits a natural-gradient interpretation, enabling stable time evolution without delicate penalty tuning. Across benchmarks over diffusion, transport, and nonlinear PDEs with various boundary conditions, TENG-BC achieves solver-level accuracy under comparable sampling budgets, outperforming conventional solvers and physics-informed neural network (PINN) baselines.

AI.tldr: TENG-BC：基于时间演化自然梯度的高精度神经PDE求解器，通过边界感知优化统一处理多种边界条件，在扩散、输运和非线性PDE基准测试中达到求解器级精度。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络求解时间依赖PDE面临长期误差累积和一般边界条件难以强制执行的挑战，需要开发能稳定处理各种边界条件的高精度求解器。
AI.method: 提出TENG-BC方法，基于时间演化自然梯度，在每个时间步进行边界感知优化，联合强制内部动力学和边界条件，统一处理Dirichlet、Neumann、Robin和混合边界条件。
AI.result: 在扩散、输运和非线性PDE的各种边界条件基准测试中，TENG-BC在可比采样预算下达到求解器级精度，优于传统求解器和PINN基线。
AI.conclusion: TENG-BC通过边界感知的自然梯度优化，成功解决了神经PDE求解中的长期误差累积和边界条件强制执行难题，为高精度PDE求解提供了统一框架。

title: MMCOMET: A Large-Scale Multimodal Commonsense Knowledge Graph for Contextual Reasoning
summary: We present MMCOMET, the first multimodal commonsense knowledge graph (MMKG) that integrates physical, social, and eventive knowledge. MMCOMET extends the ATOMIC2020 knowledge graph to include a visual dimension, through an efficient image retrieval process, resulting in over 900K multimodal triples. This new resource addresses a major limitation of existing MMKGs in supporting complex reasoning tasks like image captioning and storytelling. Through a standard visual storytelling experiment, we show that our holistic approach enables the generation of richer, coherent, and contextually grounded stories than those produced using text-only knowledge. This resource establishes a new foundation for multimodal commonsense reasoning and narrative generation.

AI.tldr: MMCOMET是首个整合物理、社会和事件知识的多模态常识知识图谱，通过图像检索扩展ATOMIC2020，包含90万+多模态三元组，显著提升图像描述和故事生成等复杂推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有MMKGs在支持图像描述和故事生成等复杂推理任务方面存在局限，需要整合视觉维度来增强常识推理能力。
AI.method: 扩展ATOMIC2020知识图谱，通过高效的图像检索过程添加视觉维度，构建包含90万+多模态三元组的MMCOMET知识图谱。
AI.result: 通过视觉故事生成实验证明，该方法能生成比纯文本知识更丰富、连贯且上下文基础更好的故事。
AI.conclusion: MMCOMET为多模态常识推理和叙事生成建立了新的基础，解决了现有MMKGs的局限性。

title: Zero-Shot and Supervised Bird Image Segmentation Using Foundation Models: A Dual-Pipeline Approach with Grounding DINO~1.5, YOLOv11, and SAM~2.1
summary: Bird image segmentation remains a challenging task in computer vision due to extreme pose diversity, complex plumage patterns, and variable lighting conditions. This paper presents a dual-pipeline framework for binary bird image segmentation leveraging 2025 foundation models. We introduce two operating modes built upon Segment Anything Model 2.1 (SAM 2.1) as a shared frozen backbone: (1) a zero-shot pipeline using Grounding DINO 1.5 to detect birds via the text prompt "bird" before prompting SAM 2.1 with bounding boxes requiring no labelled bird data; and (2) a supervised pipeline that fine-tunes YOLOv11 on the CUB-200-2011 dataset for high-precision detection, again prompting SAM 2.1 for pixel-level masks. The segmentation model is never retrained for new species or domains. On CUB-200-2011 (11,788 images, 200 species), the supervised pipeline achieves IoU 0.912, Dice 0.954, and F1 0.953 outperforming all prior baselines including SegFormer-B2 (IoU 0.842) by +7.0 percentage points. The zero-shot pipeline achieves IoU 0.831 using only a text prompt, the first such result reported on this benchmark. We demonstrate that prompt-based foundation model pipelines outperform task specific end-to-end trained segmentation networks, while requiring only lightweight detector fine-tuning (~1 hour) for domain adaptation. Complete PyTorch implementation, dataset preparation scripts, and trained weights are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出基于SAM 2.1的双管道鸟类图像分割框架，包含零样本和监督两种模式，在CUB-200-2011数据集上取得SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 鸟类图像分割面临姿态多样性大、羽毛图案复杂、光照条件多变等挑战，传统方法难以处理。本文旨在利用2025年基础模型构建更高效的分割框架
AI.method: 使用SAM 2.1作为共享冻结骨干网络，构建两种管道：1) 零样本管道：用Grounding DINO 1.5通过文本提示"bird"检测鸟类，再用边界框提示SAM 2.1；2) 监督管道：在CUB-200-2011数据集上微调YOLOv11进行高精度检测，再用SAM 2.1生成像素级掩码
AI.result: 监督管道在CUB-200-2011数据集上达到IoU 0.912、Dice 0.954、F1 0.953，比SegFormer-B2提升7.0个百分点；零样本管道仅用文本提示达到IoU 0.831，是该基准上首次报告的结果
AI.conclusion: 基于提示的基础模型管道优于特定任务端到端训练的分割网络，仅需轻量级检测器微调即可实现领域适应，为鸟类图像分割提供了高效解决方案

title: Prompt Sensitivity and Answer Consistency of Small Open-Source Large Language Models on Clinical Question Answering: Implications for Low-Resource Healthcare Deployment
summary:
Small open-source language models are gaining attention for low-resource healthcare settings, but their reliability under different prompt phrasings remains poorly understood. We evaluated five open-source models (Gemma 2 2B, Phi-3 Mini 3.8B, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B, and Meditron-7B domain-pretrained without instruction tuning) across three clinical QA datasets (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA) using five prompt styles (original, formal, simplified, roleplay, direct). We measured consistency scores, accuracy, and instruction-following failure rates. All inference ran locally on consumer CPU hardware without fine-tuning.
  Consistency and accuracy were largely independent. Gemma 2 achieved the highest consistency (0.845-0.888) but lowest accuracy (33.0-43.5%), while Llama 3.2 showed moderate consistency (0.774-0.807) with the highest accuracy (49.0-65.0%). Roleplay prompts consistently reduced accuracy across all models, with Phi-3 Mini dropping 21.5 percentage points on MedQA. Meditron-7B exhibited near-complete instruction-following failure on PubMedQA (99.0% UNKNOWN rate), showing domain pretraining alone is insufficient for structured clinical QA.
  High consistency does not imply correctness. Models can be reliably wrong, a dangerous failure mode in clinical AI. Roleplay prompts should be avoided in healthcare applications. Llama 3.2 showed the strongest balance of accuracy and reliability for low-resource deployment. Safe clinical AI requires joint evaluation of consistency, accuracy, and instruction adherence.

AI.tldr: 评估开源小语言模型在临床问答任务中的提示一致性、准确性和指令遵循能力，发现高一致性不等于正确性，角色扮演提示会显著降低准确性，Llama 3.2在准确性和可靠性方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 开源小语言模型在低资源医疗环境中受到关注，但其在不同提示表述下的可靠性尚不清楚。需要评估这些模型在临床问答任务中的一致性、准确性和指令遵循能力，以确定其在医疗应用中的适用性和安全性。
