title: GraphScout: Empowering Large Language Models with Intrinsic Exploration Ability for Agentic Graph Reasoning
summary: Knowledge graphs provide structured and reliable information for many real-world applications, motivating increasing interest in combining large language models (LLMs) with graph-based retrieval to improve factual grounding. Recent Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) methods therefore introduce iterative interaction between LLMs and knowledge graphs to enhance reasoning capability. However, existing approaches typically depend on manually designed guidance and interact with knowledge graphs through a limited set of predefined tools, which substantially constrains graph exploration. To address these limitations, we propose GraphScout, a training-centric agentic graph reasoning framework equipped with more flexible graph exploration tools. GraphScout enables models to autonomously interact with knowledge graphs to synthesize structured training data which are then used to post-train LLMs, thereby internalizing agentic graph reasoning ability without laborious manual annotation or task curation. Extensive experiments across five knowledge-graph domains show that a small model (e.g., Qwen3-4B) augmented with GraphScout outperforms baseline methods built on leading LLMs (e.g., Qwen-Max) by an average of 16.7\% while requiring significantly fewer inference tokens. Moreover, GraphScout exhibits robust cross-domain transfer performance. Our code will be made publicly available~\footnote{https://github.com/Ying-Yuchen/_GraphScout_}.

AI.tldr: GraphScout：一种训练中心化的智能图推理框架，通过自主与知识图谱交互生成训练数据，使小模型在知识图谱问答任务上超越大模型基线
AI.motivation: 现有GraphRAG方法依赖人工设计的指导和有限的预定义工具，严重限制了图探索能力，需要更灵活的图探索工具和自主推理能力
AI.method: 提出GraphScout框架，配备灵活的图探索工具，使模型能自主与知识图谱交互合成结构化训练数据，然后用于后训练LLMs，内化智能图推理能力
AI.result: 在五个知识图谱领域的实验中，使用GraphScout增强的小模型（如Qwen3-4B）平均超越基于领先LLMs的基线方法16.7%，同时需要显著更少的推理token，并展现出强大的跨领域迁移性能
AI.conclusion: GraphScout通过自主图探索和训练数据合成，有效解决了现有GraphRAG方法的局限性，使小模型能够内化智能图推理能力，在性能和效率上都超越了传统方法

title: An Interpretable Local Editing Model for Counterfactual Medical Image Generation
summary: Counterfactual medical image generation have emerged as a critical tool for enhancing AI-driven systems in medical domain by answering "what-if" questions. However, existing approaches face two fundamental limitations: First, they fail to prevent unintended modifications, resulting collateral changes in demographic attributes when only disease features should be affected. Second, they lack interpretability in their editing process, which significantly limits their utility in real-world medical applications. To address these limitations, we present InstructX2X, a novel interpretable local editing model for counterfactual medical image generation featuring Region-Specific Editing. This approach restricts modifications to specific regions, effectively preventing unintended changes while simultaneously providing a Guidance Map that offers inherently interpretable visual explanations of the editing process. Additionally, we introduce MIMIC-EDIT-INSTRUCTION, a dataset for counterfactual medical image generation derived from expert-verified medical VQA pairs. Through extensive experiments, InstructX2X achieve state-of-the-art performance across all major evaluation metrics. Our model successfully generates high-quality counterfactual chest X-ray images along with interpretable explanations.

AI.tldr: InstructX2X：一种用于反事实医学图像生成的新型可解释局部编辑模型，通过区域特定编辑防止意外修改并提供可视化解释
AI.motivation: 现有反事实医学图像生成方法存在两个根本限制：1) 无法防止意外修改，在只应影响疾病特征时会导致人口统计属性的附带变化；2) 编辑过程缺乏可解释性，限制了在实际医疗应用中的实用性
AI.method: 提出InstructX2X模型，采用区域特定编辑方法，将修改限制在特定区域，防止意外变化，同时提供指导图作为编辑过程的可视化解释。还创建了MIMIC-EDIT-INSTRUCTION数据集，基于专家验证的医学VQA对
AI.result: InstructX2X在所有主要评估指标上实现了最先进的性能，成功生成高质量的反事实胸部X射线图像以及可解释的解释
AI.conclusion: InstructX2X通过区域特定编辑和可视化解释解决了现有反事实医学图像生成方法的局限性，为医疗AI系统提供了更可靠和可解释的工具

title: A Study on Building Efficient Zero-Shot Relation Extraction Models
summary: Zero-shot relation extraction aims to identify relations between entity mentions using textual descriptions of novel types (i.e., previously unseen) instead of labeled training examples. Previous works often rely on unrealistic assumptions: (1) pairs of mentions are often encoded directly in the input, which prevents offline pre-computation for large scale document database querying; (2) no rejection mechanism is introduced, biasing the evaluation when using these models in a retrieval scenario where some (and often most) inputs are irrelevant and must be ignored. In this work, we study the robustness of existing zero-shot relation extraction models when adapting them to a realistic extraction scenario. To this end, we introduce a typology of existing models, and propose several strategies to build single pass models and models with a rejection mechanism. We adapt several state-of-the-art tools, and compare them in this challenging setting, showing that no existing work is really robust to realistic assumptions, but overall AlignRE (Li et al., 2024) performs best along all criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文研究零样本关系抽取模型在现实场景中的鲁棒性，提出单次处理模型和拒绝机制策略，发现现有模型在现实假设下都不够鲁棒，但AlignRE表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本关系抽取模型存在两个不现实的假设：(1) 实体对直接编码在输入中，无法进行大规模文档数据库的离线预计算；(2) 缺乏拒绝机制，在检索场景中无法处理大量无关输入。需要研究模型在现实抽取场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 首先对现有模型进行分类，然后提出构建单次处理模型和带拒绝机制模型的策略。适配多个SOTA工具，在具有挑战性的设置下进行比较评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有工作在现实假设下都不够鲁棒，但总体而言AlignRE在所有标准上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 零样本关系抽取模型需要适应现实场景，单次处理能力和拒绝机制是关键改进方向，AlignRE是目前最鲁棒的模型。

title: Unlearning Evaluation through Subset Statistical Independence
comment: 21 pages, 6 figures, to appear at ICLR 2026
summary: Evaluating machine unlearning remains challenging, as existing methods typically require retraining reference models or performing membership inference attacks, both of which rely on prior access to training configuration or supervision labels, making them impractical in realistic scenarios. Motivated by the fact that most unlearning algorithms remove a small, random subset of the training data, we propose a subset-level evaluation framework based on statistical independence. Specifically, we design a tailored use of the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion to assess whether the model outputs on a given subset exhibit statistical dependence, without requiring model retraining or auxiliary classifiers. Our method provides a simple, standalone evaluation procedure that aligns with unlearning workflows. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach reliably distinguishes in-training from out-of-training subsets and clearly differentiates unlearning effectiveness, even when existing evaluations fall short.

AI.tldr: 提出基于统计独立性的子集级评估框架，使用希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则评估模型输出与数据子集的统计依赖性，无需重新训练模型或辅助分类器
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘评估方法通常需要重新训练参考模型或执行成员推理攻击，这两种方法都依赖于事先获取训练配置或监督标签，在实际场景中不实用。大多数遗忘算法只移除训练数据中的一小部分随机子集，因此需要更实用的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出基于统计独立性的子集级评估框架，专门设计使用希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则来评估模型在给定子集上的输出是否表现出统计依赖性。该方法不需要模型重新训练或辅助分类器，提供简单独立的评估流程。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法能够可靠地区分训练内和训练外子集，并清晰地区分遗忘效果，即使在现有评估方法失效的情况下也能发挥作用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器遗忘评估提供了一个简单、独立且实用的框架，能够有效评估遗忘算法的效果，解决了现有方法在实际应用中的局限性。

title: Securing the Floor and Raising the Ceiling: A Merging-based Paradigm for Multi-modal Search Agents
summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have motivated the development of multi-modal search agents that can actively invoke external search tools and integrate retrieved evidence through multi-step reasoning. While promising, existing approaches typically rely on large-scale supervised trajectories or expensive reinforcement learning (RL), leading to high training cost, instability, and a severe cold-start problem for standard VLMs. We propose a training-free paradigm to empower VLMs with autonomous search capabilities via cross-modal model merging. By fusing a text-based search agent with a base VLM, we show that multi-modal search capabilities can be effectively composed without any additional multi-modal training data. To mitigate parameter interference during cross-modal integration, we introduce Optimal Brain Merging (OBM), a saliency-aware merging algorithm that identifies task-critical parameters based on their impact on model loss using only a small set of calibration samples. Extensive experiments on search-intensive benchmarks (e.g., InfoSeek, MMSearch) reveal that: (1) Model merging secures a reasonable performance floor as a zero-shot agent, with OBM achieving superior search rates; (2) OBM significantly raises the performance ceiling as a warm-start strategy, achieving faster convergence and higher peak accuracy than standard VLM initialization.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的方法，通过跨模态模型融合赋予视觉语言模型自主搜索能力，引入最优大脑融合算法减少参数干扰，在搜索密集型基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态搜索代理通常依赖大规模监督轨迹或昂贵的强化学习，导致训练成本高、不稳定，且标准视觉语言模型存在严重的冷启动问题。
AI.method: 通过跨模态模型融合，将基于文本的搜索代理与基础视觉语言模型融合，无需额外多模态训练数据。引入最优大脑融合算法，使用少量校准样本基于对模型损失的影响识别任务关键参数，减少参数干扰。
AI.result: 在搜索密集型基准测试中：1）模型融合作为零样本代理获得合理性能基础，最优大脑融合算法实现更优搜索率；2）最优大脑融合作为预热启动策略显著提升性能上限，比标准视觉语言模型初始化收敛更快、峰值准确率更高。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需训练的跨模态模型融合方法，通过最优大脑融合算法有效赋予视觉语言模型自主搜索能力，解决了现有方法的训练成本高、冷启动等问题。

title: Taxonomy-Aware Representation Alignment for Hierarchical Visual Recognition with Large Multimodal Models
comment: Published as a conference paper at CVPR 2026
summary: A high-performing, general-purpose visual understanding model should map visual inputs to a taxonomic tree of labels, identify novel categories beyond the training set for which few or no publicly available images exist. Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved remarkable progress in fine-grained visual recognition (FGVR) for known categories. However, they remain limited in hierarchical visual recognition (HVR) that aims at predicting consistent label paths from coarse to fine categories, especially for novel categories. To tackle these challenges, we propose Taxonomy-Aware Representation Alignment (TARA), a simple yet effective strategy to inject taxonomic knowledge into LMMs. TARA leverages representations from biology foundation models (BFMs) that encode rich biological relationships through hierarchical contrastive learning. By aligning the intermediate representations of visual features with those of BFMs, LMMs are encouraged to extract discriminative visual cues well structured in the taxonomy tree. Additionally, we align the representations of the first answer token with the ground-truth label, flexibly bridging the gap between contextualized visual features and categories of varying granularity according to user intent. Experiments demonstrate that TARA consistently enhances LMMs' hierarchical consistency and leaf node accuracy, enabling reliable recognition of both known and novel categories within complex biological taxonomies. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/TARA_CVPR2026.

AI.tldr: TARA通过将生物学基础模型的层次化表示对齐到大型多模态模型中，提升其在生物分类学中的层次一致性识别能力，特别是对未见类别的识别。
AI.motivation: 当前大型多模态模型在细粒度视觉识别方面表现良好，但在层次视觉识别方面存在局限，特别是对于未见类别。理想的视觉理解模型应该能够将视觉输入映射到标签的分类树，并识别训练集之外的新类别。
AI.method: 提出TARA（Taxonomy-Aware Representation Alignment）策略，通过两个对齐：1）将视觉特征中间表示与生物学基础模型的层次化表示对齐，注入分类学知识；2）将第一个答案token的表示与真实标签对齐，灵活桥接不同粒度的类别。
AI.result: 实验表明TARA能持续提升大型多模态模型的层次一致性和叶节点准确性，使其能够在复杂的生物分类学中可靠地识别已知和未见类别。
AI.conclusion: TARA是一种简单有效的策略，通过注入分类学知识到大型多模态模型中，显著提升了层次视觉识别能力，特别是在处理未见类别时的表现。

title: Spectral Attention Steering for Prompt Highlighting
summary: Attention steering is an important technique for controlling model focus, enabling capabilities such as prompt highlighting, where the model prioritises user-specified text. However, existing attention steering methods require explicit storage of the full attention matrix, making them incompatible with memory-efficient implementations like FlashAttention. We introduce Spectral Editing Key Amplification (SEKA), a training-free steering method that tackles this by directly editing key embeddings before attention computation. SEKA uses spectral decomposition to steer key embeddings towards latent directions that amplify attention scores for certain tokens. We extend this to Adaptive SEKA (AdaSEKA), a query-adaptive variant that uses a training-free routing mechanism to dynamically combine multiple expert subspaces based on the prompt's semantic intent. Our experiments show both methods significantly outperform strong baselines on standard steering benchmarks while adding much lower latency and memory overhead, in compatibility with optimised attention.

AI.tldr: SEKA和AdaSEKA是无需训练的关注引导方法，通过编辑键嵌入直接控制模型关注，兼容FlashAttention等内存优化实现。
AI.motivation: 现有关注引导方法需要存储完整的关注矩阵，与FlashAttention等内存优化实现不兼容，需要一种更高效的方法来控制模型关注。
AI.method: SEKA使用谱分解在关注计算前直接编辑键嵌入，引导其朝向能放大特定token关注分数的潜在方向。AdaSEKA是查询自适应变体，使用无需训练的路由机制根据提示语义意图动态组合多个专家子空间。
AI.result: 两种方法在标准引导基准测试中显著优于强基线，同时添加的延迟和内存开销更低，与优化后的关注计算兼容。
AI.conclusion: SEKA和AdaSEKA提供了高效、兼容内存优化实现的关注引导方法，解决了现有方法在内存效率方面的限制。

title: Energy-Efficient Information Representation in MNIST Classification Using Biologically Inspired Learning
comment: 14 pages, accepted for publication in proceedings of the 10th BWHPC Symposium
summary: Efficient representation learning is essential for optimal information storage and classification. However, it is frequently overlooked in artificial neural networks (ANNs). This neglect results in networks that can become overparameterized by factors of up to 13, increasing redundancy and energy consumption. As the demand for large language models (LLMs) and their scale increase, these issues are further highlighted, raising significant ethical and environmental concerns. We analyze our previously developed biologically inspired learning rule using information-theoretic concepts, evaluating its efficiency on the MNIST classification task. The proposed rule, which emulates the brain's structural plasticity, naturally prevents overparameterization by optimizing synaptic usage and retaining only the essential number of synapses. Furthermore, it outperforms backpropagation (BP) in terms of efficiency and storage capacity. It also eliminates the need for pre-optimization of network architecture, enhances adaptability, and reflects the brain's ability to reserve 'space' for new memories. This approach advances scalable and energy-efficient AI and provides a promising framework for developing brain-inspired models that optimize resource allocation and adaptability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种受生物启发的学习规则，通过模拟大脑结构可塑性来优化神经网络效率，防止过参数化，在MNIST任务上比反向传播更高效且存储容量更大。
AI.motivation: 当前人工神经网络经常忽视表示学习的效率，导致网络可能过参数化高达13倍，增加了冗余和能耗。随着大语言模型规模增长，这些问题引发了伦理和环境担忧。需要开发更高效的生物启发学习方法来优化资源分配。
AI.method: 提出一种受生物启发的学习规则，模拟大脑的结构可塑性机制。该方法通过优化突触使用，仅保留必要数量的突触，自然防止过参数化。在MNIST分类任务上使用信息论概念评估其效率。
AI.result: 该学习规则在效率和存储容量方面优于反向传播，消除了网络架构预优化的需求，增强了适应性，并能反映大脑为存储新记忆预留"空间"的能力。
AI.conclusion: 这种方法推动了可扩展和节能的人工智能发展，为开发优化资源分配和适应性的脑启发模型提供了有前景的框架。

title: SciDER: Scientific Data-centric End-to-end Researcher
summary: Automated scientific discovery with large language models is transforming the research lifecycle from ideation to experimentation, yet existing agents struggle to autonomously process raw data collected from scientific experiments. We introduce SciDER, a data-centric end-to-end system that automates the research lifecycle. Unlike traditional frameworks, our specialized agents collaboratively parse and analyze raw scientific data, generate hypotheses and experimental designs grounded in specific data characteristics, and write and execute corresponding code. Evaluation on three benchmarks shows SciDER excels in specialized data-driven scientific discovery and outperforms general-purpose agents and state-of-the-art models through its self-evolving memory and critic-led feedback loop. Distributed as a modular Python package, we also provide easy-to-use PyPI packages with a lightweight web interface to accelerate autonomous, data-driven research and aim to be accessible to all researchers and developers.

AI.tldr: SciDER是一个数据驱动的端到端系统，通过专门化智能体协作处理原始科学数据、生成假设和实验设计，并编写执行代码，实现自主科学发现。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型代理在处理科学实验收集的原始数据方面存在困难，无法自主完成从数据处理到实验设计的完整研究生命周期。
AI.method: 采用专门化智能体协作框架，包含数据解析分析、假设生成、实验设计、代码编写执行等模块，通过自演化记忆和批评者引导的反馈循环实现持续改进。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中表现优异，在专门的数据驱动科学发现任务上超越通用代理和最先进模型，提供模块化Python包和轻量级Web界面。
AI.conclusion: SciDER系统能够有效自动化研究生命周期，通过数据驱动的协作智能体框架加速自主科学研究，为研究者和开发者提供易用工具。

title: TAP-SLF: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation of Vision Foundation Models for Multi-Task Ultrasound Image Analysis
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables; Submitted to ISBI FMC UIA 2026; Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/huiwanHW/Florence-2-adaptation
summary: Executing multiple tasks simultaneously in medical image analysis, including segmentation, classification, detection, and regression, often introduces significant challenges regarding model generalizability and the optimization of shared feature representations. While Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) provide powerful general representations, full fine-tuning on limited medical data is prone to overfitting and incurs high computational costs. Moreover, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches typically adopt task-agnostic adaptation protocols, overlooking both task-specific mechanisms and the varying sensitivity of model layers during fine-tuning. In this work, we propose Task-Aware Prompting and Selective Layer Fine-Tuning (TAP-SLF), a unified framework for multi-task ultrasound image analysis. TAP-SLF incorporates task-aware soft prompts to encode task-specific priors into the input token sequence and applies LoRA to selected specific top layers of the encoder. This strategy updates only a small fraction of the VFM parameters while keeping the pre-trained backbone frozen. By combining task-aware prompts with selective high-layer fine-tuning, TAP-SLF enables efficient VFM adaptation to diverse medical tasks within a shared backbone. Results on the FMC_UIA 2026 Challenge test set, where TAP-SLF wins fifth place, combined with evaluations on the officially released training dataset using an 8:2 train-test split, demonstrate that task-aware prompting and selective layer tuning are effective strategies for efficient VFM adaptation.

AI.tldr: TAP-SLF：一种用于多任务超声图像分析的高效视觉基础模型适配框架，通过任务感知提示和选择性层微调，在保持预训练主干冻结的同时仅更新少量参数。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中多任务执行面临模型泛化性和共享特征表示优化的挑战。视觉基础模型（VFMs）虽提供强大通用表示，但在有限医学数据上全微调易过拟合且计算成本高。现有参数高效微调方法通常采用任务无关适配协议，忽略了任务特定机制和模型层敏感性差异。
AI.method: 提出TAP-SLF统一框架：1）任务感知软提示将任务特定先验编码到输入令牌序列；2）对编码器特定顶层应用LoRA进行选择性层微调；3）仅更新少量VFM参数，保持预训练主干冻结。
AI.result: 在FMC_UIA 2026挑战赛测试集上获得第五名，同时在官方发布的训练数据集上使用8:2训练-测试分割进行评估，证明任务感知提示和选择性层调优是高效VFM适配的有效策略。
AI.conclusion: TAP-SLF通过结合任务感知提示和选择性高层微调，实现了在共享主干中对多样化医学任务的高效VFM适配，为医学图像分析中的多任务学习提供了参数高效且性能优越的解决方案。

title: Efficient Extractive Summarization with MAMBA-Transformer Hybrids for Low-Resource Scenarios
summary: Extractive summarization of long documents is bottlenecked by quadratic complexity, often forcing truncation and limiting deployment in resource-constrained settings. We introduce the first Mamba-Transformer hybrid for extractive summarization, combining the semantic strength of pre-trained transformers with the linear-time processing of state space models. Leveraging Mamba's ability to process full documents without truncation, our approach preserves context while maintaining strong summarization quality. The architecture includes: (1) a transformer encoder for sentence-level semantics, (2) a Mamba state space model to capture inter-sentence dependencies efficiently, and (3) a linear classifier for sentence relevance prediction. Across news, argumentative, and scientific domains under low-resource conditions, our method achieves: (1) large gains over BERTSUM and MATCHSUM, including +0.23 ROUGE-1 on ArXiv and statistically significant improvements on all datasets (p < 0.001); (2) consistent advantages across domains, strongest on the longest documents; (3) robust performance with limited training data; and (4) 24-27% faster inference on news summarization (CNN/DailyMail). We introduce the first hybrid Transformer-state space architecture for summarization, showing significant ROUGE improvements in low-resource scenarios.

AI.tldr: 首个Mamba-Transformer混合架构用于抽取式摘要，结合Transformer语义能力和Mamba线性时间处理，在低资源场景下显著提升ROUGE分数并加速推理。
AI.motivation: 传统抽取式摘要方法面临二次复杂度瓶颈，需要截断长文档，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署。需要一种能处理完整文档同时保持摘要质量的高效方法。
AI.method: 提出首个Mamba-Transformer混合架构：1) Transformer编码器处理句子级语义；2) Mamba状态空间模型高效捕捉句子间依赖关系；3) 线性分类器预测句子相关性。结合预训练Transformer的语义能力和Mamba的线性时间处理优势。
AI.result: 在新闻、论证和科学领域的低资源条件下：1) 相比BERTSUM和MATCHSUM获得显著提升，ArXiv上ROUGE-1提升+0.23；2) 在所有数据集上均有统计显著改进(p<0.001)；3) 在最长文档上优势最明显；4) 新闻摘要推理速度提升24-27%；5) 在有限训练数据下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 首个用于摘要的Transformer-状态空间混合架构在低资源场景中实现了显著的ROUGE改进，证明了结合Transformer语义能力和Mamba线性时间处理的优势，为资源受限环境中的高效摘要提供了新方案。

title: Learning to Explore: Policy-Guided Outlier Synthesis for Graph Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) graphs is crucial for ensuring the safety and reliability of Graph Neural Networks. In unsupervised graph-level OOD detection, models are typically trained using only in-distribution (ID) data, resulting in incomplete feature space characterization and weak decision boundaries. Although synthesizing outliers offers a promising solution, existing approaches rely on fixed, non-adaptive sampling heuristics (e.g., distance- or density-based), limiting their ability to explore informative OOD regions. We propose a Policy-Guided Outlier Synthesis (PGOS) framework that replaces static heuristics with a learned exploration strategy. Specifically, PGOS trains a reinforcement learning agent to navigate low-density regions in a structured latent space and sample representations that most effectively refine the OOD decision boundary. These representations are then decoded into high-quality pseudo-OOD graphs to improve detector robustness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PGOS achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple graph OOD and anomaly detection benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出PGOS框架，用强化学习替代静态启发式方法合成异常图，提升图神经网络OOD检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图级OOD检测方法仅使用ID数据训练，导致特征空间表征不完整、决策边界弱。虽然合成异常样本是可行方案，但现有方法依赖固定的非自适应采样启发式方法，限制了探索信息丰富OOD区域的能力。
AI.method: 提出策略引导异常合成(PGOS)框架，用学习型探索策略替代静态启发式。训练强化学习代理在结构化潜在空间中导航低密度区域，采样最能优化OOD决策边界的表示，然后将这些表示解码为高质量伪OOD图。
AI.result: 在多个图OOD和异常检测基准测试中，PGOS实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: PGOS通过强化学习驱动的自适应异常合成，有效解决了现有图OOD检测方法的局限性，显著提升了检测器的鲁棒性。

title: Decoding Answers Before Chain-of-Thought: Evidence from Pre-CoT Probes and Activation Steering
summary: As chain-of-thought (CoT) has become central to scaling reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs), it has also emerged as a promising tool for interpretability, suggesting the opportunity to understand model decisions through verbalized reasoning. However, the utility of CoT toward interpretability depends upon its faithfulness -- whether the model's stated reasoning reflects the underlying decision process. We provide mechanistic evidence that instruction-tuned models often determine their answer before generating CoT. Training linear probes on residual stream activations at the last token before CoT, we can predict the model's final answer with 0.9 AUC on most tasks. We find that these directions are not only predictive, but also causal: steering activations along the probe direction flips model answers in over 50% of cases, significantly exceeding orthogonal baselines. When steering induces incorrect answers, we observe two distinct failure modes: non-entailment (stating correct premises but drawing unsupported conclusions) and confabulation (fabricating false premises). While post-hoc reasoning may be instrumentally useful when the model has a correct pre-CoT belief, these failure modes suggest it can result in undesirable behaviors when reasoning from a false belief.

AI.tldr: 研究发现指令微调模型通常在生成思维链之前就已经决定了答案，思维链可能只是事后的合理化解释而非真实的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 思维链已成为扩展大语言模型推理能力的关键技术，也被视为可解释性的有前景工具。但思维链对可解释性的效用取决于其忠实性——模型陈述的推理是否反映其底层决策过程。
AI.method: 在思维链生成前的最后一个token的残差流激活上训练线性探针，预测模型的最终答案；通过沿探针方向操纵激活来测试因果性。
AI.result: 在大多数任务上，线性探针能以0.9 AUC预测最终答案；沿探针方向操纵激活能在超过50%的情况下翻转模型答案，显著超过正交基线。当操纵导致错误答案时，观察到两种失败模式：非蕴含（陈述正确前提但得出不支持结论）和虚构（捏造虚假前提）。
AI.conclusion: 指令微调模型通常在生成思维链前就已确定答案，思维链可能是事后合理化。当模型已有正确预信念时，事后推理可能有用，但当从错误信念出发推理时，可能导致非蕴含和虚构等不良行为。

title: Self-Correction Inside the Model: Leveraging Layer Attention to Mitigate Hallucinations in Large Vision Language Models
summary: Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have made substantial progress, hallucination, where generated text is not grounded in the visual input, remains a challenge. As LVLMs become stronger, previously reported hallucination patterns, such as linguistic bias and overthinking phenomenon, become far less consistent, making the corresponding mitigation techniques substantially less effective. In this paper, we introduce an Internal self-Correction mechanism utilizing Layer Attention (ICLA) that operates directly on hidden states during generation. Each layer selectively retrieves information from all preceding layers through a diagonal cross-layer attention mechanism, enabling self-refinement without any external correction signals. With introducing and training only 0.2M and 0.1M additional parameters on LLaVA1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL-7B, \ours consistently improves visual grounding across multiple hallucination benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness for more advanced LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出ICLA机制，通过层间注意力在生成过程中直接修正隐藏状态，仅需少量额外参数即可显著减少LVLM的幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 随着大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)能力增强，之前报告的幻觉模式（如语言偏见和过度思考现象）变得不一致，导致现有缓解技术效果下降，需要新的解决方案
AI.method: 提出内部自校正机制ICLA，通过对角线跨层注意力机制，让每一层在生成过程中选择性检索所有前层信息，实现无需外部校正信号的自优化
AI.result: 在LLaVA1.5-7B和Qwen2.5-VL-7B上仅增加0.2M和0.1M参数，就在多个幻觉基准测试中持续改善视觉基础能力
AI.conclusion: ICLA机制为更先进的LVLMs提供了一种有效的幻觉缓解方案，通过内部自校正显著提升视觉基础能力

title: Individual Turing Test: A Case Study of LLM-based Simulation Using Longitudinal Personal Data
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable human-like capabilities, yet their ability to replicate a specific individual remains under-explored. This paper presents a case study to investigate LLM-based individual simulation with a volunteer-contributed archive of private messaging history spanning over ten years. Based on the messaging data, we propose the "Individual Turing Test" to evaluate whether acquaintances of the volunteer can correctly identify which response in a multi-candidate pool most plausibly comes from the volunteer. We investigate prevalent LLM-based individual simulation approaches including: fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), memory-based approach, and hybrid methods that integrate fine-tuning and RAG or memory. Empirical results show that current LLM-based simulation methods do not pass the Individual Turing Test, but they perform substantially better when the same test is conducted on strangers to the target individual. Additionally, while fine-tuning improves the simulation in daily chats representing the language style of the individual, retrieval-augmented and memory-based approaches demonstrate stronger performance on questions involving personal opinions and preferences. These findings reveal a fundamental trade-off between parametric and non-parametric approaches to individual simulation with LLMs when given a longitudinal context.

AI.tldr: LLM模拟特定个体的能力研究：基于10年私人聊天记录进行个体图灵测试，发现现有方法无法通过熟人识别测试，但在陌生人测试中表现更好，揭示了参数化与非参数化方法在个体模拟中的权衡。
AI.motivation: 虽然大语言模型展现出类人能力，但模拟特定个体的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在通过真实个体的长期私人聊天记录，评估LLM模拟特定个体的可行性。
AI.method: 基于志愿者提供的10年私人聊天记录，提出"个体图灵测试"：让熟人在多候选回答中识别哪个最可能来自志愿者。比较了微调、检索增强生成、基于记忆的方法以及混合方法等多种LLM模拟方法。
AI.result: 当前LLM模拟方法无法通过个体图灵测试（熟人无法正确识别），但在陌生人测试中表现显著更好。微调在模拟日常聊天风格上更优，而检索增强和基于记忆的方法在涉及个人观点和偏好的问题上表现更强。
AI.conclusion: LLM模拟特定个体存在挑战，揭示了参数化（微调）与非参数化（检索/记忆）方法之间的基本权衡。前者擅长捕捉语言风格，后者在处理个人观点和偏好方面更有效。

title: Multi-Domain Riemannian Graph Gluing for Building Graph Foundation Models
summary: Multi-domain graph pre-training integrates knowledge from diverse domains to enhance performance in the target domains, which is crucial for building graph foundation models. Despite initial success, existing solutions often fall short of answering a fundamental question: how is knowledge integrated or transferred across domains? This theoretical limitation motivates us to rethink the consistency and transferability between model pre-training and domain adaptation. In this paper, we propose a fresh Riemannian geometry perspective, whose core idea is to merge any graph dataset into a unified, smooth Riemannian manifold, enabling a systematic understanding of knowledge integration and transfer. To achieve this, our key contribution is the theoretical establishment of neural manifold gluing, which first characterizes local geometry using an adaptive orthogonal frame and then "glues" the local pieces together into a coherent whole. Building on this theory, we present the GraphGlue framework, which supports batched pre-training with EMA prototyping and provides a transferability measure based on geometric consistence. Extensive experiments demonstrate its superior performance across diverse graph domains. Moreover, we empirically validated GraphGlue's geometric scaling law, showing that larger quantities of datasets improve model transferability by producing a smoother manifold. Codes are available at https://github.com/RiemannGraph/GraphGlue.

AI.tldr: 提出GraphGlue框架，从黎曼几何视角统一多域图预训练，通过神经流形粘合理论实现跨域知识整合与迁移
AI.motivation: 现有多域图预训练方法缺乏对知识如何跨域整合与迁移的理论理解，需要重新思考预训练与域适应的一致性和可迁移性
AI.method: 提出黎曼几何视角，将图数据集合并为统一的黎曼流形；建立神经流形粘合理论，使用自适应正交框架表征局部几何，然后将局部片段"粘合"为整体；实现GraphGlue框架，支持EMA原型批处理预训练，提供基于几何一致性的可迁移性度量
AI.result: 在多个图域上表现出优越性能；实证验证了GraphGlue的几何缩放定律，显示更多数据集能产生更平滑的流形从而提升模型可迁移性
AI.conclusion: 通过黎曼几何视角为多域图预训练提供了系统的理论框架，GraphGlue不仅性能优越，还揭示了数据集数量与模型可迁移性之间的几何关系

title: Scaling Tasks, Not Samples: Mastering Humanoid Control through Multi-Task Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Developing generalist robots capable of mastering diverse skills remains a central challenge in embodied AI. While recent progress emphasizes scaling model parameters and offline datasets, such approaches are limited in robotics, where learning requires active interaction. We argue that effective online learning should scale the \emph{number of tasks}, rather than the number of samples per task. This regime reveals a structural advantage of model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL). Because physical dynamics are invariant across tasks, a shared world model can aggregate multi-task experience to learn robust, task-agnostic representations. In contrast, model-free methods suffer from gradient interference when tasks demand conflicting actions in similar states. Task diversity therefore acts as a regularizer for MBRL, improving dynamics learning and sample efficiency. We instantiate this idea with \textbf{EfficientZero-Multitask (EZ-M)}, a sample-efficient multi-task MBRL algorithm for online learning. Evaluated on \textbf{HumanoidBench}, a challenging whole-body control benchmark, EZ-M achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly higher sample efficiency than strong baselines, without extreme parameter scaling. These results establish task scaling as a critical axis for scalable robotic learning. The project website is available \href{https://yewr.github.io/ez_m/}{here}.

AI.tldr: EZ-M算法通过多任务在线学习，利用模型强化学习的结构优势，在HumanoidBench上实现最先进性能，样本效率显著高于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 开发能够掌握多样化技能的通用机器人是具身AI的核心挑战。现有方法主要关注扩大模型参数和离线数据集，但在机器人学习中需要主动交互，这些方法存在局限。作者认为有效的在线学习应该扩展任务数量而非每个任务的样本数量。
AI.method: 提出EfficientZero-Multitask (EZ-M)算法，基于模型强化学习框架。利用物理动力学在不同任务间不变的特性，通过共享世界模型聚合多任务经验，学习鲁棒的任务无关表示。任务多样性作为正则化器，改善动力学学习和样本效率。
AI.result: 在HumanoidBench（具有挑战性的全身控制基准）上评估，EZ-M实现了最先进的性能，样本效率显著高于强基线方法，且无需极端参数扩展。
AI.conclusion: 任务扩展是机器人学习可扩展性的关键维度。模型强化学习在多任务设置中具有结构优势，任务多样性可改善动力学学习和样本效率。

title: Mamba-CAD: State Space Model For 3D Computer-Aided Design Generative Modeling
summary: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) generative modeling has a strong and long-term application in the industry. Recently, the parametric CAD sequence as the design logic of an object has been widely mined by sequence models. However, the industrial CAD models, especially in component objects, are fine-grained and complex, requiring a longer parametric CAD sequence to define. To address the problem, we introduce Mamba-CAD, a self-supervised generative modeling for complex CAD models in the industry, which can model on a longer parametric CAD sequence. Specifically, we first design an encoder-decoder framework based on a Mamba architecture and pair it with a CAD reconstruction task for pre-training to model the latent representation of CAD models; and then we utilize the learned representation to guide a generative adversarial network to produce the fake representation of CAD models, which would be finally recovered into parametric CAD sequences via the decoder of MambaCAD. To train Mamba-CAD, we further create a new dataset consisting of 77,078 CAD models with longer parametric CAD sequences. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model under various evaluation metrics, especially in the generation length of valid parametric CAD sequences. The code and dataset can be achieved from https://github.com/Sunny-Hack/Code-for-Mamba-CAD-AAAI-2025-.

AI.tldr: Mamba-CAD：基于Mamba架构的自监督生成模型，用于处理工业中复杂CAD模型的长参数序列生成问题
AI.motivation: 工业CAD模型（特别是组件对象）具有细粒度和复杂性，需要更长的参数CAD序列来定义。现有序列模型难以处理这种长序列建模需求。
AI.method: 1. 基于Mamba架构设计编码器-解码器框架，通过CAD重建任务进行预训练，建模CAD模型的潜在表示；2. 利用学习到的表示指导生成对抗网络生成CAD模型的虚假表示；3. 通过Mamba-CAD的解码器将表示恢复为参数CAD序列。
AI.result: 创建了包含77,078个CAD模型的新数据集（具有更长参数序列）。在各种评估指标下证明了模型的有效性，特别是在有效参数CAD序列的生成长度方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Mamba-CAD能够有效处理工业中复杂CAD模型的长参数序列生成问题，为CAD生成建模提供了新的解决方案。

title: Catalyst-Agent: Autonomous heterogeneous catalyst screening and optimization with an LLM Agent
summary:
The discovery of novel catalysts tailored for particular applications is a major challenge for the twenty-first century. Traditional methods for this include time-consuming and expensive experimental trial-and-error approaches in labs based on chemical theory or heavily computational first-principles approaches based on density functional theory. Recent studies show that deep learning models like graph neural networks (GNNs) can significantly speed up the screening and discovery of catalyst materials by many orders of magnitude, with very high accuracy and fidelity.
  In this work, we introduce Catalyst-Agent, a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server-based, LLM-powered AI agent. It can explore vast material databases using the OPTIMADE API, make structural modifications, calculate adsorption energies using Meta FAIRchem's UMA (GNN) model via FAIRchem's AdsorbML workflow and slab construction, and make useful material suggestions to the researcher in a closed-loop manner, including surface-level modifications to refine near-miss candidates.
  It is tested on three pivotal reactions: the oxygen reduction reaction (ORR), the nitrogen reduction reaction (NRR), and the CO2 reduction reaction (CO2RR). Catalyst-Agent achieves a success rate of 23-34 percent among all the materials it chooses and evaluates, and manages to converge in 1-2 trials per successful material on average. This work demonstrates the potential of AI agents to exercise their planning capabilities and tool use to operationalize the catalyst screening workflow, provide useful, testable hypotheses, and accelerate future scientific discoveries for humanity with minimal human intervention.

AI.tldr: 提出Catalyst-Agent：基于LLM的AI代理，通过OPTIMADE API搜索材料数据库，使用GNN模型计算吸附能，实现催化剂筛选与发现的自动化闭环系统。
AI.motivation: 传统催化剂发现方法（实验试错或DFT计算）耗时耗力，需要开发能显著加速催化剂筛选过程的新方法。深度学习模型如GNN已显示出在材料发现中的巨大潜力，但需要更智能的系统来整合这些工具并实现自动化工作流。
AI.method: 开发基于MCP服务器的LLM驱动AI代理Catalyst-Agent，整合多个工具：1) 通过OPTIMADE API探索材料数据库；2) 进行结构修改；3) 使用Meta FAIRchem的UMA(GNN)模型通过AdsorbML工作流计算吸附能；4) 实现闭环材料建议，包括表面级修改以优化候选材料。
AI.result: 在三个关键反应（ORR、NRR、CO2RR）上测试，Catalyst-Agent在所有选择和评估的材料中达到23-34%的成功率，每个成功材料平均收敛需要1-2次试验。
AI.conclusion: AI代理通过规划能力和工具使用能够操作化催化剂筛选工作流，提供可测试的假设，以最小人工干预加速科学发现，展示了AI在催化剂发现领域的巨大潜力。

title: IDER: IDempotent Experience Replay for Reliable Continual Learning
summary: Catastrophic forgetting, the tendency of neural networks to forget previously learned knowledge when learning new tasks, has been a major challenge in continual learning (CL). To tackle this challenge, CL methods have been proposed and shown to reduce forgetting. Furthermore, CL models deployed in mission-critical settings can benefit from uncertainty awareness by calibrating their predictions to reliably assess their confidences. However, existing uncertainty-aware continual learning methods suffer from high computational overhead and incompatibility with mainstream replay methods. To address this, we propose idempotent experience replay (IDER), a novel approach based on the idempotent property where repeated function applications yield the same output. Specifically, we first adapt the training loss to make model idempotent on current data streams. In addition, we introduce an idempotence distillation loss. We feed the output of the current model back into the old checkpoint and then minimize the distance between this reprocessed output and the original output of the current model. This yields a simple and effective new baseline for building reliable continual learners, which can be seamlessly integrated with other CL approaches. Extensive experiments on different CL benchmarks demonstrate that IDER consistently improves prediction reliability while simultaneously boosting accuracy and reducing forgetting. Our results suggest the potential of idempotence as a promising principle for deploying efficient and trustworthy continual learning systems in real-world applications.Our code is available at https://github.com/YutingLi0606/Idempotent-Continual-Learning.

AI.tldr: 提出idempotent experience replay (IDER)方法，通过使模型具有幂等性来提升持续学习的可靠性和准确性，同时减少灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性感知的持续学习方法存在计算开销高、与主流回放方法不兼容的问题，需要一种高效可靠的方法来部署持续学习系统。
AI.method: 基于幂等性原理，通过调整训练损失使模型在当前数据流上具有幂等性，并引入幂等蒸馏损失，将当前模型输出反馈到旧检查点，最小化重处理输出与原始输出的距离。
AI.result: 在不同持续学习基准测试中，IDER一致地提高了预测可靠性，同时提升了准确性并减少了遗忘，可作为构建可靠持续学习者的简单有效基线。
AI.conclusion: 幂等性作为有前景的原则，可用于部署高效可信的持续学习系统，IDER方法可无缝集成到其他持续学习方法中。

title: ProtRLSearch: A Multi-Round Multimodal Protein Search Agent with Large Language Models Trained via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Protein analysis tasks arising in healthcare settings often require accurate reasoning under protein sequence constraints, involving tasks such as functional interpretation of disease-related variants, protein-level analysis for clinical research, and similar scenarios. To address such tasks, search agents are introduced to search protein-related information, providing support for disease-related variant analysis and protein function reasoning in protein-centric inference. However, such search agents are mostly limited to single-round, text-only modality search, which prevents the protein sequence modality from being incorporated as a multimodal input into the search decision-making process. Meanwhile, their reliance on reinforcement learning (RL) supervision that focuses solely on the final answer results in a lack of search process constraints, making deviations in keyword selection and reasoning directions difficult to identify and correct in a timely manner. To address these limitations, we propose ProtRLSearch, a multi-round protein search agent trained with multi-dimensional reward based RL, which jointly leverages protein sequence and text as multimodal inputs during real-time search to produce high quality reports. To evaluate the ability of models to integrate protein sequence information and text-based multimodal inputs in realistic protein query settings, we construct ProtMCQs, a benchmark of 3,000 multiple choice questions (MCQs) organized into three difficulty levels. The benchmark evaluates protein query tasks that range from sequence constrained reasoning about protein function and phenotype changes to comprehensive protein reasoning that integrates multi-dimensional sequence features with signal pathways and regulatory networks.

AI.tldr: ProtRLSearch：基于多维度奖励强化学习的多轮蛋白质搜索代理，结合蛋白质序列和文本作为多模态输入，用于蛋白质功能推理和疾病变异分析
AI.motivation: 当前蛋白质搜索代理存在两个主要限制：1）仅限于单轮、纯文本模态搜索，无法将蛋白质序列作为多模态输入整合到搜索决策中；2）依赖仅关注最终答案的强化学习监督，缺乏搜索过程约束，难以及时发现和纠正关键词选择和推理方向的偏差
AI.method: 提出ProtRLSearch，一个基于多维度奖励强化学习的多轮蛋白质搜索代理，在实时搜索中联合利用蛋白质序列和文本作为多模态输入，生成高质量报告。同时构建ProtMCQs基准测试，包含3,000个多选题，分为三个难度级别，用于评估模型在真实蛋白质查询场景中整合蛋白质序列信息和文本多模态输入的能力
AI.result: 论文提出了ProtRLSearch系统和ProtMCQs基准测试，但摘要中未提供具体的实验结果数据
AI.conclusion: ProtRLSearch通过多轮、多模态的搜索方法解决了现有蛋白质搜索代理的局限性，能够更好地支持蛋白质功能推理和疾病相关变异分析，为临床研究和医疗保健应用提供了更准确的蛋白质分析工具

title: SesaHand: Enhancing 3D Hand Reconstruction via Controllable Generation with Semantic and Structural Alignment
summary: Recent studies on 3D hand reconstruction have demonstrated the effectiveness of synthetic training data to improve estimation performance. However, most methods rely on game engines to synthesize hand images, which often lack diversity in textures and environments, and fail to include crucial components like arms or interacting objects. Generative models are promising alternatives to generate diverse hand images, but still suffer from misalignment issues. In this paper, we present SesaHand, which enhances controllable hand image generation from both semantic and structural alignment perspectives for 3D hand reconstruction. Specifically, for semantic alignment, we propose a pipeline with Chain-of-Thought inference to extract human behavior semantics from image captions generated by the Vision-Language Model. This semantics suppresses human-irrelevant environmental details and ensures sufficient human-centric contexts for hand image generation. For structural alignment, we introduce hierarchical structural fusion to integrate structural information with different granularity for feature refinement to better align the hand and the overall human body in generated images. We further propose a hand structure attention enhancement method to efficiently enhance the model's attention on hand regions. Experiments demonstrate that our method not only outperforms prior work in generation performance but also improves 3D hand reconstruction with the generated hand images.

AI.tldr: SesaHand通过语义对齐和结构对齐增强可控手部图像生成，提升3D手部重建性能
AI.motivation: 现有3D手部重建方法依赖游戏引擎生成合成训练数据，但缺乏纹理和环境多样性，且缺少手臂或交互物体等关键组件。生成模型虽能生成多样手部图像，但仍存在对齐问题。
AI.method: 1) 语义对齐：使用思维链推理从视觉语言模型生成的图像描述中提取人类行为语义，抑制非人类环境细节，确保足够的人类中心上下文；2) 结构对齐：采用分层结构融合整合不同粒度的结构信息进行特征细化，更好地对齐生成图像中的手部和整个人体；3) 手部结构注意力增强：有效增强模型对手部区域的注意力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法不仅在生成性能上优于先前工作，而且使用生成的手部图像改善了3D手部重建效果。
AI.conclusion: SesaHand通过语义和结构对齐的增强可控手部图像生成方法，有效解决了现有合成数据方法的局限性，为3D手部重建提供了更高质量的训练数据。

title: Truth as a Trajectory: What Internal Representations Reveal About Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Existing explainability methods for Large Language Models (LLMs) typically treat hidden states as static points in activation space, assuming that correct and incorrect inferences can be separated using representations from an individual layer. However, these activations are saturated with polysemantic features, leading to linear probes learning surface-level lexical patterns rather than underlying reasoning structures. We introduce Truth as a Trajectory (TaT), which models the transformer inference as an unfolded trajectory of iterative refinements, shifting analysis from static activations to layer-wise geometric displacement. By analyzing displacement of representations across layers, TaT uncovers geometric invariants that distinguish valid reasoning from spurious behavior. We evaluate TaT across dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures on benchmarks spanning commonsense reasoning, question answering, and toxicity detection. Without access to the activations themselves and using only changes in activations across layers, we show that TaT effectively mitigates reliance on static lexical confounds, outperforming conventional probing, and establishes trajectory analysis as a complementary perspective on LLM explainability.

AI.tldr: TaT将LLM推理建模为层间几何位移的轨迹分析，而非静态激活点，能更好地区分有效推理与虚假模式。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法将隐藏状态视为激活空间中的静态点，假设正确和错误推理可以通过单个层的表示来区分。但这些激活充满了多义特征，导致线性探针学习表面词汇模式而非底层推理结构。
AI.method: 引入Truth as a Trajectory (TaT)，将transformer推理建模为迭代细化的展开轨迹，从静态激活分析转向层间几何位移分析。通过分析表示在层间的位移，发现区分有效推理与虚假行为的几何不变量。
AI.result: 在密集和MoE架构上评估，涵盖常识推理、问答和毒性检测基准。仅使用层间激活变化（而非激活本身），TaT有效减少对静态词汇混淆的依赖，优于传统探针方法。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹分析为LLM可解释性提供了补充视角，通过几何位移分析能更好揭示模型的推理过程。

title: Adapt Data to Model: Adaptive Transformation Optimization for Domain-shared Time Series Foundation Models
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Large time series models (LTMs) have emerged as powerful tools for universal forecasting, yet they often struggle with the inherent diversity and nonstationarity of real-world time series data, leading to an unsatisfactory trade-off between forecasting accuracy and generalization. Rather than continually finetuning new LTM instances for each domain, we propose a data-centric framework, time-series adaptive transformation optimization (TATO), that enables a single frozen pre-trained LTM to adapt to diverse downstream domains through an optimally configured transformation pipeline. Specifically, TATO constructs three representative types of transformations, including context slicing, scale normalization, and outlier correction, to help LTMs better align with target domain characteristics. To ensure robustness, we incorporate carefully selected time series augmentations and a two-stage ranking mechanism that filters out pipelines underperforming on specific metrics. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art LTMs and widely used datasets demonstrate that TATO consistently and significantly improves domain-adaptive forecasting performance, achieving a maximum reduction in MSE of 65.4\% and an average reduction of 13.6\%. Moreover, TATO is highly efficient, typically completing optimization in under 2 minutes, making it practical for real-world deployment. The source code is available at https://github.com/thulab/TATO.

AI.tldr: TATO是一个数据中心的框架，通过优化配置的转换管道，使单个冻结的预训练大时间序列模型能够适应不同的下游领域，显著提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大时间序列模型在处理真实世界时间序列数据的多样性和非平稳性时存在困难，需要在预测准确性和泛化能力之间做出不理想的权衡。与其为每个领域持续微调新模型实例，不如让单个预训练模型通过数据转换适应不同领域。
AI.method: TATO构建了三种代表性转换类型：上下文切片、尺度归一化和异常值校正，帮助大时间序列模型更好地与目标领域特征对齐。为确保鲁棒性，结合了精心选择的时间序列增强和两阶段排名机制，过滤在特定指标上表现不佳的管道。
AI.result: 在最先进的大时间序列模型和广泛使用的数据集上的实验表明，TATO持续显著提升了领域自适应预测性能，MSE最大降低65.4%，平均降低13.6%。TATO效率高，通常在2分钟内完成优化。
AI.conclusion: TATO是一个高效实用的数据中心框架，通过优化转换管道使单个冻结预训练大时间序列模型能够适应多样化下游领域，显著提升预测性能，适合实际部署。

title: Harmonizing Dense and Sparse Signals in Multi-turn RL: Dual-Horizon Credit Assignment for Industrial Sales Agents
summary: Optimizing large language models for industrial sales requires balancing long-term commercial objectives (e.g., conversion rate) with immediate linguistic constraints such as fluency and compliance. Conventional reinforcement learning often merges these heterogeneous goals into a single reward, causing high-magnitude session-level rewards to overwhelm subtler turn-level signals, which leads to unstable training or reward hacking. To address this issue, we propose Dual-Horizon Credit Assignment (DuCA), a framework that disentangles optimization across time scales. Its core, Horizon-Independent Advantage Normalization (HIAN), separately normalizes advantages from turn-level and session-level rewards before fusion, ensuring balanced gradient contributions from both immediate and long-term objectives to the policy update. Extensive experiments with a high-fidelity user simulator show DuCA outperforms the state-of-the-art GRPO baseline, achieving a 6.82% relative improvement in conversion rate, reducing inter-sentence repetition by 82.28%, and lowering identity detection rate by 27.35%, indicating a substantial improvement for an industrial sales scenario that effectively balances the dual demands of strategic performance and naturalistic language generation.

AI.tldr: DuCA框架通过解耦不同时间尺度的优化，分别归一化回合级和会话级奖励的优势值，解决工业销售场景中LLM训练时长期商业目标与即时语言约束的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 工业销售场景中优化大语言模型需要平衡长期商业目标（如转化率）与即时语言约束（流畅性、合规性）。传统强化学习将异质目标合并为单一奖励，导致会话级高幅值奖励淹没回合级细微信号，造成训练不稳定或奖励黑客问题。
AI.method: 提出Dual-Horizon Credit Assignment (DuCA)框架，核心是Horizon-Independent Advantage Normalization (HIAN)，分别对回合级和会话级奖励的优势值进行归一化后再融合，确保即时目标和长期目标的梯度贡献在策略更新中保持平衡。
AI.result: 在高保真用户模拟器上的实验显示，DuCA优于最先进的GRPO基线：转化率相对提升6.82%，句子间重复减少82.28%，身份检测率降低27.35%。
AI.conclusion: DuCA在工业销售场景中显著改善了战略性能与自然语言生成的双重需求平衡，为多时间尺度目标优化提供了有效解决方案。

title: Improved Adversarial Diffusion Compression for Real-World Video Super-Resolution
summary: While many diffusion models have achieved impressive results in real-world video super-resolution (Real-VSR) by generating rich and realistic details, their reliance on multi-step sampling leads to slow inference. One-step networks like SeedVR2, DOVE, and DLoRAL alleviate this through condensing generation into one single step, yet they remain heavy, with billions of parameters and multi-second latency. Recent adversarial diffusion compression (ADC) offers a promising path via pruning and distilling these models into a compact AdcSR network, but directly applying it to Real-VSR fails to balance spatial details and temporal consistency due to its lack of temporal awareness and the limitations of standard adversarial learning. To address these challenges, we propose an improved ADC method for Real-VSR. Our approach distills a large diffusion Transformer (DiT) teacher DOVE equipped with 3D spatio-temporal attentions, into a pruned 2D Stable Diffusion (SD)-based AdcSR backbone, augmented with lightweight 1D temporal convolutions, achieving significantly higher efficiency. In addition, we introduce a dual-head adversarial distillation scheme, in which discriminators in both pixel and feature domains explicitly disentangle the discrimination of details and consistency into two heads, enabling both objectives to be effectively optimized without sacrificing one for the other. Experiments demonstrate that the resulting compressed AdcVSR model reduces complexity by 95% in parameters and achieves an 8$\times$ acceleration over its DiT teacher DOVE, while maintaining competitive video quality and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出改进的对抗扩散压缩方法AdcVSR，将大型3D DiT教师模型蒸馏到轻量2D SD骨干网络，通过双头对抗蒸馏平衡空间细节与时序一致性，实现95%参数减少和8倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有Real-VSR方法存在效率问题：扩散模型推理慢，一步网络参数量大且延迟高，而现有ADC方法直接应用于Real-VSR时无法平衡空间细节与时序一致性。
AI.method: 1) 将配备3D时空注意力的大型DiT教师模型DOVE蒸馏到基于2D Stable Diffusion的AdcSR骨干网络，并添加轻量1D时序卷积；2) 提出双头对抗蒸馏方案，在像素域和特征域分别使用判别器明确分离细节和一致性的判别任务。
AI.result: AdcVSR模型参数复杂度减少95%，相比DiT教师模型DOVE实现8倍加速，同时保持竞争力的视频质量和效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进ADC方法成功解决了Real-VSR中空间细节与时序一致性的平衡问题，通过高效蒸馏实现了高质量视频超分辨率的高效推理。

title: MetaState: Persistent Working Memory for Discrete Diffusion Language Models
summary: Discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising a masked sequence. Compared with autoregressive models, this paradigm naturally supports parallel decoding, bidirectional context, and flexible generation patterns. However, standard dLLMs condition each denoising step only on the current hard-masked sequence, while intermediate continuous representations are discarded after sampling and remasking. We refer to this bottleneck as the \textbf{Information Island} problem. It leads to redundant recomputation across steps and can degrade cross-step consistency. We address this limitation with \textbf{MetaState}, a lightweight recurrent augmentation that equips a frozen dLLM backbone with a persistent, fixed-size working memory that remains independent of sequence length. \textbf{MetaState} consists of three trainable modules: a cross-attention Mixer that reads backbone activations into memory slots, a GRU-style Updater that integrates information across denoising steps, and a cross-attention Injector that feeds the updated memory back into backbone activations. We train these modules with $K$-step unrolling to expose them to multi-step denoising dynamics during fine-tuning. On LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, \textbf{MetaState} introduces negligible trainable parameters while keeping the backbone frozen, and it consistently improves accuracy over frozen baselines. These results demonstrate that persistent cross-step memory is an effective mechanism for bridging denoising steps and improving generation quality in discrete diffusion language models.

AI.tldr: MetaState通过为离散扩散语言模型添加轻量级循环工作记忆，解决信息孤岛问题，提升生成质量
AI.motivation: 标准离散扩散语言模型在去噪过程中只基于当前硬掩码序列进行条件生成，丢弃中间连续表示，导致信息孤岛问题，造成跨步冗余计算和一致性下降
AI.method: MetaState包含三个可训练模块：跨注意力混合器读取骨干激活到记忆槽，GRU风格更新器整合跨步信息，跨注意力注入器将更新后的记忆反馈回骨干激活。通过K步展开训练暴露多步去噪动态
AI.result: 在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B上，MetaState仅引入少量可训练参数并保持骨干冻结，相比冻结基线持续提升准确性
AI.conclusion: 持久性跨步记忆是桥接去噪步骤、提升离散扩散语言模型生成质量的有效机制

title: Retrodictive Forecasting: A Proof-of-Concept for Exploiting Temporal Asymmetry in Time Series Prediction
comment: 27 pages, 13 figures, 5 tables, Code available at https://github.com/cdamour/retrodictive-forecasting (Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18803446)
summary: We propose a retrodictive forecasting paradigm for time series: instead of predicting the future from the past, we identify the future that best explains the observed present via inverse MAP optimization over a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE). This conditioning is a statistical modeling choice for Bayesian inversion; it does not assert that future events cause past observations. The approach is theoretically grounded in an information-theoretic arrow-of-time measure: the symmetrized Kullback-Leibler divergence between forward and time-reversed trajectory ensembles provides both the conceptual rationale and an operational GO/NO-GO diagnostic for applicability. We implement the paradigm as MAP inference over an inverse CVAE with a learned RealNVP normalizing-flow prior and evaluate it on six time series cases: four synthetic processes with controlled temporal asymmetry and two ERA5 reanalysis datasets (wind speed and solar irradiance). The work makes four contributions: (i) a formal retrodictive inference formulation; (ii) an inverse CVAE architecture; (iii) a model-free irreversibility diagnostic; and (iv) a falsifiable validation protocol with four pre-specified predictions. All pre-specified predictions are empirically supported: the diagnostic correctly classifies all six cases; the learned flow prior improves over an isotropic Gaussian baseline on GO cases; the inverse MAP yields no spurious advantage on time-reversible dynamics; and on irreversible GO cases, it achieves competitive or superior RMSE relative to forward baselines, with a statistically significant 17.7% reduction over a forward MLP on ERA5 solar irradiance. These results provide a structured proof-of-concept that retrodictive forecasting can constitute a viable alternative to conventional forward prediction when statistical time-irreversibility is present and exploitable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于逆向MAP优化的时间序列回溯预测范式，通过条件变分自编码器识别最能解释当前观测的未来状态，而非传统的前向预测。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测是从过去预测未来，但作者认为当存在统计时间不可逆性时，通过逆向推理识别最能解释当前观测的未来状态可能更有效。这为时间序列预测提供了新的理论视角和方法论。
AI.method: 采用逆向MAP优化框架，基于条件变分自编码器(CVAE)构建模型，使用学习的RealNVP归一化流作为先验分布。通过信息论的时间箭头度量（对称KL散度）作为理论基础和诊断工具。
AI.result: 在6个时间序列案例（4个合成过程和2个ERA5再分析数据集）上验证：诊断正确分类所有案例；学习的流先验优于各向同性高斯基线；在不可逆案例中，逆向MAP方法相比前向基线取得竞争性或更优的RMSE，在ERA5太阳辐照度数据上比前向MLP显著降低17.7%。
AI.conclusion: 当存在统计时间不可逆性时，回溯预测可以成为传统前向预测的可行替代方案。该方法提供了形式化的逆向推理框架、模型架构、不可逆性诊断和可证伪的验证协议。

title: Agentic Multi-Source Grounding for Enhanced Query Intent Understanding: A DoorDash Case Study
summary: Accurately mapping user queries to business categories is a fundamental Information Retrieval challenge for multi-category marketplaces, where context-sparse queries such as "Wildflower" exhibit intent ambiguity, simultaneously denoting a restaurant chain, a retail product, and a floral item. Traditional classifiers force a winner-takes-all assignment, while general-purpose LLMs hallucinate unavailable inventory. We introduce an Agentic Multi-Source Grounded system that addresses both failure modes by grounding LLM inference in (i) a staged catalog entity retrieval pipeline and (ii) an agentic web-search tool invoked autonomously for cold-start queries. Rather than predicting a single label, the model emits an ordered multi-intent set, resolved by a configurable disambiguation layer that applies deterministic business policies and is designed for extensibility to personalization signals. This decoupled design generalizes across domains, allowing any marketplace to supply its own grounding sources and resolution rules without modifying the core architecture. Evaluated on DoorDash's multi-vertical search platform, the system achieves +10.9pp over the ungrounded LLM baseline and +4.6pp over the legacy production system. On long-tail queries, incremental ablations attribute +8.3pp to catalog grounding, +3.2pp to agentic web search grounding, and +1.5pp to dual intent disambiguation, yielding 90.7% accuracy (+13.0pp over baseline). The system is deployed in production, serving over 95% of daily search impressions, and establishes a generalizable paradigm for applications requiring foundation models grounded in proprietary context and real-time web knowledge to resolve ambiguous, context-sparse decision problems at scale.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于代理多源接地的系统，通过将LLM推理接地到目录实体检索和自主网络搜索工具，解决多类别市场中用户查询的意图歧义问题，相比基线提升显著。
AI.motivation: 在多类别市场平台中，用户查询（如"Wildflower"）存在意图歧义，可能同时指向餐厅、零售产品或花卉。传统分类器采用赢家通吃方式，而通用LLM会产生不存在的库存幻觉，需要解决这两种失败模式。
AI.method: 引入代理多源接地系统：1) 分阶段目录实体检索管道；2) 自主调用的代理网络搜索工具处理冷启动查询。模型输出有序的多意图集合，通过可配置的消歧层应用确定性业务策略，支持扩展到个性化信号。
AI.result: 在DoorDash多垂直搜索平台上评估：相比未接地LLM基线提升10.9个百分点，相比传统生产系统提升4.6个百分点。长尾查询中，目录接地贡献8.3pp，代理网络搜索接地贡献3.2pp，双重意图消歧贡献1.5pp，总准确率达90.7%（比基线提升13.0pp）。系统已部署生产，服务超过95%的每日搜索展示。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为需要将基础模型接地到专有上下文和实时网络知识以解决模糊、上下文稀疏决策问题的应用建立了可推广的范式，解耦设计允许任何市场平台提供自己的接地源和解析规则而无需修改核心架构。

title: Explainable Continuous-Time Mask Refinement with Local Self-Similarity Priors for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate semantic segmentation of foot ulcers is essential for automated wound monitoring, yet boundary delineation remains challenging due to tissue heterogeneity and poor contrast with surrounding skin. To overcome the limitations of standard intensity-based networks, we present LSS-LTCNet:an ante-hoc explainable framework synergizing deterministic structural priors with continuous-time neural dynamics. Our architecture departs from traditional black-box models by employing a Local Self-Similarity (LSS) mechanism that extracts dense, illumination-invariant texture descriptors to explicitly disentangle necrotic tissue from background artifacts. To enforce topological precision, we introduce a Liquid Time-Constant (LTC) refinement module that treats boundary evolution as an ODEgoverned dynamic system, iteratively refining masks over continuous time-steps. Comprehensive evaluation on the MICCAI FUSeg dataset demonstrates that LSS-LTCNet achieves state-of-the-art boundary alignment, securing a peak Dice score of 86.96% and an exceptional 95th percentile Hausdorff Distance (HD95) of 8.91 pixels. Requiring merely 25.70M parameters, the model significantly outperforms heavier U-Net and transformer baselines in efficiency. By providing inherent visual audit trails alongside high-fidelity predictions, LSS-LTCNet offers a robust and transparent solution for computer-aided diagnosis in mobile healthcare (mHealth) settings.

AI.tldr: 提出LSS-LTCNet框架，结合局部自相似性机制和液态时间常数模块，用于足部溃疡语义分割，在MICCAI FUSeg数据集上达到86.96% Dice分数和8.91像素HD95，参数仅25.70M，优于传统模型。
AI.motivation: 足部溃疡语义分割对自动化伤口监测至关重要，但由于组织异质性和与周围皮肤对比度差，边界划分仍然具有挑战性。传统基于强度的网络存在局限性，需要更精确、可解释的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出LSS-LTCNet框架：1) 使用局部自相似性(LSS)机制提取密集、光照不变的纹理描述符，明确区分坏死组织和背景伪影；2) 引入液态时间常数(LTC)细化模块，将边界演化视为ODE控制的动态系统，在连续时间步长上迭代细化掩码。
AI.result: 在MICCAI FUSeg数据集上，LSS-LTCNet达到86.96% Dice分数和8.91像素HD95（95百分位Hausdorff距离），仅需25.70M参数，显著优于更重的U-Net和transformer基线模型。
AI.conclusion: LSS-LTCNet通过结合确定性结构先验和连续时间神经动力学，提供了可解释、高效且精确的足部溃疡分割解决方案，特别适用于移动医疗环境中的计算机辅助诊断。

title: PanCanBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models in Pancreatic Oncology
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved expert-level performance on standardized examinations, yet multiple-choice accuracy poorly reflects real-world clinical utility and safety. As patients and clinicians increasingly use LLMs for guidance on complex conditions such as pancreatic cancer, evaluation must extend beyond general medical knowledge. Existing frameworks, such as HealthBench, rely on simulated queries and lack disease-specific depth. Moreover, high rubric-based scores do not ensure factual correctness, underscoring the need to assess hallucinations. We developed a human-in-the-loop pipeline to create expert rubrics for de-identified patient questions from the Pancreatic Cancer Action Network (PanCAN). The resulting benchmark, PanCanBench, includes 3,130 question-specific criteria across 282 authentic patient questions. We evaluated 22 proprietary and open-source LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge framework, measuring clinical completeness, factual accuracy, and web-search integration. Models showed substantial variation in rubric-based completeness, with scores ranging from 46.5% to 82.3%. Factual errors were common, with hallucination rates (the percentages of responses containing at least one factual error) ranging from 6.0% for Gemini-2.5 Pro and GPT-4o to 53.8% for Llama-3.1-8B. Importantly, newer reasoning-optimized models did not consistently improve factuality: although o3 achieved the highest rubric score, it produced inaccuracies more frequently than other GPT-family models. Web-search integration did not inherently guarantee better responses. The average score changed from 66.8% to 63.9% for Gemini-2.5 Pro and from 73.8% to 72.8% for GPT-5 when web search was enabled. Synthetic AI-generated rubrics inflated absolute scores by 17.9 points on average while generally maintaining similar relative ranking.

AI.tldr: 开发了PanCanBench胰腺癌专业评估基准，测试22个LLM发现：模型在临床完整性上差异大（46.5%-82.3%），事实错误普遍（幻觉率6%-53.8%），新推理模型未改善事实准确性，网络搜索集成无显著提升，AI生成评分标准会虚高分数。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在标准化考试中表现优异，但多选题准确性无法反映真实临床效用和安全性。随着患者和临床医生越来越多地使用LLM获取胰腺癌等复杂疾病的指导，评估需要超越一般医学知识。现有框架（如HealthBench）依赖模拟查询且缺乏疾病特异性深度，高评分不能确保事实正确性，凸显了评估幻觉的必要性。
AI.method: 开发了人机协作流程，基于胰腺癌行动网络（PanCAN）的去识别化患者问题创建专家评分标准。构建的PanCanBench包含282个真实患者问题的3,130个问题特定标准。使用LLM作为评判框架评估22个专有和开源LLM，测量临床完整性、事实准确性和网络搜索集成。
AI.result: 模型在基于评分标准的完整性上差异显著（46.5%-82.3%）。事实错误普遍，幻觉率从Gemini-2.5 Pro和GPT-4o的6.0%到Llama-3.1-8B的53.8%。新推理优化模型未持续改善事实性：o3获得最高评分但比GPT系列其他模型产生更多不准确信息。网络搜索集成未保证更好响应：Gemini-2.5 Pro平均分从66.8%降至63.9%，GPT-5从73.8%降至72.8%。AI生成评分标准使绝对分数平均虚高17.9分。
AI.conclusion: 需要针对特定疾病的评估基准来准确评估LLM的临床实用性。仅靠评分标准完整性不足以确保安全，事实准确性至关重要。网络搜索集成不一定改善响应质量，AI生成评分标准会虚高评估结果。这些发现强调了在医疗AI部署中需要更细致的评估方法。

title: Reward-Modulated Local Learning in Spiking Encoders: Controlled Benchmarks with STDP and Hybrid Rate Readouts
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
summary: This paper presents a controlled empirical study of biologically motivated local learning for handwritten digit recognition. We evaluate an STDP-inspired competitive proxy and a practical hybrid benchmark built on the same spiking population encoder. The proxy is motivated by leaky integrate-and-fire E/I circuit models with three-factor delayed reward modulation. The hybrid update is local in pre x post rates but uses supervised labels and no timing-based credit assignment. On sklearn digits, fixed-seed evaluation shows classical pixel baselines from 98.06 to 98.22% accuracy, while local spike-based models reach 86.39 +/- 4.75% (hybrid default) and 87.17 +/- 3.74% (STDP-style competitive proxy). Ablations identify normalization and reward-shaping settings as the strongest observed levers, with a best hybrid ablation of 95.52 +/- 1.11%. A network-free synthetic temporal benchmark supports the same timing-versus-rate interpretation under matched local-update training. A descriptive 2x2 analysis further shows reward-shaping effects can reverse sign across stabilization regimes, so reward-shaping conclusions should be reported jointly with normalization settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过控制实验研究了生物启发的局部学习在手写数字识别中的应用，比较了STDP风格的竞争代理和混合基准方法，发现局部脉冲模型准确率可达87%左右，最佳混合消融达到95.5%，并强调了奖励塑造和归一化设置的联合重要性。
AI.motivation: 研究生物启发的局部学习算法在手写数字识别任务中的实际效果，特别是基于脉冲时序依赖可塑性（STDP）的竞争代理与混合方法的比较，探索局部学习在机器学习中的潜力。
AI.method: 使用sklearn手写数字数据集，构建基于脉冲群体编码器的模型。比较两种方法：1）STDP启发的竞争代理（基于漏积分发放E/I电路模型，具有三因子延迟奖励调制）；2）混合基准（使用监督标签，基于前-后发放率的局部更新，无时序信用分配）。通过固定种子评估、消融实验和网络无关的合成时序基准进行分析。
AI.result: 传统像素基线准确率为98.06-98.22%，局部脉冲模型：混合默认方法86.39±4.75%，STDP风格竞争代理87.17±3.74%。最佳混合消融达到95.52±1.11%。研究发现归一化和奖励塑造设置是最重要的影响因素，奖励塑造效果在不同稳定化机制下可能反转符号。
AI.conclusion: 局部脉冲学习模型在手写数字识别中能达到接近传统方法的性能，但需要仔细调整归一化和奖励塑造参数。奖励塑造的结论必须与归一化设置联合报告，因为两者存在相互作用。生物启发的局部学习在机器学习中具有实际应用潜力。

title: LLM-assisted Semantic Option Discovery for Facilitating Adaptive Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Despite achieving remarkable success in complex tasks, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is still suffering from critical issues in practical applications, such as low data efficiency, lack of interpretability, and limited cross-environment transferability. However, the learned policy generating actions based on states are sensitive to the environmental changes, struggling to guarantee behavioral safety and compliance. Recent research shows that integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with symbolic planning is promising in addressing these challenges. Inspired by this, we introduce a novel LLM-driven closed-loop framework, which enables semantic-driven skill reuse and real-time constraint monitoring by mapping natural language instructions into executable rules and semantically annotating automatically created options. The proposed approach utilizes the general knowledge of LLMs to facilitate exploration efficiency and adapt to transferable options for similar environments, and provides inherent interpretability through semantic annotations. To validate the effectiveness of this framework, we conduct experiments on two domains, Office World and Montezuma's Revenge, respectively. The results demonstrate superior performance in data efficiency, constraint compliance, and cross-task transferability.

AI.tldr: 提出LLM驱动的闭环框架，通过自然语言指令映射为可执行规则和语义标注选项，解决DRL的数据效率低、可解释性差和跨环境迁移能力有限的问题
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在实际应用中存在数据效率低、缺乏可解释性、跨环境迁移能力有限等问题，且学习到的策略对环境变化敏感，难以保证行为安全和合规性。近期研究表明，将大语言模型与符号规划结合有望解决这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出LLM驱动的闭环框架，将自然语言指令映射为可执行规则，自动创建选项并进行语义标注，实现语义驱动的技能重用和实时约束监控。利用LLM的通用知识促进探索效率，为相似环境适配可迁移选项，并通过语义标注提供内在可解释性。
AI.result: 在Office World和Montezuma's Revenge两个领域进行实验验证，结果显示在数据效率、约束合规性和跨任务迁移能力方面表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的闭环框架有效解决了DRL的多个关键问题，通过语义驱动的技能重用和实时约束监控，显著提升了数据效率、可解释性和跨环境迁移能力。

title: ReMoT: Reinforcement Learning with Motion Contrast Triplets
summary: We present ReMoT, a unified training paradigm to systematically address the fundamental shortcomings of VLMs in spatio-temporal consistency -- a critical failure point in navigation, robotics, and autonomous driving. ReMoT integrates two core components: (1) A rule-based automatic framework that generates ReMoT-16K, a large-scale (16.5K triplets) motion-contrast dataset derived from video meta-annotations, surpassing costly manual or model-based generation. (2) Group Relative Policy Optimization, which we empirically validate yields optimal performance and data efficiency for learning this contrastive reasoning, far exceeding standard Supervised Fine-Tuning. We also construct the first benchmark for fine-grained motion contrast triplets to measure a VLM's discrimination of subtle motion attributes (e.g., opposing directions). The resulting model achieves state-of-the-art performance on our new benchmark and multiple standard VLM benchmarks, culminating in a remarkable 25.1% performance leap on spatio-temporal reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: ReMoT提出统一训练范式解决VLM时空一致性缺陷，通过自动生成大规模运动对比数据集和组相对策略优化，在时空推理任务上实现25.1%性能提升。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉语言模型在时空一致性方面的根本缺陷，这是导航、机器人和自动驾驶中的关键失败点。
AI.method: 包含两个核心组件：1) 基于规则的自动框架生成ReMoT-16K大规模运动对比数据集；2) 组相对策略优化方法，比标准监督微调更高效。
AI.result: 创建首个细粒度运动对比三元组基准测试，在新基准和多个标准VLM基准上达到最先进性能，时空推理任务性能提升25.1%。
AI.conclusion: ReMoT通过系统化方法有效解决了VLM的时空一致性缺陷，为导航和自动驾驶等应用提供了重要改进。

title: Toward Graph-Tokenizing Large Language Models with Reconstructive Graph Instruction Tuning
summary: The remarkable success of large language models (LLMs) has motivated researchers to adapt them as universal predictors for various graph-related tasks, with the ultimate goal of developing a graph foundation model that generalizes diverse scenarios. The key challenge is to align graph data with language spaces so that LLMs can better comprehend graphs. As a popular paradigm, Graph-Tokenizing LLMs (GTokenLLMs) encode complex structures and lengthy texts into a graph token sequence, and then align them with text tokens via language instructions tuning. Despite their initial success, our information-theoretic analysis reveals that existing GTokenLLMs rely solely on text supervision from language instructions, which achieve only implicit graph-text alignment, resulting in a text-dominant bias that underutilizes graph context. To overcome this limitation, we first prove that the alignment objective is upper-bounded by the mutual information between the input graphs and their hidden representations in the LLM, which motivates us to improve this upper bound to achieve better alignment. To this end, we further propose a reconstructive graph instruction tuning pipeline, RGLM. Our key idea is to reconstruct the graph information from the LLM's graph token outputs, explicitly incorporating graph supervision to constrain the alignment process. Technically, we embody RGLM by exploring three distinct variants from two complementary perspectives: RGLM-Decoder from the input space; RGLM-Similarizer and RGLM-Denoiser from the latent space. Additionally, we theoretically analyze the alignment effectiveness of each variant. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks and task scenarios validate the effectiveness of the proposed RGLM, paving the way for new directions in GTokenLLMs' alignment research.

AI.tldr: 提出RGLM方法，通过重构图信息来改进图-文本对齐，解决现有GTokenLLMs中文本主导偏差的问题
AI.motivation: 现有Graph-Tokenizing LLMs仅依赖文本监督实现隐式图-文本对齐，导致文本主导偏差，未能充分利用图上下文信息
AI.method: 提出重构图指令调优管道RGLM，从LLM的图token输出中重构图信息，显式加入图监督。包含三个变体：输入空间的RGLM-Decoder，潜在空间的RGLM-Similarizer和RGLM-Denoiser
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和任务场景中的广泛实验验证了RGLM的有效性
AI.conclusion: RGLM为GTokenLLMs对齐研究开辟了新方向，通过显式图监督改进了图-文本对齐效果

title: Frozen Policy Iteration: Computationally Efficient RL under Linear $Q^π$ Realizability for Deterministic Dynamics
summary:
We study computationally and statistically efficient reinforcement learning under the linear $Q^π$ realizability assumption, where any policy's $Q$-function is linear in a given state-action feature representation. Prior methods in this setting are either computationally intractable, or require (local) access to a simulator. In this paper, we propose a computationally efficient online RL algorithm, named Frozen Policy Iteration, under the linear $Q^π$ realizability setting that works for Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with stochastic initial states, stochastic rewards and deterministic transitions. Our algorithm achieves a regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{d^2H^6T})$, where $d$ is the dimensionality of the feature space, $H$ is the horizon length, and $T$ is the total number of episodes. Our regret bound is optimal for linear (contextual) bandits which is a special case of our setting with $H = 1$.
  Existing policy iteration algorithms under the same setting heavily rely on repeatedly sampling the same state by access to the simulator, which is not implementable in the online setting with stochastic initial states studied in this paper. In contrast, our new algorithm circumvents this limitation by strategically using only high-confidence part of the trajectory data and freezing the policy for well-explored states, which ensures that all data used by our algorithm remains effectively on-policy during the whole course of learning. We further demonstrate the versatility of our approach by extending it to the Uniform-PAC setting and to function classes with bounded eluder dimension.

AI.tldr: 提出Frozen Policy Iteration算法，在线性Q^π可实现性假设下，实现计算高效、无需模拟器的在线强化学习，达到最优遗憾界
AI.motivation: 现有在线性Q^π可实现性假设下的方法要么计算不可行，要么需要模拟器访问权限，无法处理具有随机初始状态的实际在线设置
AI.method: 提出Frozen Policy Iteration算法，通过策略性地使用高置信度轨迹数据和对已充分探索状态冻结策略，确保所有数据在整个学习过程中保持有效同策略
AI.result: 算法达到遗憾界$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{d^2H^6T})$，在线性上下文赌博机特例下(H=1)达到最优，且可扩展到Uniform-PAC和有界eluder维度的函数类
AI.conclusion: 该算法在无需模拟器的情况下解决了线性Q^π可实现性设置中的计算效率问题，为具有随机初始状态的MDP提供了实用的在线RL解决方案

title: Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts with Retrieval Augmentation for Protein Active Site Identification
summary: Accurate identification of protein active sites at the residue level is crucial for understanding protein function and advancing drug discovery. However, current methods face two critical challenges: vulnerability in single-instance prediction due to sparse training data, and inadequate modality reliability estimation that leads to performance degradation when unreliable modalities dominate fusion processes. To address these challenges, we introduce Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts with Retrieval Augmentation (MERA), the first retrieval-augmented framework for protein active site identification. MERA employs hierarchical multi-expert retrieval that dynamically aggregates contextual information from chain, sequence, and active-site perspectives through residue-level mixture-of-experts gating. To prevent modality degradation, we propose a reliability-aware fusion strategy based on Dempster-Shafer evidence theory that quantifies modality trustworthiness through belief mass functions and learnable discounting coefficients, enabling principled multimodal integration. Extensive experiments on ProTAD-Gen and TS125 datasets demonstrate that MERA achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 90% AUPRC on active site prediction and significant gains on peptide-binding site identification, validating the effectiveness of retrieval-augmented multi-expert modeling and reliability-guided fusion.

AI.tldr: MERA：首个用于蛋白质活性位点识别的检索增强多模态专家混合框架，通过层次化多专家检索和可靠性感知融合解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前蛋白质活性位点识别方法面临两个关键挑战：1）由于训练数据稀疏导致的单实例预测脆弱性；2）模态可靠性估计不足，导致不可靠模态主导融合过程时性能下降。
AI.method: 提出MERA框架：1）采用层次化多专家检索，通过残基级专家混合门控动态聚合链、序列和活性位点视角的上下文信息；2）基于Dempster-Shafer证据理论提出可靠性感知融合策略，通过置信质量函数和可学习折扣系数量化模态可信度，实现原则性多模态集成。
AI.result: 在ProTAD-Gen和TS125数据集上的实验表明，MERA在活性位点预测上达到90%的AUPRC，在肽结合位点识别上取得显著提升，验证了检索增强多专家建模和可靠性引导融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MERA通过检索增强的多专家框架和可靠性感知融合策略，成功解决了蛋白质活性位点识别中的关键挑战，实现了最先进的性能，为蛋白质功能理解和药物发现提供了有力工具。

title: OPGAgent: An Agent for Auditable Dental Panoramic X-ray Interpretation
summary: Orthopantomograms (OPGs) are the standard panoramic radiograph in dentistry, used for full-arch screening across multiple diagnostic tasks. While Vision Language Models (VLMs) now allow multi-task OPG analysis through natural language, they underperform task-specific models on most individual tasks. Agentic systems that orchestrate specialized tools offer a path to both versatility and accuracy, this approach remains unexplored in the field of dental imaging. To address this gap, we propose OPGAgent, a multi-tool agentic system for auditable OPG interpretation. OPGAgent coordinates specialized perception modules with a consensus mechanism through three components: (1) a Hierarchical Evidence Gathering module that decomposes OPG analysis into global, quadrant, and tooth-level phases with dynamically invoking tools, (2) a Specialized Toolbox encapsulating spatial, detection, utility, and expert zoos, and (3) a Consensus Subagent that resolves conflicts through anatomical constraints. We further propose OPG-Bench, a structured-report protocol based on (Location, Field, Value) triples derived from real clinical reports, which enables a comprehensive review of findings and hallucinations, extending beyond the limitations of VQA indicators. On our OPG-Bench and the public MMOral-OPG benchmark, OPGAgent outperforms current dental VLMs and medical agent frameworks across both structured-report and VQA evaluation. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: OPGAgent是一个用于全景牙科X光片（OPG）分析的多工具智能体系统，通过协调专业感知模块和共识机制，在保持多功能性的同时提升诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型（VLMs）可以通过自然语言进行多任务OPG分析，但在大多数个体任务上表现不如任务专用模型。智能体系统能够协调专用工具，既能保持多功能性又能提高准确性，但这种方法在牙科影像领域尚未被探索。
AI.method: OPGAgent包含三个核心组件：(1)分层证据收集模块，将OPG分析分解为全局、象限和牙齿级别的阶段，并动态调用工具；(2)专用工具箱，封装空间、检测、实用和专家工具；(3)共识子智能体，通过解剖学约束解决冲突。同时提出了基于临床报告的三元组（位置、领域、值）的OPG-Bench结构化报告协议。
AI.result: 在OPG-Bench和公开的MMOral-OPG基准测试中，OPGAgent在结构化报告和视觉问答评估方面均优于当前的牙科VLMs和医疗智能体框架。
AI.conclusion: OPGAgent通过协调专业工具和共识机制，为牙科全景X光片分析提供了一个既多功能又准确的可审计智能体系统，填补了该领域智能体方法的空白。

title: Quantifying Conversational Reliability of Large Language Models under Multi-Turn Interaction
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Assessing and Improving Reliability of Foundation Models in the Real World (AAAI 2026)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications where users engage in extended, mixed-topic conversations that depend on prior context. Yet, their reliability under realistic multi-turn interactions remains poorly understood. We conduct a systematic evaluation of conversational reliability through three representative tasks that reflect practical interaction challenges: (1) maintaining global constraints across topic shifts, (2) selecting the correct tool or agent amid interleaved intents, and (3) tracking structured entities under revisions and distractions. Each task pairs single-turn and multi-turn settings, allowing us to quantify reliability degradation under extended dialogue. Across both commercial and open-source models, we observe substantial declines in reliability, particularly for smaller models. Error analyses reveal recurring failure modes such as instruction drift, intent confusion, and contextual overwriting, which compromise dependable behavior in operational systems. Our findings highlight the need for stress-testing LLMs for conversational reliability and developing more robust evaluation methods for trustworthy deployment.

AI.tldr: 论文系统评估了LLM在多轮对话中的可靠性，发现随着对话轮数增加，模型可靠性显著下降，特别是较小模型表现更差，揭示了指令漂移、意图混淆等常见失败模式。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地部署在需要多轮、多主题对话的现实应用中，但它们在真实多轮交互中的可靠性尚未得到充分理解。需要系统评估LLM在扩展对话中的可靠性表现。
AI.method: 通过三个代表性任务进行系统评估：1)跨主题转移时维持全局约束；2)在交错意图中选择正确工具或代理；3)在修订和干扰下跟踪结构化实体。每个任务都配对单轮和多轮设置，量化扩展对话中的可靠性下降。
AI.result: 在商业和开源模型中观察到可靠性显著下降，特别是较小模型下降更明显。错误分析揭示了指令漂移、意图混淆和上下文覆盖等重复出现的失败模式，这些会损害操作系统的可靠行为。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调需要对LLM进行对话可靠性的压力测试，并开发更稳健的评估方法以实现可信部署。

title: MARS: Harmonizing Multimodal Convergence via Adaptive Rank Search
comment: 17 pages; Project Page: this https URL: https://minkyoungcho.github.io/mars/
summary: Fine-tuning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with parameter-efficient methods like Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is crucial for task adaptation. However, imbalanced training dynamics across modalities often lead to suboptimal accuracy due to negative interference, a challenge typically addressed with inefficient heuristic methods such as manually tuning separate learning rates. To overcome this, we introduce MARS (Multimodal Adaptive Rank Search), an approach to discover optimal rank pairs that balance training dynamics while maximizing performance. Our key innovation, a proposed framework of dual scaling laws, enables this search: one law models module-specific convergence time to prune the search space to candidates with aligned dynamics, while the other predicts final task performance to select the optimal pair from the pruned set. By re-purposing the LoRA rank as a controller for modality-specific convergence speed, MARS outperforms baseline methods and provides a robust, automated strategy for optimizing MLLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: MARS：一种通过双尺度定律自动搜索最优LoRA秩对的方法，用于平衡多模态大语言模型微调中的训练动态，避免模态间负干扰
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型使用LoRA等参数高效方法进行微调时，不同模态间不平衡的训练动态会导致负干扰和次优精度，而现有手动调整学习率的方法效率低下且依赖启发式
AI.method: 提出MARS方法，利用双尺度定律框架：第一个定律建模模块特定收敛时间以剪枝搜索空间，第二个定律预测最终任务性能以从剪枝集中选择最优秩对；将LoRA秩重新用作模态特定收敛速度的控制器
AI.result: MARS在平衡训练动态的同时最大化性能，优于基线方法，为MLLM微调优化提供了稳健的自动化策略
AI.conclusion: MARS通过双尺度定律自动搜索最优LoRA秩对，有效解决了多模态大语言模型微调中的训练动态不平衡问题，提供了一种高效、自动化的优化方法
