We start by briefly describing CL and SML and unifying the languages of the two frameworks. We then present the key features of SCL. We finally highlight the importance of bridging the two communities to advance the field of intelligent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了流式持续学习（SCL）框架，将持续学习（CL）和流式机器学习（SML）的优势结合起来，用于处理动态环境中不断产生和变化的数据流。
AI.motivation: 在动态环境中开发有效的预测模型面临挑战，因为数据持续产生且不断变化。持续学习（CL）和流式机器学习（SML）都致力于解决这一难题，但各自有不同的侧重点和方法。
AI.method: 提出流式持续学习（SCL）的统一框架，整合CL和SML的优势：快速适应非平稳数据流同时不遗忘先前知识。首先统一两个框架的语言描述，然后阐述SCL的关键特征。
AI.result: 建立了连接持续学习和流式机器学习社区的桥梁，提出了一个能够同时处理数据流适应性和知识保留的统一框架，为智能系统领域的发展提供了新方向。
AI.conclusion: SCL不是要取代CL或SML，而是扩展这两个领域的技术和方法。通过统一两个社区，可以推动智能系统领域的进步，特别是在动态环境下的机器学习应用。

title: GeodesicNVS: Probability Density Geodesic Flow Matching for Novel View Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have substantially enhanced novel view synthesis, yet maintaining consistency across viewpoints remains challenging. Diffusion-based models rely on stochastic noise-to-data transitions, which obscure deterministic structures and yield inconsistent view predictions. We propose a Data-to-Data Flow Matching framework that learns deterministic transformations directly between paired views, enhancing view-consistent synthesis through explicit data coupling. To further enhance geometric coherence, we introduce Probability Density Geodesic Flow Matching (PDG-FM), which constrains flow trajectories using geodesic interpolants derived from probability density metrics of pretrained diffusion models. Such alignment with high-density regions of the data manifold promotes more realistic interpolants between samples. Empirically, our method surpasses diffusion-based NVS baselines, demonstrating improved structural coherence and smoother transitions across views. These results highlight the advantages of incorporating data-dependent geometric regularization into deterministic flow matching for consistent novel view generation.

AI.tldr: 提出Data-to-Data Flow Matching框架，通过概率密度测地线流匹配增强几何一致性，改进多视角合成的一致性
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的新视角合成方法存在视角不一致问题，因为随机噪声到数据的转换过程掩盖了确定性结构，导致视角预测不一致
AI.method: 提出Data-to-Data Flow Matching框架，直接在配对视角间学习确定性变换；引入Probability Density Geodesic Flow Matching，利用预训练扩散模型的概率密度度量推导测地线插值来约束流轨迹
AI.result: 方法超越了基于扩散模型的新视角合成基线，展示了改进的结构一致性和更平滑的视角过渡
AI.conclusion: 将数据依赖的几何正则化融入确定性流匹配中，对一致的新视角生成具有优势

title: DynaMoE: Dynamic Token-Level Expert Activation with Layer-Wise Adaptive Capacity for Mixture-of-Experts Neural Networks
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a powerful paradigm for scaling neural networks while maintaining computational efficiency. However, standard MoE implementations rely on two rigid design assumptions: (1) fixed Top-K routing where exactly K experts are activated per token, and (2) uniform expert allocation across all layers. This paper introduces DynaMoE, a novel MoE framework that relaxes both constraints through dynamic token-level expert activation and layer-wise adaptive capacity allocation. DynaMoE introduces a principled routing mechanism where the number of active experts per token varies based on input complexity. Concurrently, the framework implements six distinct scheduling strategies for distributing expert capacity across network depth, including descending, ascending, pyramid, and wave patterns. We theoretically analyze the expressivity gains of dynamic routing and derive bounds on computational efficiency. Through extensive experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10 (image classification), and Recycling-the-Web (language modeling) across multiple model scales, we demonstrate that DynaMoE achieves superior parameter efficiency compared to static baselines. Our key finding is that optimal expert schedules are task- and scale-dependent: descending schedules (concentrating capacity in early layers) outperform uniform baselines on image classification. For language modeling, optimal schedules vary by model size, descending for Tiny, ascending for Small, and uniform for Medium. Furthermore, dynamic routing reduces gradient variance during training, leading to improved convergence stability. DynaMoE establishes a new framework for adaptive computation in neural networks, providing principled guidance for MoE architecture design.

AI.tldr: DynaMoE：动态MoE框架，通过动态令牌级专家激活和分层自适应容量分配，打破传统MoE的固定Top-K路由和均匀专家分配限制，实现更好的参数效率和收敛稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE架构存在两个刚性设计假设：(1) 固定Top-K路由（每个令牌激活固定K个专家），(2) 所有层均匀分配专家容量。这些限制可能不是最优的，因为不同输入复杂度和网络深度可能需要不同的专家分配策略。
AI.method: 提出DynaMoE框架，包含两个核心创新：1) 动态令牌级专家激活机制，根据输入复杂度动态调整每个令牌激活的专家数量；2) 六种分层自适应容量分配策略（下降、上升、金字塔、波浪等模式），用于在不同网络深度分配专家容量。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10（图像分类）和Recycling-the-Web（语言建模）多个模型规模上的实验表明：1) DynaMoE相比静态基线具有更好的参数效率；2) 最优专家分配策略与任务和模型规模相关：图像分类中下降策略（早期层集中容量）表现最佳；语言建模中，Tiny模型用下降策略，Small模型用上升策略，Medium模型用均匀策略；3) 动态路由减少了训练中的梯度方差，提高了收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: DynaMoE为神经网络中的自适应计算建立了新框架，为MoE架构设计提供了原则性指导，证明了动态路由和分层自适应容量分配的有效性，最优策略具有任务和规模依赖性。

title: Implementation of Licensed Plate Detection and Noise Removal in Image Processing
comment: 13 pages. This is the author's version, accepted manuscript
summary: Car license plate recognition system is an image processing technology used to identify vehicles by capturing their Car License Plates. The car license plate recognition technology is also known as automatic number-plate recognition, automatic vehicle identification, car license plate recognition or optical character recognition for cars. In Malaysia, as the number of vehicle is increasing rapidly nowadays, a pretty great number of vehicle on the road has brought about the considerable demands of car license plate recognition system. Car license plate recognition system can be implemented in electronic parking payment system, highway toll-fee system, traffic surveillance system and as police enforcement tools. Additionally, car license plate recognition system technology also has potential to be combined with various techniques in other different fields like biology, aerospace and so on to achieve the goal of solving some specialized problems.

AI.tldr: 马来西亚车牌识别系统综述：介绍车牌识别技术及其在交通管理、执法等领域的应用
AI.motivation: 马来西亚车辆数量快速增长，道路车辆增多导致对车牌识别系统的需求显著增加，需要有效的车辆识别技术来支持交通管理和执法
AI.method: 本文主要是一篇综述性论文，介绍了车牌识别系统作为图像处理技术的基本概念，包括自动车牌识别、车辆自动识别、车牌识别或汽车光学字符识别等技术
AI.result: 论文阐述了车牌识别系统在马来西亚的多种应用场景，包括电子停车支付系统、高速公路收费系统、交通监控系统和警察执法工具，并指出该技术还可与其他领域技术结合解决专门问题
AI.conclusion: 车牌识别系统在马来西亚具有重要应用价值，随着车辆数量增长，该技术将在交通管理、执法和其他专业领域发挥越来越重要的作用

title: RaUF: Learning the Spatial Uncertainty Field of Radar
summary: Millimeter-wave radar offers unique advantages in adverse weather but suffers from low spatial fidelity, severe azimuth ambiguity, and clutter-induced spurious returns. Existing methods mainly focus on improving spatial perception effectiveness via coarse-to-fine cross-modal supervision, yet often overlook the ambiguous feature-to-label mapping, which may lead to ill-posed geometric inference and pose fundamental challenges to downstream perception tasks. In this work, we propose RaUF, a spatial uncertainty field learning framework that models radar measurements through their physically grounded anisotropic properties. To resolve conflicting feature-to-label mapping, we design an anisotropic probabilistic model that learns fine-grained uncertainty. To further enhance reliability, we propose a Bidirectional Domain Attention mechanism that exploits the mutual complementarity between spatial structure and Doppler consistency, effectively suppressing spurious or multipath-induced reflections. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that RaUF delivers highly reliable spatial detections with well-calibrated uncertainty. Moreover, downstream case studies further validate the enhanced reliability and scalability of RaUF under challenging real-world driving scenarios.

AI.tldr: RaUF是一个毫米波雷达空间不确定性场学习框架，通过物理基础的各向异性特性建模雷达测量，解决特征到标签的模糊映射问题，提供高可靠性的空间检测。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达在恶劣天气下具有优势，但存在空间保真度低、方位模糊严重、杂波引起的虚假回波等问题。现有方法主要通过粗到细的跨模态监督提高空间感知效果，但往往忽略了模糊的特征到标签映射，这可能导致不适定的几何推理，并对下游感知任务构成根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出RaUF框架，设计各向异性概率模型学习细粒度不确定性；提出双向域注意力机制，利用空间结构和多普勒一致性之间的互补性，有效抑制虚假或多径引起的反射。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试和真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，RaUF能够提供具有良好校准不确定性的高可靠性空间检测。下游案例研究进一步验证了RaUF在具有挑战性的真实世界驾驶场景下的增强可靠性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: RaUF通过建模雷达测量的物理基础各向异性特性，解决了特征到标签的模糊映射问题，提供了高可靠性的空间检测，并在真实驾驶场景中表现出增强的可靠性和可扩展性。

title: Decentralized Federated Learning by Partial Message Exchange
summary: Decentralized federated learning (DFL) has emerged as a transformative server-free paradigm that enables collaborative learning over large-scale heterogeneous networks. However, it continues to face fundamental challenges, including data heterogeneity, restrictive assumptions for theoretical analysis, and degraded convergence when standard communication- or privacyenhancing techniques are applied. To overcome these drawbacks, this paper develops a novel algorithm, PaME (DFL by Partial Message Exchange). The central principle is to allow only randomly selected sparse coordinates to be exchanged between two neighbor nodes. Consequently, PaME achieves substantial reductions in communication costs while still preserving a high level of privacy, without sacrificing accuracy. Moreover, grounded in rigorous analysis, the algorithm is shown to converge at a linear rate under the gradient to be locally Lipschitz continuous and the communication matrix to be doubly stochastic. These two mild assumptions not only dispense with many restrictive conditions commonly imposed by existing DFL methods but also enables PaME to effectively address data heterogeneity. Furthermore, comprehensive numerical experiments demonstrate its superior performance compared with several representative decentralized learning algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出PaME算法，通过随机选择稀疏坐标进行部分消息交换，在降低通信成本的同时保持隐私和准确性，并能有效处理数据异构性。
AI.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习面临数据异构性、理论分析限制性假设以及应用标准通信或隐私增强技术时收敛性下降等挑战，需要开发更高效、实用的算法。
AI.method: 提出PaME算法，核心思想是仅允许两个相邻节点之间交换随机选择的稀疏坐标，实现通信成本大幅降低，同时保持隐私保护和准确性。
AI.result: PaME在线性收敛率下收敛，仅需梯度局部Lipschitz连续和通信矩阵双重随机两个温和假设，摆脱了现有方法的许多限制性条件，能有效处理数据异构性。
AI.conclusion: PaME算法通过部分消息交换机制，在降低通信成本、保护隐私的同时保持准确性，为去中心化联邦学习提供了一种高效实用的解决方案。

title: Content-Aware Frequency Encoding for Implicit Neural Representations with Fourier-Chebyshev Features
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for various signal processing tasks, but their inherent spectral bias limits the ability to capture high-frequency details. Existing methods partially mitigate this issue by using Fourier-based features, which usually rely on fixed frequency bases. This forces multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to inefficiently compose the required frequencies, thereby constraining their representational capacity. To address this limitation, we propose Content-Aware Frequency Encoding (CAFE), which builds upon Fourier features through multiple parallel linear layers combined via a Hadamard product. CAFE can explicitly and efficiently synthesize a broader range of frequency bases, while the learned weights enable the selection of task-relevant frequencies. Furthermore, we extend this framework to CAFE+, which incorporates Chebyshev features as a complementary component to Fourier bases. This combination provides a stronger and more stable frequency representation. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach, consistently achieving superior performance over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/JunboKe0619/CAFE.

AI.tldr: CAFE提出内容感知频率编码，通过并行线性层和Hadamard积扩展傅里叶特征，能显式合成更广频率基并选择任务相关频率，CAFE+进一步结合切比雪夫特征，提升隐式神经表示的高频细节捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经表示(INRs)存在频谱偏差问题，难以捕捉高频细节。现有方法使用固定频率基的傅里叶特征，迫使MLP低效组合所需频率，限制了表示能力。
AI.method: 提出CAFE：在傅里叶特征基础上，通过多个并行线性层结合Hadamard积，显式高效合成更广频率基，学习权重选择任务相关频率。进一步扩展为CAFE+，结合切比雪夫特征作为傅里叶基的补充，提供更强更稳定的频率表示。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验验证了方法的有效性和效率，始终优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CAFE和CAFE+通过内容感知频率编码有效解决了INRs的频谱偏差问题，提升了高频细节的捕捉能力，为信号处理任务提供了更强大的表示框架。

title: CA-AFP: Cluster-Aware Adaptive Federated Pruning
summary:
Federated Learning (FL) faces major challenges in real-world deployments due to statistical heterogeneity across clients and system heterogeneity arising from resource-constrained devices. While clustering-based approaches mitigate statistical heterogeneity and pruning techniques improve memory and communication efficiency, these strategies are typically studied in isolation.
  We propose CA-AFP, a unified framework that jointly addresses both challenges by performing cluster-specific model pruning. In CA-AFP, clients are first grouped into clusters, and a separate model for each cluster is adaptively pruned during training. The framework introduces two key innovations: (1) a cluster-aware importance scoring mechanism that combines weight magnitude, intra-cluster coherence, and gradient consistency to identify parameters for pruning, and (2) an iterative pruning schedule that progressively removes parameters while enabling model self-healing through weight regrowth.
  We evaluate CA-AFP on two widely used human activity recognition benchmarks, UCI HAR and WISDM, under natural user-based federated partitions. Experimental results demonstrate that CA-AFP achieves a favorable balance between predictive accuracy, inter-client fairness, and communication efficiency. Compared to pruning-based baselines, CA-AFP consistently improves accuracy and lower performance disparity across clients with limited fine-tuning, while requiring substantially less communication than dense clustering-based methods. It also shows robustness to different Non-IID levels of data. Finally, ablation studies analyze the impact of clustering, pruning schedules and scoring mechanism offering practical insights into the design of efficient and adaptive FL systems.

AI.tldr: CA-AFP是一个统一的联邦学习框架，通过集群感知的自适应剪枝同时解决统计异构性和系统异构性问题，在保持预测准确性的同时提高通信效率和客户端间公平性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界联邦学习部署面临两大挑战：客户端间的统计异构性（数据分布不均）和资源受限设备带来的系统异构性。现有方法通常孤立地处理这两个问题，缺乏统一解决方案。
AI.method: 提出CA-AFP框架，首先将客户端分组为集群，然后为每个集群执行自适应模型剪枝。包含两个关键创新：1) 集群感知的重要性评分机制，结合权重大小、集群内一致性和梯度一致性来识别待剪枝参数；2) 迭代剪枝调度，逐步移除参数同时允许权重重新生长实现模型自愈。
AI.result: 在UCI HAR和WISDM人类活动识别基准测试中，CA-AFP在预测准确性、客户端间公平性和通信效率之间取得了良好平衡。相比剪枝基线方法，CA-AFP在有限微调下提高了准确性并降低了性能差异，同时比密集聚类方法显著减少了通信量，并对不同非IID数据水平表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CA-AFP提供了一个统一框架，通过集群感知的自适应剪枝同时解决联邦学习中的统计和系统异构性问题，为设计高效自适应联邦学习系统提供了实用见解。

title: Vision-Language Feature Alignment for Road Anomaly Segmentation
summary: Safe autonomous systems in complex environments require robust road anomaly segmentation to identify unknown obstacles. However, existing approaches often rely on pixel-level statistics to determine whether a region appears anomalous. This reliance leads to high false-positive rates on semantically normal background regions such as sky or vegetation, and poor recall of true Out-of-distribution (OOD) instances, thereby posing safety risks for robotic perception and decision-making. To address these challenges, we propose VL-Anomaly, a vision-language anomaly segmentation framework that incorporates semantic priors from pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Specifically, we design a prompt learning-driven alignment module that adapts Mask2Forme's visual features to CLIP text embeddings of known categories, effectively suppressing spurious anomaly responses in background regions. At inference time, we further introduce a multi-source inference strategy that integrates text-guided similarity, CLIP-based image-text similarity and detector confidence, enabling more reliable anomaly prediction by leveraging complementary information sources. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VL-Anomaly achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets including RoadAnomaly, SMIYC and Fishyscapes.Code is released on https://github.com/NickHezhuolin/VL-aligner-Road-anomaly-segment.

AI.tldr: VL-Anomaly：基于视觉语言模型的语义先验增强道路异常分割框架，通过提示学习对齐模块和多源推理策略，显著降低背景误报率并提升异常检测召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有道路异常分割方法依赖像素级统计，导致在天空、植被等语义正常背景区域误报率高，对真实OOD实例召回率低，给机器人感知和决策带来安全风险。
AI.method: 提出VL-Anomaly框架：1）设计提示学习驱动的对齐模块，将Mask2Former视觉特征适配到已知类别的CLIP文本嵌入，抑制背景区域的虚假异常响应；2）推理时采用多源推理策略，整合文本引导相似性、CLIP图像-文本相似性和检测器置信度。
AI.result: 在RoadAnomaly、SMIYC和Fishyscapes等基准数据集上实现最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入预训练视觉语言模型的语义先验，VL-Anomaly有效解决了现有方法在背景误报和异常召回方面的局限性，为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的道路异常分割方案。

title: Rethinking Policy Diversity in Ensemble Policy Gradient in Large-Scale Reinforcement Learning
summary: Scaling reinforcement learning to tens of thousands of parallel environments requires overcoming the limited exploration capacity of a single policy. Ensemble-based policy gradient methods, which employ multiple policies to collect diverse samples, have recently been proposed to promote exploration. However, merely broadening the exploration space does not always enhance learning capability, since excessive exploration can reduce exploration quality or compromise training stability. In this work, we theoretically analyze the impact of inter-policy diversity on learning efficiency in policy ensembles, and propose Coupled Policy Optimization which regulates diversity through KL constraints between policies. The proposed method enables effective exploration and outperforms strong baselines such as SAPG, PBT, and PPO across multiple tasks, including challenging dexterous manipulation, in terms of both sample efficiency and final performance. Furthermore, analysis of policy diversity and effective sample size during training reveals that follower policies naturally distribute around the leader, demonstrating the emergence of structured and efficient exploratory behavior. Our results indicate that diverse exploration under appropriate regulation is key to achieving stable and sample-efficient learning in ensemble policy gradient methods. Project page at https://naoki04.github.io/paper-cpo/ .

AI.tldr: 提出Coupled Policy Optimization方法，通过KL约束调节策略多样性，在集成策略梯度方法中实现稳定高效的探索
AI.motivation: 大规模并行强化学习需要克服单一策略探索能力有限的问题。集成策略梯度方法虽然能收集多样样本，但过度探索会降低探索质量或影响训练稳定性
AI.method: 理论分析策略间多样性对学习效率的影响，提出Coupled Policy Optimization方法，通过策略间的KL约束来调节多样性
AI.result: 在包括复杂灵巧操作在内的多个任务中，CPO在样本效率和最终性能上都优于SAPG、PBT、PPO等基线方法
AI.conclusion: 适当调控下的多样性探索是实现集成策略梯度方法稳定和样本高效学习的关键

title: Reparameterized Tensor Ring Functional Decomposition for Multi-Dimensional Data Recovery
comment: 22 pages, 18 figures, 12 tables. Accepted by CVPR 2026
summary: Tensor Ring (TR) decomposition is a powerful tool for high-order data modeling, but is inherently restricted to discrete forms defined on fixed meshgrids. In this work, we propose a TR functional decomposition for both meshgrid and non-meshgrid data, where factors are parameterized by Implicit Neural Representations (INRs). However, optimizing this continuous framework to capture fine-scale details is intrinsically difficult. Through a frequency-domain analysis, we demonstrate that the spectral structure of TR factors determines the frequency composition of the reconstructed tensor and limits the high-frequency modeling capacity. To mitigate this, we propose a reparameterized TR functional decomposition, in which each TR factor is a structured combination of a learnable latent tensor and a fixed basis. This reparameterization is theoretically shown to improve the training dynamics of TR factor learning. We further derive a principled initialization scheme for the fixed basis and prove the Lipschitz continuity of our proposed model. Extensive experiments on image inpainting, denoising, super-resolution, and point cloud recovery demonstrate that our method achieves consistently superior performance over existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/YangyangXu2002/RepTRFD.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种重新参数化的张量环函数分解方法，通过隐式神经表示参数化因子，改进训练动态并提升高频建模能力
AI.motivation: 传统张量环分解局限于离散网格数据，难以处理非网格数据，且优化连续框架捕捉细节存在困难
AI.method: 提出重新参数化的TR函数分解，每个TR因子由可学习潜在张量和固定基的结构化组合构成，并推导了固定基的初始化方案
AI.result: 在图像修复、去噪、超分辨率和点云恢复等任务上，相比现有方法取得了持续优越的性能
AI.conclusion: 重新参数化的TR函数分解方法能有效提升高频建模能力，改善训练动态，在多种视觉任务中表现优异

title: Discrete World Models via Regularization
summary: World models aim to capture the states and dynamics of an environment in a compact latent space. Moreover, using Boolean state representations is particularly useful for search heuristics and symbolic reasoning and planning. Existing approaches keep latents informative via decoder-based reconstruction, or instead via contrastive or reward signals. In this work, we introduce Discrete World Models via Regularization (DWMR): a reconstruction-free and contrastive-free method for unsupervised Boolean world-model learning. In particular, we introduce a novel world-modeling loss that couples latent prediction with specialized regularizers. Such regularizers maximize the entropy and independence of the representation bits through variance, correlation, and coskewness penalties, while simultaneously enforcing a locality prior for sparse action changes. To enable effective optimization, we also introduce a novel training scheme improving robustness to discrete roll-outs. Experiments on two benchmarks with underlying combinatorial structure show that DWMR learns more accurate representations and transitions than reconstruction-based alternatives. Finally, DWMR can also be paired with an auxiliary reconstruction decoder, and this combination yields additional gains.

AI.tldr: DWMR提出了一种无需重建和对比的无监督布尔世界模型学习方法，通过耦合潜在预测与专门的正则化器来学习紧凑的布尔表示。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型方法通常通过解码器重建、对比学习或奖励信号来保持潜在表示的丰富性，但这些方法可能不适合需要布尔表示进行符号推理和规划的场景。需要一种无需重建和对比的无监督方法来学习布尔世界模型。
AI.method: DWMR引入了一种新颖的世界建模损失函数，将潜在预测与专门的正则化器耦合。这些正则化器通过方差、相关性和共偏度惩罚来最大化表示位的熵和独立性，同时通过局部性先验来强制稀疏的动作变化。还引入了新的训练方案来提高对离散roll-out的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个具有底层组合结构的基准测试中，DWMR比基于重建的替代方法学习了更准确的表示和转移。当与辅助重建解码器结合时，还能获得额外的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DWMR是一种有效的无监督布尔世界模型学习方法，无需重建或对比信号，通过专门的正则化策略成功学习了紧凑且信息丰富的布尔表示，为符号推理和规划提供了更好的基础。

title: SMR-Net:Robot Snap Detection Based on Multi-Scale Features and Self-Attention Network
comment: snap assembly, snap detection and localization, object detection, multi-scale feature fusion, self-attention
summary: In robot automated assembly, snap assembly precision and efficiency directly determine overall production quality. As a core prerequisite, snap detection and localization critically affect subsequent assembly success. Traditional visual methods suffer from poor robustness and large localization errors when handling complex scenarios (e.g., transparent or low-contrast snaps), failing to meet high-precision assembly demands. To address this, this paper designs a dedicated sensor and proposes SMR-Net, an self-attention-based multi-scale object detection algorithm, to synergistically enhance detection and localization performance. SMR-Net adopts an attention-enhanced multi-scale feature fusion architecture: raw sensor data is encoded via an attention-embedded feature extractor to strengthen key snap features and suppress noise; three multi-scale feature maps are processed in parallel with standard and dilated convolution for dimension unification while preserving resolution; an adaptive reweighting network dynamically assigns weights to fused features, generating fine representations integrating details and global semantics. Experimental results on Type A and Type B snap datasets show SMR-Net outperforms traditional Faster R-CNN significantly: Intersection over Union (IoU) improves by 6.52% and 5.8%, and mean Average Precision (mAP) increases by 2.8% and 1.5% respectively. This fully demonstrates the method's superiority in complex snap detection and localization tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对机器人自动装配中的卡扣检测与定位问题，提出SMR-Net自注意力多尺度目标检测算法，结合专用传感器，显著提升了复杂场景下的检测精度和定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 机器人自动装配中，卡扣装配的精度和效率直接影响生产质量。传统视觉方法在处理复杂场景（如透明或低对比度卡扣）时鲁棒性差、定位误差大，无法满足高精度装配需求。
AI.method: 设计专用传感器，并提出SMR-Net自注意力多尺度目标检测算法：采用注意力增强的多尺度特征融合架构，通过注意力嵌入的特征提取器强化关键特征、抑制噪声；并行处理三个多尺度特征图，使用标准卷积和空洞卷积进行维度统一并保持分辨率；自适应重加权网络动态分配融合特征的权重，生成融合细节和全局语义的精细表示。
AI.result: 在Type A和Type B卡扣数据集上的实验结果显示，SMR-Net显著优于传统Faster R-CNN：IoU分别提升6.52%和5.8%，mAP分别提高2.8%和1.5%，充分证明了该方法在复杂卡扣检测和定位任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SMR-Net结合专用传感器，通过自注意力机制和多尺度特征融合，有效解决了复杂场景下卡扣检测与定位的挑战，为机器人高精度自动装配提供了可靠的技术方案。

title: Practical Deep Heteroskedastic Regression
summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) in deep learning regression is of wide interest, as it supports critical applications including sequential decision making and risk-sensitive tasks. In heteroskedastic regression, where the uncertainty of the target depends on the input, a common approach is to train a neural network that parameterizes the mean and the variance of the predictive distribution. Still, training deep heteroskedastic regression models poses practical challenges in the trade-off between uncertainty quantification and mean prediction, such as optimization difficulties, representation collapse, and variance overfitting. In this work we identify previously undiscussed fallacies and propose a simple and efficient procedure that addresses these challenges jointly by post-hoc fitting a variance model across the intermediate layers of a pretrained network on a hold-out dataset. We demonstrate that our method achieves on-par or state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification on several molecular graph datasets, without compromising mean prediction accuracy and remaining cheap to use at prediction time.

AI.tldr: 提出一种后处理方法，通过在预训练网络的中间层拟合方差模型来解决异方差回归中的不确定性量化问题，避免影响均值预测精度
AI.motivation: 深度学习中异方差回归的不确定性量化对序列决策和风险敏感任务很重要，但现有方法存在优化困难、表示崩溃和方差过拟合等挑战
AI.method: 在预训练网络的中间层上，使用保留数据集后验拟合方差模型，这种方法简单高效且不影响预测时的计算成本
AI.result: 在多个分子图数据集上实现了与现有方法相当或更好的不确定性量化性能，同时保持了均值预测精度
AI.conclusion: 提出的后处理方法有效解决了异方差回归中的不确定性量化挑战，是一种实用且高效的解决方案

title: From Intuition to Investigation: A Tool-Augmented Reasoning MLLM Framework for Generalizable Face Anti-Spoofing
summary: Face recognition remains vulnerable to presentation attacks, calling for robust Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) solutions. Recent MLLM-based FAS methods reformulate the binary classification task as the generation of brief textual descriptions to improve cross-domain generalization. However, their generalizability is still limited, as such descriptions mainly capture intuitive semantic cues (e.g., mask contours) while struggling to perceive fine-grained visual patterns. To address this limitation, we incorporate external visual tools into MLLMs to encourage deeper investigation of subtle spoof clues. Specifically, we propose the Tool-Augmented Reasoning FAS (TAR-FAS) framework, which reformulates the FAS task as a Chain-of-Thought with Visual Tools (CoT-VT) paradigm, allowing MLLMs to begin with intuitive observations and adaptively invoke external visual tools for fine-grained investigation. To this end, we design a tool-augmented data annotation pipeline and construct the ToolFAS-16K dataset, which contains multi-turn tool-use reasoning trajectories. Furthermore, we introduce a tool-aware FAS training pipeline, where Diverse-Tool Group Relative Policy Optimization (DT-GRPO) enables the model to autonomously learn efficient tool use. Extensive experiments under a challenging one-to-eleven cross-domain protocol demonstrate that TAR-FAS achieves SOTA performance while providing fine-grained visual investigation for trustworthy spoof detection.

AI.tldr: 提出TAR-FAS框架，通过视觉工具增强的多模态大语言模型进行人脸反欺骗检测，将任务重构为链式思维与视觉工具范式，显著提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM-based人脸反欺骗方法主要依赖直观语义线索（如面具轮廓），难以感知细粒度视觉模式，导致跨域泛化能力有限。需要引入外部视觉工具来深入挖掘细微欺骗线索。
AI.method: 提出TAR-FAS框架：1）将FAS任务重构为链式思维与视觉工具范式，让MLLM从直观观察开始，自适应调用外部视觉工具进行细粒度调查；2）设计工具增强的数据标注流程，构建包含多轮工具使用推理轨迹的ToolFAS-16K数据集；3）引入工具感知的FAS训练管道，使用多样工具组相对策略优化让模型自主学习高效工具使用。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的一对十一跨域协议下进行广泛实验，TAR-FAS实现了最先进的性能，同时为可信的欺骗检测提供细粒度视觉调查能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将外部视觉工具集成到MLLM中，TAR-FAS框架显著提升了人脸反欺骗系统的跨域泛化能力，能够深入挖掘细微欺骗线索，为可信检测提供细粒度视觉分析。

title: Causal Circuit Tracing Reveals Distinct Computational Architectures in Single-Cell Foundation Models: Inhibitory Dominance, Biological Coherence, and Cross-Model Convergence
summary:
Motivation: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose foundation model activations into interpretable features, but causal feature-to-feature interactions across network depth remain unknown for biological foundation models.
  Results: We introduce causal circuit tracing by ablating SAE features and measuring downstream responses, and apply it to Geneformer V2-316M and scGPT whole-human across four conditions (96,892 edges, 80,191 forward passes). Both models show approximately 53 percent biological coherence and 65 to 89 percent inhibitory dominance, invariant to architecture and cell type. scGPT produces stronger effects (mean absolute d = 1.40 vs. 1.05) with more balanced dynamics. Cross-model consensus yields 1,142 conserved domain pairs (10.6x enrichment, p < 0.001). Disease-associated domains are 3.59x more likely to be consensus. Gene-level CRISPRi validation shows 56.4 percent directional accuracy, confirming co-expression rather than causal encoding.

AI.tldr: 开发因果电路追踪方法，通过消融稀疏自编码器特征分析生物基础模型中特征间的因果相互作用，发现模型间存在保守的生物学相关特征对，疾病相关域更可能成为共识特征。
AI.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAEs）能将基础模型激活分解为可解释特征，但生物基础模型中特征间跨网络深度的因果相互作用关系尚不清楚。
AI.method: 引入因果电路追踪方法：通过消融SAE特征并测量下游响应，应用于Geneformer V2-316M和scGPT全人类模型，分析四种条件下的特征相互作用。
AI.result: 两个模型均显示约53%的生物学一致性，65-89%的抑制性主导，效应强度不随架构和细胞类型变化。scGPT产生更强效应（平均绝对d=1.40 vs 1.05）。跨模型共识识别出1,142个保守域对（10.6倍富集），疾病相关域成为共识的可能性高3.59倍。基因级CRISPRi验证显示56.4%方向准确性，证实是共表达而非因果编码。
AI.conclusion: 因果电路追踪揭示了生物基础模型中特征间的因果相互作用模式，跨模型共识特征对具有显著的生物学相关性，特别是与疾病相关的特征，但模型更多捕获的是共表达关系而非严格的因果编码。

title: MM-DeepResearch: A Simple and Effective Multimodal Agentic Search Baseline
summary: We aim to develop a multimodal research agent capable of explicit reasoning and planning, multi-tool invocation, and cross-modal information synthesis, enabling it to conduct deep research tasks. However, we observe three main challenges in developing such agents: (1) scarcity of search-intensive multimodal QA data, (2) lack of effective search trajectories, and (3) prohibitive cost of training with online search APIs. To tackle them, we first propose Hyper-Search, a hypergraph-based QA generation method that models and connects visual and textual nodes within and across modalities, enabling to generate search-intensive multimodal QA pairs that require invoking various search tools to solve. Second, we introduce DR-TTS, which first decomposes search-involved tasks into several categories according to search tool types, and respectively optimize specialized search tool experts for each tool. It then recomposes tool experts to jointly explore search trajectories via tree search, producing trajectories that successfully solve complex tasks using various search tools. Third, we build an offline search engine supporting multiple search tools, enabling agentic reinforcement learning without using costly online search APIs. With the three designs, we develop MM-DeepResearch, a powerful multimodal deep research agent, and extensive results shows its superiority across benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/HJYao00/MM-DeepResearch

AI.tldr: 提出MM-DeepResearch多模态深度研究智能体，通过Hyper-Search生成搜索密集型多模态QA数据、DR-TTS优化搜索轨迹规划、离线搜索引擎支持，解决多模态研究智能体开发中的三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 开发能够进行显式推理规划、多工具调用和跨模态信息合成的多模态研究智能体，但面临三大挑战：搜索密集型多模态QA数据稀缺、缺乏有效搜索轨迹、在线搜索API训练成本过高。
AI.method: 1. Hyper-Search：基于超图的多模态QA生成方法，建模和连接视觉与文本节点，生成需要多种搜索工具解决的搜索密集型QA对；2. DR-TTS：先按搜索工具类型分解任务并优化专家模型，再通过树搜索重组工具专家探索搜索轨迹；3. 构建支持多种搜索工具的离线搜索引擎，避免使用昂贵的在线搜索API。
AI.result: 开发出MM-DeepResearch多模态深度研究智能体，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决数据生成、轨迹规划和训练成本三大挑战，成功开发了强大的多模态深度研究智能体，为复杂研究任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: Meta-Learning Hyperparameters for Parameter Efficient Fine-Tuning
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2025 (Highlight). Code is available at: https://github.com/doem97/metalora
summary: Training large foundation models from scratch for domain-specific applications is almost impossible due to data limits and long-tailed distributions -- taking remote sensing (RS) as an example. Fine-tuning natural image pre-trained models on RS images is a straightforward solution. To reduce computational costs and improve performance on tail classes, existing methods apply parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques, such as LoRA and AdaptFormer. However, we observe that fixed hyperparameters -- such as intra-layer positions, layer depth, and scaling factors, can considerably hinder PEFT performance, as fine-tuning on RS images proves highly sensitive to these settings. To address this, we propose MetaPEFT, a method incorporating adaptive scalers that dynamically adjust module influence during fine-tuning. MetaPEFT dynamically adjusts three key factors of PEFT on RS images: module insertion, layer selection, and module-wise learning rates, which collectively control the influence of PEFT modules across the network. We conduct extensive experiments on three transfer-learning scenarios and five datasets in both RS and natural image domains. The results show that MetaPEFT achieves state-of-the-art performance in cross-spectral adaptation, requiring only a small amount of trainable parameters and improving tail-class accuracy significantly.

AI.tldr: MetaPEFT：一种自适应参数高效微调方法，通过动态调整模块插入、层选择和模块学习率，显著提升遥感图像上的微调性能，特别是在尾类识别方面。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像数据有限且呈长尾分布，从头训练大模型不现实。现有参数高效微调方法（如LoRA、AdaptFormer）使用固定超参数，但在遥感图像微调中性能受限于这些固定设置，需要更灵活的自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出MetaPEFT方法，引入自适应缩放器，在微调过程中动态调整三个关键因素：模块插入位置、层选择策略和模块级学习率，从而控制PEFT模块在整个网络中的影响。
AI.result: 在三个迁移学习场景和五个数据集（包括遥感和自然图像）上的实验表明，MetaPEFT仅需少量可训练参数就能达到最先进性能，在跨光谱适应任务中表现优异，并显著提升了尾类识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: MetaPEFT通过动态调整PEFT超参数，有效解决了遥感图像微调中的敏感性问题，为长尾分布数据的参数高效微调提供了有效解决方案。

title: Unleashing VLA Potentials in Autonomous Driving via Explicit Learning from Failures
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving often hit a performance plateau during Reinforcement Learning (RL) optimization. This stagnation arises from exploration capabilities constrained by previous Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), leading to persistent failures in long-tail scenarios. In these critical situations, all explored actions yield a zero-value driving score. This information-sparse reward signals a failure, yet fails to identify its root cause -- whether it is due to incorrect planning, flawed reasoning, or poor trajectory execution. To address this limitation, we propose VLA with Explicit Learning from Failures (ELF-VLA), a framework that augments RL with structured diagnostic feedback. Instead of relying on a vague scalar reward, our method produces detailed, interpretable reports that identify the specific failure mode. The VLA policy then leverages this explicit feedback to generate a Feedback-Guided Refinement. By injecting these corrected, high-reward samples back into the RL training batch, our approach provides a targeted gradient, which enables the policy to solve critical scenarios that unguided exploration cannot. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method unlocks the latent capabilities of VLA models, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the public NAVSIM benchmark for overall PDMS, EPDMS score and high-level planning accuracy.

AI.tldr: ELF-VLA框架通过结构化诊断反馈解决自动驾驶VLA模型在强化学习中遇到的性能瓶颈问题，在长尾场景中实现显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶的视觉-语言-动作模型在强化学习优化中常遇到性能瓶颈，这是由于监督微调限制了探索能力，导致在长尾场景中持续失败。稀疏的零值奖励信号无法识别失败的根本原因（规划错误、推理缺陷还是轨迹执行问题）。
AI.method: 提出ELF-VLA框架，用结构化诊断反馈增强强化学习。该方法生成详细的、可解释的报告来识别具体失败模式，然后利用这些反馈生成反馈引导的精炼。将修正后的高奖励样本注入RL训练批次，提供有针对性的梯度。
AI.result: 在公开的NAVSIM基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，包括总体PDMS、EPDMS分数和高层规划准确性，解锁了VLA模型的潜在能力。
AI.conclusion: ELF-VLA通过明确的失败学习机制解决了VLA模型在强化学习中的探索限制问题，为自动驾驶系统在关键场景中的性能提升提供了有效解决方案。

title: Modular Memory is the Key to Continual Learning Agents
comment: This work stems from discussions held at the Dagstuhl seminar on Continual Learning in the Era of Foundation Models (October 2025)
summary: Foundation models have transformed machine learning through large-scale pretraining and increased test-time compute. Despite surpassing human performance in several domains, these models remain fundamentally limited in continuous operation, experience accumulation, and personalization, capabilities that are central to adaptive intelligence. While continual learning research has long targeted these goals, its historical focus on in-weight learning (IWL), i.e., updating a single model's parameters to absorb new knowledge, has rendered catastrophic forgetting a persistent challenge. Our position is that combining the strengths of In-Weight Learning (IWL) and the newly emerged capabilities of In-Context Learning (ICL) through the design of modular memory is the missing piece for continual adaptation at scale. We outline a conceptual framework for modular memory-centric architectures that leverage ICL for rapid adaptation and knowledge accumulation, and IWL for stable updates to model capabilities, charting a practical roadmap toward continually learning agents.

AI.tldr: 论文提出结合权重内学习(IWL)和上下文内学习(ICL)的模块化记忆架构，以解决基础模型在持续学习中的遗忘问题，实现大规模持续适应。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型在许多领域超越了人类表现，但在持续操作、经验积累和个性化方面仍存在根本性限制。传统的持续学习主要关注权重内学习(IWL)，导致灾难性遗忘问题难以解决。
AI.method: 提出模块化记忆中心架构的概念框架，结合IWL和ICL的优势：利用ICL进行快速适应和知识积累，利用IWL进行模型能力的稳定更新。
AI.result: 提出了一个实用的路线图，用于构建持续学习智能体，通过模块化记忆设计实现大规模持续适应。
AI.conclusion: 结合IWL和ICL的模块化记忆架构是解决基础模型持续适应问题的关键，为实现真正自适应智能体提供了可行路径。

title: LLaDA-o: An Effective and Length-Adaptive Omni Diffusion Model
summary: We present \textbf{LLaDA-o}, an effective and length-adaptive omni diffusion model for multimodal understanding and generation. LLaDA-o is built on a Mixture of Diffusion (MoD) framework that decouples discrete masked diffusion for text understanding and continuous diffusion for visual generation, while coupling them through a shared, simple, and efficient attention backbone that reduces redundant computation for fixed conditions. Building on MoD, we further introduce a data-centric length adaptation strategy that enables flexible-length decoding in multimodal settings without architectural changes. Extensive experiments show that LLaDA-o achieves state-of-the-art performance among omni-diffusion models on multimodal understanding and generation benchmarks, and reaches 87.04 on DPG-Bench for text-to-image generation, supporting the effectiveness of unified omni diffusion modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/LLaDA-o.

AI.tldr: LLaDA-o是一个基于混合扩散框架的多模态理解与生成模型，通过解耦文本理解和视觉生成，结合共享注意力骨干，实现高效的多模态统一建模。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在多模态理解与生成任务上存在计算冗余和架构限制，需要一种既能理解文本又能生成图像的统一模型，同时支持灵活长度的解码。
AI.method: 采用混合扩散框架，将离散掩码扩散用于文本理解，连续扩散用于视觉生成，通过共享注意力骨干减少冗余计算，并引入数据中心的长度适应策略实现灵活长度解码。
AI.result: 在多项多模态理解和生成基准测试中达到最先进性能，在DPG-Bench文本到图像生成任务上达到87.04分，证明了统一全扩散建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LLaDA-o通过创新的混合扩散框架和长度适应策略，成功实现了高效统一的多模态理解与生成，为全扩散模型提供了有效的解决方案。

title: DGNet: Discrete Green Networks for Data-Efficient Learning of Spatiotemporal PDEs
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Spatiotemporal partial differential equations (PDEs) underpin a wide range of scientific and engineering applications. Neural PDE solvers offer a promising alternative to classical numerical methods. However, existing approaches typically require large numbers of training trajectories, while high-fidelity PDE data are expensive to generate. Under limited data, their performance degrades substantially, highlighting their low data efficiency. A key reason is that PDE dynamics embody strong structural inductive biases that are not explicitly encoded in neural architectures, forcing models to learn fundamental physical structure from data. A particularly salient manifestation of this inefficiency is poor generalization to unseen source terms. In this work, we revisit Green's function theory-a cornerstone of PDE theory-as a principled source of structural inductive bias for PDE learning. Based on this insight, we propose DGNet, a discrete Green network for data-efficient learning of spatiotemporal PDEs. The key idea is to transform the Green's function into a graph-based discrete formulation, and embed the superposition principle into the hybrid physics-neural architecture, which reduces the burden of learning physical priors from data, thereby improving sample efficiency. Across diverse spatiotemporal PDE scenarios, DGNet consistently achieves state-of-the-art accuracy using only tens of training trajectories. Moreover, it exhibits robust zero-shot generalization to unseen source terms, serving as a stress test that highlights its data-efficient structural design.

AI.tldr: DGNet提出了一种基于格林函数理论的离散格林网络，用于数据高效学习时空偏微分方程，仅需少量训练轨迹即可实现最先进精度，并具有对未见源项的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经PDE求解器需要大量训练数据，而高保真PDE数据生成成本高。在有限数据下，现有方法性能显著下降，数据效率低。主要原因是PDE动力学包含强烈的结构归纳偏置，但现有神经架构未显式编码这些物理结构，迫使模型从数据中学习基本物理原理。
AI.method: 基于格林函数理论，将格林函数转化为基于图的离散形式，并将叠加原理嵌入到混合物理-神经架构中。提出DGNet（离散格林网络），通过显式编码物理结构来减少从数据中学习物理先验的负担。
AI.result: 在多样化的时空PDE场景中，DGNet仅使用数十个训练轨迹就能持续达到最先进的精度。更重要的是，它展现出对未见源项的鲁棒零样本泛化能力，这突显了其数据高效的结构设计。
AI.conclusion: 格林函数理论为PDE学习提供了原则性的结构归纳偏置来源。DGNet通过将格林函数离散化并嵌入叠加原理，显著提高了数据效率，为有限数据下的神经PDE求解提供了有效解决方案。

title: Flow Matching-enabled Test-Time Refinement for Unsupervised Cardiac MR Registration
summary: Diffusion-based unsupervised image registration has been explored for cardiac cine MR, but expensive multi-step inference limits practical use. We propose FlowReg, a flow-matching framework in displacement field space that achieves strong registration in as few as two steps and supports further refinement with more steps. FlowReg uses warmup-reflow training: a single-step network first acts as a teacher, then a student learns to refine from arbitrary intermediate states, removing the need for a pre-trained model as in existing methods. An Initial Guess strategy feeds back the model prediction as the next starting point, improving refinement from step two onward. On ACDC and MM2 across six tasks (including cross-dataset generalization), FlowReg outperforms the state of the art on five tasks (+0.6% mean Dice score on average), with the largest gain in the left ventricle (+1.09%), and reduces LVEF estimation error on all six tasks (-2.58 percentage points), using only 0.7% extra parameters and no segmentation labels. Anonymized code is available at https://github.com/mathpluscode/FlowReg.

AI.tldr: FlowReg提出了一种基于流匹配的位移场空间无监督图像配准框架，通过warmup-reflow训练和Initial Guess策略，仅需2步即可实现强配准效果，在多个心脏MR数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的无监督心脏MR图像配准方法需要多步推理，计算成本高，限制了实际应用。需要一种更高效、更实用的配准方法。
AI.method: 1. 在位移场空间构建流匹配框架；2. 采用warmup-reflow训练：单步网络先作为教师，然后学生网络学习从任意中间状态进行细化；3. Initial Guess策略将模型预测作为下一个起始点；4. 支持从2步开始的进一步细化。
AI.result: 在ACDC和MM2数据集上的6个任务中，FlowReg在5个任务上超越现有方法（平均Dice分数提升0.6%），左心室配准提升最大（+1.09%），LVEF估计误差在所有6个任务上降低（-2.58个百分点），仅增加0.7%参数且无需分割标签。
AI.conclusion: FlowReg提供了一种高效的无监督心脏MR图像配准方法，通过流匹配框架和创新的训练策略，在少量推理步骤下实现优于现有方法的性能，具有实际应用价值。

title: CHLU: The Causal Hamiltonian Learning Unit as a Symplectic Primitive for Deep Learning
comment: Accepted as a short paper at ICLR 2026 (AI & PDE)
summary: Current deep learning primitives dealing with temporal dynamics suffer from a fundamental dichotomy: they are either discrete and unstable (LSTMs) \citep{pascanu_difficulty_2013}, leading to exploding or vanishing gradients; or they are continuous and dissipative (Neural ODEs) \citep{dupont_augmented_2019}, which destroy information over time to ensure stability. We propose the \textbf{Causal Hamiltonian Learning Unit} (pronounced: \textit{clue}), a novel Physics-grounded computational learning primitive. By enforcing a Relativistic Hamiltonian structure and utilizing symplectic integration, a CHLU strictly conserves phase-space volume, as an attempt to solve the memory-stability trade-off. We show that the CHLU is designed for infinite-horizon stability, as well as controllable noise filtering. We then demonstrate a CHLU's generative ability using the MNIST dataset as a proof-of-principle.

AI.tldr: 提出Causal Hamiltonian Learning Unit (CHLU)，一种基于物理的深度学习单元，通过相对论哈密顿结构和辛积分解决时间动态建模中的记忆-稳定性权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 当前处理时间动态的深度学习原语存在根本性二分法：要么是离散但不稳定（LSTM），导致梯度爆炸或消失；要么是连续但耗散（神经ODE），会随时间破坏信息以确保稳定性。需要解决这种记忆与稳定性之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出因果哈密顿学习单元（CHLU），通过强制执行相对论哈密顿结构并利用辛积分，严格守恒相空间体积，旨在解决记忆-稳定性权衡问题。该方法设计用于无限时间稳定性，并具有可控噪声过滤能力。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上展示了CHLU的生成能力作为原理验证，表明该方法能够实现无限时间稳定性，同时具备可控噪声过滤特性。
AI.conclusion: CHLU作为一种基于物理的计算学习原语，通过哈密顿结构和辛积分解决了深度学习时间动态建模中的记忆-稳定性权衡问题，为长期稳定建模提供了新方法。

title: Adaptive Augmentation-Aware Latent Learning for Robust LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: Adverse weather conditions significantly degrade the performance of LiDAR point cloud semantic segmentation networks by introducing large distribution shifts. Existing augmentation-based methods attempt to enhance robustness by simulating weather interference during training. However, they struggle to fully exploit the potential of augmentations due to the trade-off between minor and aggressive augmentations. To address this, we propose A3Point, an adaptive augmentation-aware latent learning framework that effectively utilizes a diverse range of augmentations while mitigating the semantic shift, which refers to the change in the semantic meaning caused by augmentations. A3Point consists of two key components: semantic confusion prior (SCP) latent learning, which captures the model's inherent semantic confusion information, and semantic shift region (SSR) localization, which decouples semantic confusion and semantic shift, enabling adaptive optimization strategies for different disturbance levels. Extensive experiments on multiple standard generalized LiDAR segmentation benchmarks under adverse weather demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, setting new state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: A3Point：一种自适应增强感知的潜在学习框架，通过语义混淆先验和语义偏移区域定位，有效利用多样化增强来提升LiDAR点云在恶劣天气下的语义分割鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 恶劣天气条件导致LiDAR点云分布偏移，显著降低语义分割性能。现有基于增强的方法在训练时模拟天气干扰，但难以平衡轻微增强和激进增强之间的权衡，无法充分利用增强的潜力。
AI.method: 提出A3Point框架，包含两个关键组件：1）语义混淆先验（SCP）潜在学习，捕捉模型固有的语义混淆信息；2）语义偏移区域（SSR）定位，解耦语义混淆和语义偏移，为不同干扰级别设计自适应优化策略。
AI.result: 在多个标准广义LiDAR分割基准测试中，在恶劣天气条件下进行了广泛实验，证明了方法的有效性，并取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: A3Point通过自适应增强感知的潜在学习，有效解决了增强方法中的语义偏移问题，显著提升了LiDAR点云语义分割在恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒性。

title: Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference with Conditional Lagrangian Optimal Transport
summary: Neural networks (NNs) often have critical behavioural trade-offs that are set at design time with hyperparameters-such as reward weights in reinforcement learning or quantile targets in regression. Post-deployment, however, user preferences can evolve, making initial settings undesirable, necessitating potentially expensive retraining. To circumvent this, we introduce the task of Hyperparameter Trajectory Inference (HTI): to learn, from observed data, how a NN's conditional output distribution changes with its hyperparameters, and construct a surrogate model that approximates the NN at unobserved hyperparameter settings. HTI requires extending existing trajectory inference approaches to incorporate conditions, exacerbating the challenge of ensuring inferred paths are feasible. We propose an approach based on conditional Lagrangian optimal transport, jointly learning the Lagrangian function governing hyperparameter-induced dynamics along with the associated optimal transport maps and geodesics between observed marginals, which form the surrogate model. We incorporate inductive biases based on the manifold hypothesis and least-action principles into the learned Lagrangian, improving surrogate model feasibility. We empirically demonstrate that our approach reconstructs NN outputs across various hyperparameter spectra better than other alternatives.

AI.tldr: 提出超参数轨迹推断（HTI）任务，通过条件拉格朗日最优传输学习神经网络在不同超参数设置下的输出分布变化，构建替代模型以避免昂贵的重新训练。
AI.motivation: 神经网络的关键行为权衡（如强化学习中的奖励权重或回归中的分位数目标）在设计时通过超参数设定。但部署后用户偏好可能变化，初始设置变得不理想，而重新训练成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于条件拉格朗日最优传输的方法，联合学习控制超参数诱导动态的拉格朗日函数，以及观测边缘分布之间的最优传输映射和测地线，形成替代模型。结合流形假设和最小作用原理的归纳偏置。
AI.result: 经验证明该方法在多种超参数谱上重建神经网络输出的效果优于其他替代方案。
AI.conclusion: HTI任务和提出的条件拉格朗日最优传输方法能够有效学习神经网络在不同超参数下的行为变化，构建可行的替代模型，避免昂贵的重新训练。

title: Beyond Global Similarity: Towards Fine-Grained, Multi-Condition Multimodal Retrieval
summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have substantially expanded the capabilities of multimodal retrieval, enabling systems to align and retrieve information across visual and textual modalities. Yet, existing benchmarks largely focus on coarse-grained or single-condition alignment, overlooking real-world scenarios where user queries specify multiple interdependent constraints across modalities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MCMR (Multi-Conditional Multimodal Retrieval): a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate fine-grained, multi-condition cross-modal retrieval under natural-language queries. MCMR spans five product domains: upper and bottom clothing, jewelry, shoes, and furniture. It also preserves rich long-form metadata essential for compositional matching. Each query integrates complementary visual and textual attributes, requiring models to jointly satisfy all specified conditions for relevance. We benchmark a diverse suite of MLLM-based multimodal retrievers and vision-language rerankers to assess their condition-aware reasoning abilities. Experimental results reveal: (i) distinct modality asymmetries across models; (ii) visual cues dominate early-rank precision, while textual metadata stabilizes long-tail ordering; and (iii) MLLM-based pointwise rerankers markedly improve fine-grained matching by explicitly verifying query-candidate consistency. Overall, MCMR establishes a challenging and diagnostic benchmark for advancing multimodal retrieval toward compositional, constraint-aware, and interpretable understanding. Our code and dataset is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/MCMR

AI.tldr: MCMR是一个用于评估多条件跨模态检索的大规模基准测试，专注于产品领域的细粒度多约束匹配，揭示了现有模型的模态不对称性和改进方向。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注粗粒度或单条件对齐，忽略了现实世界中用户查询通常包含跨模态的多个相互依赖约束的场景。
AI.method: 构建了涵盖五个产品领域（上衣、下装、珠宝、鞋类、家具）的大规模数据集MCMR，每个查询整合了互补的视觉和文本属性，要求模型同时满足所有指定条件。评估了多种基于MLLM的多模态检索器和视觉语言重排序器。
AI.result: 实验发现：(1) 模型存在明显的模态不对称性；(2) 视觉线索主导早期排名精度，而文本元数据稳定长尾排序；(3) 基于MLLM的点式重排序器通过显式验证查询-候选一致性显著改善细粒度匹配。
AI.conclusion: MCMR为推进多模态检索向组合式、约束感知和可解释理解方向的发展建立了一个具有挑战性和诊断性的基准测试。

title: D3LM: A Discrete DNA Diffusion Language Model for Bidirectional DNA Understanding and Generation
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at MLGenX 2026
summary: Early DNA foundation models adopted BERT-style training, achieving good performance on DNA understanding tasks but lacking generative capabilities. Recent autoregressive models enable DNA generation, but employ left-to-right causal modeling that is suboptimal for DNA where regulatory relationships are inherently bidirectional. We present D3LM (\textbf{D}iscrete \textbf{D}NA \textbf{D}iffusion \textbf{L}anguage \textbf{M}odel), which unifies bidirectional representation learning and DNA generation through masked diffusion. D3LM directly adopts the Nucleotide Transformer (NT) v2 architecture but reformulates the training objective as masked diffusion in discrete DNA space, enabling both bidirectional understanding and generation capabilities within a single model. Compared to NT v2 of the same size, D3LM achieves improved performance on understanding tasks. Notably, on regulatory element generation, D3LM achieves an SFID of 10.92, closely approaching real DNA sequences (7.85) and substantially outperforming the previous best result of 29.16 from autoregressive models. Our work suggests diffusion language models as a promising paradigm for unified DNA foundation models. We further present the first systematic study of masked diffusion models in the DNA domain, investigating practical design choices such as tokenization schemes and sampling strategies, thereby providing empirical insights and a solid foundation for future research. D3LM has been released at https://huggingface.co/collections/Hengchang-Liu/d3lm.

AI.tldr: D3LM是一个基于离散扩散的DNA语言模型，统一了双向表征学习和DNA生成能力，在理解和生成任务上都优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有DNA基础模型存在局限性：BERT风格模型只能理解不能生成，自回归模型采用单向建模不适用于DNA中固有的双向调控关系。需要一种能统一理解和生成能力的DNA基础模型。
AI.method: 采用Nucleotide Transformer v2架构，但将训练目标重新定义为离散DNA空间中的掩码扩散，使单个模型同时具备双向理解和生成能力。
AI.result: 在理解任务上优于同尺寸NT v2；在调控元件生成任务上，SFID达到10.92，接近真实DNA序列的7.85，显著优于自回归模型的最佳结果29.16。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型是统一DNA基础模型的有前景范式，为未来研究提供了实证见解和坚实基础。D3LM已在HuggingFace发布。

title: Can Vision Language Models Assess Graphic Design Aesthetics? A Benchmark, Evaluation, and Dataset Perspective
summary: Assessing the aesthetic quality of graphic design is central to visual communication, yet remains underexplored in vision language models (VLMs). We investigate whether VLMs can evaluate design aesthetics in ways comparable to humans. Prior work faces three key limitations: benchmarks restricted to narrow principles and coarse evaluation protocols, a lack of systematic VLM comparisons, and limited training data for model improvement. In this work, we introduce AesEval-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark spanning four dimensions, twelve indicators, and three fully quantifiable tasks: aesthetic judgment, region selection, and precise localization. Then, we systematically evaluate proprietary, open-source, and reasoning-augmented VLMs, revealing clear performance gaps against the nuanced demands of aesthetic assessment. Moreover, we construct a training dataset to fine-tune VLMs for this domain, leveraging human-guided VLM labeling to produce task labels at scale and indicator-grounded reasoning to tie abstract indicators to concrete design regions.Together, our work establishes the first systematic framework for aesthetic quality assessment in graphic design. Our code and dataset will be released at: \href{https://github.com/arctanxarc/AesEval-Bench}{https://github.com/arctanxarc/AesEval-Bench}

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了AesEval-Bench基准，用于系统评估视觉语言模型在平面设计美学质量评估方面的能力，并构建训练数据集来微调模型。
AI.motivation: 平面设计的美学质量评估对视觉传达至关重要，但在视觉语言模型中尚未充分探索。现有研究存在三个主要局限：基准测试局限于狭窄原则和粗略评估协议、缺乏系统性的VLM比较、以及改进模型的训练数据有限。
AI.method: 1. 引入AesEval-Bench基准，涵盖四个维度、十二个指标和三个完全可量化的任务（美学判断、区域选择、精确定位）；2. 系统评估专有、开源和推理增强的VLM；3. 构建训练数据集，利用人类指导的VLM标注大规模生成任务标签，并通过指标基础推理将抽象指标与具体设计区域联系起来。
AI.result: 评估揭示了现有VLM在美学评估的细微需求方面存在明显性能差距。通过构建的训练数据集，能够有效微调VLM以提升其在平面设计美学评估方面的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了首个系统性的平面设计美学质量评估框架，为VLM在美学评估领域的发展提供了基准和训练资源。

title: Learning Shortest Paths with Generative Flow Networks
summary: In this paper, we present a novel learning framework for finding shortest paths in graphs utilizing Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets). First, we examine theoretical properties of GFlowNets in non-acyclic environments in relation to shortest paths. We prove that, if the total flow is minimized, forward and backward policies traverse the environment graph exclusively along shortest paths between the initial and terminal states. Building on this result, we show that the pathfinding problem in an arbitrary graph can be solved by training a non-acyclic GFlowNet with flow regularization. We experimentally demonstrate the performance of our method in pathfinding in permutation environments and in solving Rubik's Cubes. For the latter problem, our approach shows competitive results with state-of-the-art machine learning approaches designed specifically for this task in terms of the solution length, while requiring smaller search budget at test-time.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成流网络(GFlowNets)的图最短路径学习框架，通过流正则化训练非循环GFlowNet解决任意图中的路径查找问题
AI.motivation: 探索GFlowNets在非循环环境中的理论性质，特别是与最短路径的关系，为图路径查找问题提供新的机器学习解决方案
AI.method: 首先分析GFlowNets在非循环环境中的理论特性，证明当总流最小时，前后向策略会沿最短路径遍历图；基于此，提出通过流正则化训练非循环GFlowNet来解决任意图的路径查找问题
AI.result: 在置换环境和魔方求解问题上进行实验验证。对于魔方问题，该方法在解长度方面与专门设计的SOTA机器学习方法竞争，同时测试时需要的搜索预算更小
AI.conclusion: GFlowNets在流最小化条件下能有效找到最短路径，提出的框架为图路径查找问题提供了有前景的机器学习解决方案，在保持解质量的同时减少了搜索开销

title: Phase-Type Variational Autoencoders for Heavy-Tailed Data
summary:
Heavy-tailed distributions are ubiquitous in real-world data, where rare but extreme events dominate risk and variability. However, standard Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) employ simple decoder distributions (e.g., Gaussian) that fail to capture heavy-tailed behavior, while existing heavy-tail-aware extensions remain restricted to predefined parametric families whose tail behavior is fixed a priori.
  We propose the Phase-Type Variational Autoencoder (PH-VAE), whose decoder distribution is a latent-conditioned Phase-Type (PH) distribution defined as the absorption time of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC). This formulation composes multiple exponential time scales, yielding a flexible and analytically tractable decoder that adapts its tail behavior directly from the observed data. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PH-VAE accurately recovers diverse heavy-tailed distributions, significantly outperforming Gaussian, Student-t, and extreme-value-based VAE decoders in modeling tail behavior and extreme quantiles. In multivariate settings, PH-VAE captures realistic cross-dimensional tail dependence through its shared latent representation. To our knowledge, this is the first work to integrate Phase-Type distributions into deep generative modeling, bridging applied probability and representation learning.

AI.tldr: PH-VAE使用相型分布作为解码器，通过连续时间马尔可夫链的吸收时间来建模重尾数据，相比传统VAE能更好地捕捉极端事件和尾部行为。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据普遍存在重尾分布，极端事件主导风险和变异性。传统VAE使用简单分布（如高斯分布）无法捕捉重尾行为，而现有的重尾感知扩展方法局限于预定义的参数族，尾部行为固定。
AI.method: 提出相型变分自编码器（PH-VAE），其解码器分布是基于潜在变量的相型分布，定义为连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）的吸收时间。该公式组合多个指数时间尺度，产生灵活且解析可处理的解码器，直接从观测数据中自适应尾部行为。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，PH-VAE能准确恢复多样化的重尾分布，在建模尾部行为和极端分位数方面显著优于高斯、学生t和基于极值的VAE解码器。在多变量设置中，PH-VAE通过共享潜在表示捕捉现实的多维尾部依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次将相型分布集成到深度生成建模中的工作，桥接了应用概率和表示学习。PH-VAE为建模重尾数据提供了灵活且解析可处理的解决方案。

title: Differential privacy representation geometry for medical image analysis
summary: Differential privacy (DP)'s effect in medical imaging is typically evaluated only through end-to-end performance, leaving the mechanism of privacy-induced utility loss unclear. We introduce Differential Privacy Representation Geometry for Medical Imaging (DP-RGMI), a framework that interprets DP as a structured transformation of representation space and decomposes performance degradation into encoder geometry and task-head utilization. Geometry is quantified by representation displacement from initialization and spectral effective dimension, while utilization is measured as the gap between linear-probe and end-to-end utility. Across over 594,000 images from four chest X-ray datasets and multiple pretrained initializations, we show that DP is consistently associated with a utilization gap even when linear separability is largely preserved. At the same time, displacement and spectral dimension exhibit non-monotonic, initialization- and dataset-dependent reshaping, indicating that DP alters representation anisotropy rather than uniformly collapsing features. Correlation analysis reveals that the association between end-to-end performance and utilization is robust across datasets but can vary by initialization, while geometric quantities capture additional prior- and dataset-conditioned variation. These findings position DP-RGMI as a reproducible framework for diagnosing privacy-induced failure modes and informing privacy model selection.

AI.tldr: DP-RGMI框架将差分隐私解释为表示空间的结构化变换，将性能下降分解为编码器几何和任务头利用两部分，用于诊断隐私引起的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 传统上差分隐私在医学影像中的效果仅通过端到端性能评估，隐私引起的效用损失机制不明确。需要理解DP如何改变表示空间结构，从而解释性能下降的原因。
AI.method: 提出DP-RGMI框架，将DP解释为表示空间的结构化变换。通过表示位移（从初始化的位移）和谱有效维度量化几何变化，通过线性探测与端到端效用的差距测量任务头利用。
AI.result: 在4个胸部X光数据集（超过594,000张图像）和多个预训练初始化上，DP始终与利用差距相关，即使线性可分性基本保留。表示位移和谱维度呈现非单调、依赖于初始化和数据集的重新塑造，表明DP改变表示各向异性而非均匀压缩特征。
AI.conclusion: DP-RGMI为诊断隐私引起的失效模式提供了可复现框架，可指导隐私模型选择。端到端性能与利用的关联在不同数据集间稳健但随初始化变化，几何量捕获了额外的先验和数据依赖变化。

title: Uncertainty Quantification of Click and Conversion Estimates for the Autobidding
comment: 17 pages (10 main text + 7 appendix), 5 figures, 2 tables
summary: Modern e-commerce platforms employ various auction mechanisms to allocate paid slots for a given item. To scale this approach to the millions of auctions, the platforms suggest promotion tools based on the autobidding algorithms. These algorithms typically depend on the Click-Through-Rate (CTR) and Conversion-Rate (CVR) estimates provided by a pre-trained machine learning model. However, the predictions of such models are uncertain and can significantly affect the performance of the autobidding algorithm. To address this issue, we propose the DenoiseBid method, which corrects the generated CTRs and CVRs to make the resulting bids more efficient in auctions. The underlying idea of our method is to employ a Bayesian approach and replace noisy CTR or CVR estimates with those from recovered distributions. To demonstrate the performance of the proposed approach, we perform extensive experiments on the synthetic, iPinYou, and BAT datasets. To evaluate the robustness of our approach to the noise scale, we use synthetic noise and noise estimated from the predictions of the pre-trained machine learning model.

AI.tldr: 提出DenoiseBid方法，通过贝叶斯方法校正CTR和CVR估计值，提高自动竞价算法在拍卖中的效率
AI.motivation: 电商平台依赖预训练机器学习模型提供的CTR和CVR估计进行自动竞价，但这些预测存在不确定性，显著影响竞价算法性能
AI.method: 提出DenoiseBid方法，采用贝叶斯方法，用恢复分布中的估计值替换有噪声的CTR或CVR估计
AI.result: 在合成数据集、iPinYou和BAT数据集上进行广泛实验，评估方法对噪声尺度的鲁棒性，使用合成噪声和预训练模型预测估计的噪声
AI.conclusion: DenoiseBid方法能有效校正CTR和CVR估计，提高自动竞价算法在拍卖中的效率，对噪声具有鲁棒性

title: HeroGS: Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting under Sparse Views
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a promising approach in novel view synthesis, combining photorealistic rendering with real-time efficiency. However, its success heavily relies on dense camera coverage; under sparse-view conditions, insufficient supervision leads to irregular Gaussian distributions, characterized by globally sparse coverage, blurred background, and distorted high-frequency areas. To address this, we propose HeroGS, Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting, a unified framework that establishes hierarchical guidance across the image, feature, and parameter levels. At the image level, sparse supervision is converted into pseudo-dense guidance, globally regularizing the Gaussian distributions and forming a consistent foundation for subsequent optimization. Building upon this, Feature-Adaptive Densification and Pruning (FADP) at the feature level leverages low-level features to refine high-frequency details and adaptively densifies Gaussians in background regions. The optimized distributions then support Co-Pruned Geometry Consistency (CPG) at parameter level, which guides geometric consistency through parameter freezing and co-pruning, effectively removing inconsistent splats. The hierarchical guidance strategy effectively constrains and optimizes the overall Gaussian distributions, thereby enhancing both structural fidelity and rendering quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HeroGS achieves high-fidelity reconstructions and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines under sparse-view conditions.

AI.tldr: HeroGS通过图像、特征和参数三个层次的分层指导机制，解决了3D高斯溅射在稀疏视图条件下的性能下降问题，实现了高质量的重建和渲染。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)在稀疏视图条件下表现不佳，因为缺乏足够的监督导致高斯分布不规则，表现为全局覆盖稀疏、背景模糊和高频区域失真。需要一种方法来克服稀疏视图的监督不足问题。
AI.method: 提出HeroGS分层指导框架：1) 图像层：将稀疏监督转换为伪密集指导，全局正则化高斯分布；2) 特征层：特征自适应密集化和修剪(FADP)，利用低级特征细化高频细节，自适应密集化背景区域的高斯分布；3) 参数层：协同修剪几何一致性(CPG)，通过参数冻结和协同修剪指导几何一致性，移除不一致的溅射。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，HeroGS在稀疏视图条件下实现了高保真重建，并持续超越了最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HeroGS的分层指导策略有效约束和优化了整体高斯分布，从而提升了结构保真度和渲染质量，解决了3DGS在稀疏视图条件下的关键挑战。

title: Constrained Particle Seeking: Solving Diffusion Inverse Problems with Just Forward Passes
summary: Diffusion models have gained prominence as powerful generative tools for solving inverse problems due to their ability to model complex data distributions. However, existing methods typically rely on complete knowledge of the forward observation process to compute gradients for guided sampling, limiting their applicability in scenarios where such information is unavailable. In this work, we introduce \textbf{\emph{Constrained Particle Seeking (CPS)}}, a novel gradient-free approach that leverages all candidate particle information to actively search for the optimal particle while incorporating constraints aligned with high-density regions of the unconditional prior. Unlike previous methods that passively select promising candidates, CPS reformulates the inverse problem as a constrained optimization task, enabling more flexible and efficient particle seeking. We demonstrate that CPS can effectively solve both image and scientific inverse problems, achieving results comparable to gradient-based methods while significantly outperforming gradient-free alternatives. Code is available at https://github.com/deng-ai-lab/CPS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CPS的无梯度方法，用于解决逆问题，该方法利用所有候选粒子信息主动搜索最优粒子，无需前向观测过程的完整知识。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的方法通常需要完整的正向观测过程知识来计算梯度引导采样，这在信息不可用的情况下限制了其适用性。
AI.method: CPS（约束粒子搜索）将逆问题重新定义为约束优化任务，利用所有候选粒子信息主动搜索最优粒子，同时结合与无条件先验高密度区域对齐的约束。
AI.result: CPS能有效解决图像和科学逆问题，达到与基于梯度方法相当的结果，同时显著优于其他无梯度替代方法。
AI.conclusion: CPS提供了一种灵活高效的无梯度方法，扩展了扩散模型在逆问题中的应用范围，特别是在正向观测过程信息不可用的情况下。

title: Data-Efficient Brushstroke Generation with Diffusion Models for Oil Painting
summary: Many creative multimedia systems are built upon visual primitives such as strokes or textures, which are difficult to collect at scale and fundamentally different from natural image data. This data scarcity makes it challenging for modern generative models to learn expressive and controllable primitives, limiting their use in process-aware content creation. In this work, we study the problem of learning human-like brushstroke generation from a small set of hand-drawn samples (n=470) and propose StrokeDiff, a diffusion-based framework with Smooth Regularization (SmR). SmR injects stochastic visual priors during training, providing a simple mechanism to stabilize diffusion models under sparse supervision without altering the inference process. We further show how the learned primitives can be made controllable through a Bézier-based conditioning module and integrated into a complete stroke-based painting pipeline, including prediction, generation, ordering, and compositing. This demonstrates how data-efficient primitive modeling can support expressive and structured multimedia content creation. Experiments indicate that the proposed approach produces diverse and structurally coherent brushstrokes and enables paintings with richer texture and layering, validated by both automatic metrics and human evaluation.

AI.tldr: StrokeDiff：基于扩散模型的笔触生成框架，通过平滑正则化在小样本（470个手绘样本）下学习人类笔触，支持可控的笔画生成和完整的绘画流程
AI.motivation: 创意多媒体系统通常基于笔画或纹理等视觉基元，但这些数据难以大规模收集且与自然图像数据本质不同。数据稀缺使得现代生成模型难以学习表达性强且可控的基元，限制了它们在过程感知内容创作中的应用
AI.method: 提出StrokeDiff框架：1）采用扩散模型架构；2）引入平滑正则化（SmR）在训练中注入随机视觉先验，稳定稀疏监督下的扩散模型；3）通过贝塞尔曲线条件模块实现可控性；4）集成完整的笔画绘画流程（预测、生成、排序、合成）
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能生成多样且结构连贯的笔触，支持纹理更丰富、层次更丰富的绘画创作。通过自动指标和人工评估验证了其有效性
AI.conclusion: 数据高效的基元建模可以支持表达性强且结构化的多媒体内容创作，为小样本下的可控视觉基元学习提供了可行方案

title: Trivial Graph Features and Classical Learning are Enough to Detect Random Anomalies
summary: Detecting anomalies in link streams that represent various kinds of interactions is an important research topic with crucial applications. Because of the lack of ground truth data, proposed methods are mostly evaluated through their ability to detect randomly injected links. In contrast with most proposed methods, that rely on complex approaches raising computational and/or interpretability issues, we show here that trivial graph features and classical learning techniques are sufficient to detect such anomalies extremely well. This basic approach has very low computational costs and it leads to easily interpretable results. It also has many other desirable properties that we study through an extensive set of experiments. We conclude that detection methods should now target more complex kinds of anomalies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出使用简单的图特征和经典学习技术就能很好地检测链接流中的异常，比复杂方法更高效且可解释
AI.motivation: 当前链接流异常检测方法大多依赖复杂方法，存在计算成本和可解释性问题，且缺乏真实标注数据，主要评估方式是检测随机注入的链接
AI.method: 使用简单的图特征和经典学习技术来检测链接流中的异常，这种方法计算成本低且结果易于解释
AI.result: 通过大量实验证明，这种基础方法在检测异常方面表现极好，具有许多理想特性
AI.conclusion: 异常检测方法现在应该针对更复杂的异常类型，因为简单方法已经能很好地处理当前评估中使用的随机注入链接检测

title: GroundedSurg: A Multi-Procedure Benchmark for Language-Conditioned Surgical Tool Segmentation
summary: Clinically reliable perception of surgical scenes is essential for advancing intelligent, context-aware intraoperative assistance such as instrument handoff guidance, collision avoidance, and workflow-aware robotic support. Existing surgical tool benchmarks primarily evaluate category-level segmentation, requiring models to detect all instances of predefined instrument classes. However, real-world clinical decisions often require resolving references to a specific instrument instance based on its functional role, spatial relation, or anatomical interaction capabilities not captured by current evaluation paradigms. We introduce GroundedSurg, the first language-conditioned, instance-level surgical grounding benchmark. Each instance pairs a surgical image with a natural-language description targeting a single instrument, accompanied by structured spatial grounding annotations including bounding boxes and point-level anchors. The dataset spans ophthalmic, laparoscopic, robotic, and open procedures, encompassing diverse instrument types, imaging conditions, and operative complexities. By jointly evaluating linguistic reference resolution and pixel-level localization, GroundedSurg enables a systematic and realistic evaluation of vision-language models in clinically realistic multi-instrument scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial performance gaps across modern segmentation and VLMs, highlighting the urgent need for clinically grounded vision-language reasoning in surgical AI systems. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/gaash-lab/GroundedSurg

AI.tldr: 提出首个语言条件实例级手术器械定位基准GroundedSurg，用于评估视觉语言模型在临床真实多器械场景中的表现
AI.motivation: 现有手术工具基准主要评估类别级分割，但临床决策需要基于器械功能角色、空间关系和解剖交互能力来识别特定实例，当前评估范式无法满足这一需求
AI.method: 构建包含眼科、腹腔镜、机器人、开放手术的多样化数据集，每实例包含手术图像、自然语言描述、边界框和点级锚点标注，联合评估语言参考解析和像素级定位
AI.result: 实验显示现代分割模型和视觉语言模型在GroundedSurg基准上存在显著性能差距，凸显手术AI系统需要临床基础的视觉语言推理能力
AI.conclusion: GroundedSurg为系统评估视觉语言模型在临床真实多器械场景中的表现提供了首个基准，推动了面向临床决策的手术AI系统发展

title: Tide: A Customisable Dataset Generator for Anti-Money Laundering Research
comment: Synthetic AML transaction datasets (Tide, HI and LI variants) are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18804069
summary:
The lack of accessible transactional data significantly hinders machine learning research for Anti-Money Laundering (AML). Privacy and legal concerns prevent the sharing of real financial data, while existing synthetic generators focus on simplistic structural patterns and neglect the temporal dynamics (timing and frequency) that characterise sophisticated laundering schemes.
  We present Tide, an open-source synthetic dataset generator that produces graph-based financial networks incorporating money laundering patterns defined by both structural and temporal characteristics. Tide enables reproducible, customisable dataset generation tailored to specific research needs. We release two reference datasets with varying illicit ratios (LI: 0.10\%, HI: 0.19\%), alongside the implementation of state-of-the-art detection models.
  Evaluation across these datasets reveals condition-dependent model rankings: LightGBM achieves the highest PR-AUC (78.05) in the low illicit ratio condition, while XGBoost performs best (85.12) at higher fraud prevalence. These divergent rankings demonstrate that the reference datasets can meaningfully differentiate model capabilities across operational conditions.
  Tide provides the research community with a configurable benchmark that exposes meaningful performance variation across model architectures, advancing the development of robust AML detection methods.

AI.tldr: Tide是一个开源合成数据集生成器，用于反洗钱研究，能生成包含结构和时间特征的图金融网络，并发布了两个不同非法交易比例的参考数据集。
AI.motivation: 由于隐私和法律限制，真实的金融交易数据难以获取，而现有的合成生成器过于简化，忽略了洗钱模式的时间动态特征（时间和频率），这阻碍了反洗钱机器学习研究的发展。
AI.method: 开发了Tide开源合成数据集生成器，能够生成基于图的金融网络，这些网络包含了既考虑结构特征又考虑时间特征的洗钱模式。系统支持可重复、可定制的数据集生成，并发布了两个不同非法交易比例（LI: 0.10%，HI: 0.19%）的参考数据集。
AI.result: 在不同数据集上的评估显示模型排名具有条件依赖性：在低非法比例条件下，LightGBM获得最高的PR-AUC（78.05）；在高欺诈比例条件下，XGBoost表现最佳（85.12）。这些不同的排名表明参考数据集能够有效区分不同操作条件下模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: Tide为研究社区提供了一个可配置的基准测试工具，能够揭示不同模型架构之间的性能差异，从而推动稳健的反洗钱检测方法的发展。

title: DeAR: Fine-Grained VLM Adaptation by Decomposing Attention Head Roles
summary: Prompt learning is a dominant paradigm for adapting pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to downstream tasks. However, existing methods often rely on a simplistic, layer-centric view, assuming shallow layers capture general features while deep layers handle task-specific knowledge. This assumption results in uncontrolled interactions between learnable tokens and original tokens. Task-specific knowledge could degrades the model's core generalization and creates a trade-off between task adaptation and the preservation of zero-shot generalization. To address this, we challenge the layer-centric view and propose \textbf{DeAR}, a framework that achieves fine-grained VLM adaptation by \textbf{De}composing \textbf{A}ttention head \textbf{R}oles. We posit that the functional specialization within VLMs occurs not between layers, but at the finer-grained level of individual attention heads in the deeper layers. Based on this insight, we introduce a novel metric, Concept Entropy, to systematically classify attention heads into distinct functional roles: \textit{Attribute}, \textit{Generalization}, and \textit{Mixed}. Guided by these roles, we introduce specialized attribute tokens and a Role-Based Attention Mask mechanism to precisely control information flow, ensuring generalization heads remain isolated from task-specific knowledge. We further incorporate a Task-Adaptive Fusion Strategy for inference. Extensive experiments on fifteen datasets show that DeAR achieves a strong balance between task adaptation and generalization, outperforming previous methods across various tasks.

AI.tldr: DeAR挑战了传统层级中心视角，提出基于注意力头角色分解的细粒度视觉语言模型适配框架，通过概念熵分类注意力头功能角色，并引入角色注意力掩码机制，在任务适配和零样本泛化间取得更好平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法基于简单的层级中心假设（浅层捕捉通用特征，深层处理任务特定知识），导致可学习token与原始token的交互不受控制，任务特定知识可能损害模型核心泛化能力，形成任务适配与零样本泛化保护之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 1. 提出概念熵指标系统分类注意力头为三种功能角色：属性头、泛化头和混合头；2. 引入专用属性token和基于角色的注意力掩码机制，精确控制信息流，确保泛化头与任务特定知识隔离；3. 采用任务自适应融合策略进行推理。
AI.result: 在15个数据集上的广泛实验表明，DeAR在任务适配和泛化之间取得了良好平衡，在各种任务上优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: DeAR挑战了传统的层级中心视角，证明了视觉语言模型的功能专门化发生在更细粒度的注意力头层面而非层级之间，通过基于角色分解的适配框架实现了更好的任务适配与泛化平衡。

title: Diagnosing Generalization Failures from Representational Geometry Markers
comment: Published in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2026
summary: Generalization, the ability to perform well beyond the training context, is a hallmark of biological and artificial intelligence, yet anticipating unseen failures remains a central challenge. Conventional approaches often take a ``bottom-up'' mechanistic route by reverse-engineering interpretable features or circuits to build explanatory models. While insightful, these methods often struggle to provide the high-level, predictive signals for anticipating failure in real-world deployment. Here, we propose using a ``top-down'' approach to studying generalization failures inspired by medical biomarkers: identifying system-level measurements that serve as robust indicators of a model's future performance. Rather than mapping out detailed internal mechanisms, we systematically design and test network markers to probe structure, function links, identify prognostic indicators, and validate predictions in real-world settings. In image classification, we find that task-relevant geometric properties of in-distribution (ID) object manifolds consistently forecast poor out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. In particular, reductions in two geometric measures, effective manifold dimensionality and utility, predict weaker OOD performance across diverse architectures, optimizers, and datasets. We apply this finding to transfer learning with ImageNet-pretrained models. We consistently find that the same geometric patterns predict OOD transfer performance more reliably than ID accuracy. This work demonstrates that representational geometry can expose hidden vulnerabilities, offering more robust guidance for model selection and AI interpretability.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种"自上而下"的方法来研究AI模型的泛化失败，类似于医学生物标志物，通过系统级测量来预测模型在未见数据上的表现，发现图像分类中对象流形的几何特性可以可靠预测OOD泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统"自下而上"的机制解释方法虽然能提供洞察，但难以提供预测模型在真实部署中失败的高层信号。作者希望找到类似医学生物标志物的系统级测量指标，能够可靠预测模型的未来性能，特别是泛化失败。
AI.method: 采用"自上而下"的方法，设计并测试网络标记来探测结构-功能联系，识别预后指标，并在真实环境中验证预测。具体通过分析图像分类任务中对象流形的几何特性，特别是有效流形维度和效用这两个几何度量。
AI.result: 发现在分布内（ID）对象流形的任务相关几何特性能够一致地预测分布外（OOD）泛化性能差。有效流形维度和效用的减少预测了跨不同架构、优化器和数据集的较弱OOD性能。在ImageNet预训练模型的迁移学习中，相同的几何模式比ID准确度更可靠地预测OOD迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 表示几何能够揭示隐藏的脆弱性，为模型选择和AI可解释性提供更稳健的指导。这种"自上而下"的生物标志物方法为预测模型泛化失败提供了新的视角和实用工具。

title: GuiDINO: Rethinking Vision Foundation Model in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Foundation vision models are increasingly adopted in medical image analysis. Due to domain shift, these pretrained models misalign with medical image segmentation needs without being fully fine-tuned or lightly adapted. We introduce GuiDINO, a framework that repositions native foundation model to acting as a visual guidance generator for downstream segmentation. GuiDINO extracts visual feature representation from DINOv3 and converts them into a spatial guide mask via a lightweight TokenBook mechanism, which aggregates token-prototype similarities. This guide mask gates feature activations in multiple segmentation backbones, thereby injecting foundation-model priors while preserving the inductive biases and efficiency of medical dedicated architectures. Training relies on a guide supervision objective loss that aligns the guide mask to ground-truth regions, optionally augmented by a boundary-focused hinge loss to sharpen fine structures. GuiDINO also supports parameter-efficient adaptation through LoRA on the DINOv3 guide backbone. Across diverse medical datasets and nnUNet-style inference, GuiDINO consistently improves segmentation quality and boundary robustness, suggesting a practical alternative to fine-tuning and offering a new perspective on how foundation models can best serve medical vision. Code is available at https://github.com/Hi-FishU/GuiDINO

AI.tldr: GuiDINO是一个利用基础视觉模型（DINOv3）作为视觉引导生成器的医学图像分割框架，通过轻量级TokenBook机制将特征转换为空间引导掩码，提升分割质量和边界鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 预训练的基础视觉模型在医学图像分析中存在领域偏移问题，直接微调或轻量适应无法很好地对齐医学图像分割需求，需要一种更有效的方式来利用基础模型的先验知识。
AI.method: 1. 从DINOv3提取视觉特征表示；2. 通过轻量级TokenBook机制将特征转换为空间引导掩码；3. 用引导掩码门控多个分割骨干网络的特征激活；4. 使用引导监督损失对齐引导掩码与真实区域；5. 可选边界聚焦铰链损失增强精细结构；6. 支持LoRA参数高效适应。
AI.result: 在多样化的医学数据集和nnUNet风格推理中，GuiDINO一致地提升了分割质量和边界鲁棒性，为微调提供了实用的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: GuiDINO为如何最好地利用基础模型服务医学视觉提供了新视角，通过将基础模型重新定位为视觉引导生成器，在保持医学专用架构归纳偏置和效率的同时注入基础模型先验。

title: SEAR: Sample Efficient Action Chunking Reinforcement Learning
summary: Action chunking can improve exploration and value estimation in long horizon reinforcement learning, but makes learning substantially harder since the critic must evaluate action sequences rather than single actions, greatly increasing approximation and data efficiency challenges. As a result, existing action chunking methods, primarily designed for the offline and offline-to-online settings, have not achieved strong performance in purely online reinforcement learning. We introduce SEAR, an off policy online reinforcement learning algorithm for action chunking. It exploits the temporal structure of action chunks and operates with a receding horizon, effectively combining the benefits of small and large chunk sizes. SEAR outperforms state of the art online reinforcement learning methods on Metaworld, training with chunk sizes up to 20.

AI.tldr: SEAR是一种用于动作分块的在线强化学习算法，通过利用动作块的时间结构和滑动窗口机制，在长视野任务中取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 动作分块可以改善长视野强化学习中的探索和价值估计，但现有方法主要针对离线和离线到在线设置，在纯在线强化学习中表现不佳，需要新的在线算法来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: SEAR利用动作块的时间结构，采用滑动窗口机制，有效结合小和大分块尺寸的优势，是一种离策略在线强化学习算法。
AI.result: SEAR在Metaworld基准测试中优于最先进的在线强化学习方法，能够训练高达20的分块尺寸。
AI.conclusion: SEAR成功解决了动作分块在在线强化学习中的挑战，通过创新的时间结构利用和滑动窗口设计，在长视野任务中实现了优越性能。

title: Improved MambdaBDA Framework for Robust Building Damage Assessment Across Disaster Domains
